en.tldr: Direct numerical simulation reveals that the Markov-Einstein coherence length of the turbulent energy cascade is about three times the canonical estimate, with intermittent events carrying longer memory while quiescent cascade recovers the canonical value, indicating the need for non-Markovian corrections.
en.motivation: To test the validity of the Markov approximation in the turbulent energy cascade and measure whether the Markov-Einstein coherence length exceeds traditional estimates.
en.method: Direct numerical simulation of forced isotropic turbulence at Reλ≈1300 and 433, using Markov-by-construction null surrogates and stratifying gap-scan tests by local dissipation intensity and increment amplitude.
en.result: Coherence length Δr≈3.2-3.6, about three times the canonical estimate; intermittent events carry Δr≈3-4, quiescent cascade recovers Δr≈1.0-1.4; pattern reverses near dissipation range, and memory is Reynolds-number-independent.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the nature of memory effects in turbulence cascades and guides the construction of non-Markovian correction models.

idea_spark.idea: Design a non-Markovian corrected Fokker-Planck equation informed by the memory length of intermittent events to more accurately describe the turbulence cascade.
idea_spark.risk: Non-Markovian corrections may increase model complexity and require extensive high-resolution data for parameterization.
idea_spark.inspiration: The finding that intermittent events carry longer memory inspires viewing turbulence as a stochastic process with long-range correlations, similar to certain climate or financial time series.

papers.title: GeoFunFlow-3D: A Physics-Guided Generative Flow Matching Framework for High-Fidelity 3D Aerodynamic Inference over Complex Geometries
papers.summary: Deep generative models and neural operators have demonstrated significant potential for 3D aerodynamic inference. However, they often face inherent challenges in maintaining physical consistency and preserving high-frequency features, primarily due to spectral bias and gradient conflicts within the governing equations. To address these issues, we propose GeoFunFlow-3D, a physics-guided generative flow matching framework. Temporally, we utilize optimal transport theory to build the generation path, ensuring stable training dynamics. Spectrally, we introduce a high-order discrete engine without automatic differentiation (No-AD) to reduce gradient stiffness. Spatially, a topology-aware super-resolution module (SATO) is employed to rigorously enforce physical laws in localized regions such as shock waves. We evaluated our framework on complex industrial datasets. On the BlendedNet dataset, the model successfully avoids mode collapse even under sparse data conditions. For the NASA Rotor37 test, it accurately captures 3D detached shock structures. Compared to conventional operators, GeoFunFlow-3D significantly improves accuracy, reducing the pressure field error (RRMSE) to 0.0215 while maintaining competitive inference efficiency. Ultimately, this work provides a reliable, geometry-driven approach for generating high-dimensional fluid fields.

ai.tldr: 提出GeoFunFlow-3D框架，结合最优传输、无自动微分高阶离散引擎和拓扑感知超分辨率模块，实现高保真三维气动推理。
ai.motivation: 现有深度生成模型和神经算子存在物理不一致和高频特征丢失问题，源于谱偏差和方程梯度冲突。
ai.method: 时间上采用最优传输构建生成路径；频谱上引入无自动微分高阶离散引擎降低梯度刚度；空间上使用拓扑感知超分辨率模块在激波等局部区域严格施加物理定律。
ai.result: 在BlendedNet数据集上避免模式坍塌，在NASA Rotor37上准确捕捉三维脱体激波结构，压力场RRMSE降至0.0215，推理效率有竞争力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可靠、几何驱动的生成高维流场方法，可用于复杂几何气动设计优化。

idea_spark.idea: 将最优传输与物理约束结合，在生成过程中同时保证训练稳定性和局部物理一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 超分辨率模块对复杂几何的泛化能力可能受限，需更多验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用最优传输理论构建生成路径，避免模式坍塌，为稀疏数据下的物理场生成提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes GeoFunFlow-3D, a physics-guided generative flow matching framework integrating optimal transport, a high-order discrete engine without automatic differentiation, and a topology-aware super-resolution module for high-fidelity 3D aerodynamic inference.
en.motivation: Existing deep generative models and neural operators suffer from physical inconsistency and loss of high-frequency features due to spectral bias and gradient conflicts in governing equations.
en.method: Temporally uses optimal transport to build generation paths; spectrally introduces a high-order discrete engine without automatic differentiation to reduce gradient stiffness; spatially employs a topology-aware super-resolution module to enforce physical laws in localized regions such as shock waves.
en.result: Avoids mode collapse on BlendedNet dataset, accurately captures 3D detached shock structures on NASA Rotor37, and reduces pressure field RRMSE to 0.0215 while maintaining competitive inference efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reliable, geometry-driven approach for generating high-dimensional fluid fields, useful for aerodynamic design optimization over complex geometries.

idea_spark.idea: Combining optimal transport with physical constraints ensures both training stability and local physical consistency in generation.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization of the super-resolution module to complex geometries may be limited and requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using optimal transport to build generation paths avoids mode collapse, offering a new perspective for physical field generation under sparse data.

papers.title: Effect of kinetic energy operator on double heterostructures spectra
papers.summary: We report on the effect of the kinetic energy operator ambiguity on the energy spectra of various double heterostructures when the mass of the charge carriers, subjected to a potential, depends on position. The spectra are calculated using two complementary techniques. In the first case, which is not always possible, the energy spectrum satisfies a transcendental equation, which is obtained through an analytical process. While in the second, which can be used practically in any double heterostructure (DH), the energy spectra correspond to the poles of the reflection coefficient of the heterostructure. The spectra thus obtained complement those already reported in a previous reference, since we now include the spectra of another kinetic energy operator (KEO). Finally, we show how these methods allow us to critically analyze some statements that have been made about the relevance of some kinetic energy operators in some simpler heterostructures.

ai.tldr: 研究了动能算符歧义对双异质结构能谱的影响，当载流子质量依赖于位置时，通过解析法和反射系数极点法计算能谱。
ai.motivation: 澄清动能算符选择对双异质结构能谱计算的影响，并批判性分析先前关于某些动能算符相关性的论断。
ai.method: 采用两种互补技术：一是通过解析过程得到满足超越方程的能谱；二是利用异质结构反射系数的极点计算能谱，适用于任意双异质结构。
ai.result: 获得了另一种动能算符的能谱，补充了先前文献的结果，并展示了这些方法如何批判性分析关于某些动能算符在简单异质结构中相关性的论断。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解动能算符歧义对异质结构能谱的影响，并提供两种计算能谱的方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将反射系数极点法应用于更复杂的异质结构，如多量子阱或梯度组分结构，以研究动能算符选择对能谱的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 解析法可能不适用于所有结构，且反射系数极点法可能对数值精度敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发探索动能算符歧义在其他量子系统（如纳米线或拓扑绝缘体）中的效应。

en.tldr: Investigates the effect of kinetic energy operator ambiguity on the energy spectra of double heterostructures with position-dependent mass, using analytical and reflection coefficient pole methods.
en.motivation: To clarify the impact of kinetic energy operator choice on double heterostructure spectra and critically analyze previous claims about operator relevance.
en.method: Two complementary techniques: analytical derivation yielding transcendental equations, and reflection coefficient pole method applicable to any double heterostructure.
en.result: Obtained spectra for an additional kinetic energy operator, complementing prior work, and demonstrated how these methods critically assess statements about operator relevance in simpler heterostructures.
en.help_to_user: Provides understanding of kinetic energy operator ambiguity effects on heterostructure spectra and offers two computational methods.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the reflection coefficient pole method to more complex heterostructures, such as multiple quantum wells or graded composition structures, to study operator choice effects.
idea_spark.risk: Analytical method may not be feasible for all structures; reflection coefficient pole method may be sensitive to numerical precision.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires exploration of kinetic energy operator ambiguity in other quantum systems like nanowires or topological insulators.

papers.title: Computational Design and Experimental Validation of Photoactive PARP1 Inhibitors
papers.summary: Light-activated drugs are a promising way to treat localized diseases for which existing treatments have severe side effects. However, their development is complicated by the set of photophysical and biological properties that must be simultaneously optimized. Here we used computational techniques to find a set of promising candidates for the photoactive inhibition of the poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase 1 (PARP1) cancer target. Using our recently developed methods based on atomistic simulation and machine learning (ML), we screened a set of 5 million hypothetical photoactive ligands. Our workflow used protein-ligand docking to identify candidates with differential PARP1 binding under light and dark conditions; ML force fields and quantum chemistry calculations to predict p$K_\mathrm{a}$, absorption spectra, and thermal half-lives; graph-based surrogate models to screen additional compounds; excited-state nonadiabatic dynamics with ML force fields to estimate quantum yields; and free energy perturbation (FEP) to refine binding predictions. From these predictions, we prioritized a small set of synthetically feasible candidates expected to have red-shifted absorption spectra, thermal half-lives on the order of seconds to minutes, and isomer-dependent PARP1 binding under visible-light control. We synthesized 10 candidates and experimentally characterized their photobehavior and PARP1 inhibition constants. Among the validated compounds, \textbf{1} showed a 15-fold increase in inhibition of PARP1 upon green-light irradiation at 519 nm (208.8 $\pm$ 28.3 $μ$M vs 14.4 $\pm$ 1.9 $μ$M). These results validate the computation-guided screening strategy for identifying red-shifted PARP1 photoinhibitors, while also underscoring current limitations such as rapid thermal relaxation in aqueous media.

ai.tldr: 通过计算筛选和实验验证，发现了一种光激活的PARP1抑制剂，在绿光照射下抑制活性提高15倍。
ai.motivation: 传统癌症治疗副作用大，光激活药物可局部治疗，但开发困难，需要同时优化光物理和生物性质。
ai.method: 结合原子模拟、机器学习、蛋白-配体对接、自由能微扰等方法，从500万虚拟配体中筛选出候选物，并合成10个进行实验验证。
ai.result: 化合物1在519 nm绿光照射下，PARP1抑制常数从208.8 μM降至14.4 μM，抑制活性提高15倍。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了计算引导的光药理学筛选策略的有效性，为设计光控抗癌药物提供了方法学参考。

en.tldr: Computational screening and experimental validation identified a photoactive PARP1 inhibitor with 15-fold increased activity upon green-light irradiation.
en.motivation: Traditional cancer treatments have severe side effects; light-activated drugs enable localized therapy but require simultaneous optimization of photophysical and biological properties.
en.method: Combined atomistic simulation, machine learning, protein-ligand docking, and free energy perturbation to screen 5 million virtual ligands, then synthesized and tested 10 candidates.
en.result: Compound 1 showed a 15-fold increase in PARP1 inhibition upon 519 nm green-light irradiation (IC50 from 208.8 μM to 14.4 μM).
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates an effective computation-guided screening strategy for photopharmacology, providing a methodological reference for designing light-controlled anticancer drugs.

idea_spark.idea: Combining nonadiabatic dynamics with free energy perturbation could further optimize quantum yield and thermal stability of photoswitches.
idea_spark.risk: Fast thermal relaxation in aqueous media may limit in vivo application; stabilization strategies like encapsulation or chemical modification are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using machine learning force fields to accelerate excited-state dynamics simulations opens new avenues for predicting photophysical properties in photopharmacology.

papers.title: Multiple positive solutions with prescribed masses for a coupled Schrödinger system: mass mixed and Sobolev critical coupled case
papers.summary: The aim of this paper is to establish multiple positive normalized solutions $(u,v,λ_1,λ_2)\in H^1(\mathbb{R}^N,\mathbb{R}^2)\times \mathbb{R}^2$ to the following coupled Schrödinger system involving Sobolev critical exponent: $$ \begin{cases} -Δu+λ_1 u=μ_1|u|^{p-2}u+να|u|^{α-2}u|v|^β, x\in \mathbb{R}^N,\\ -Δv+λ_2 v=μ_2|v|^{q-2}v+νβ|v|^{β-2}v|u|^α, x\in \mathbb{R}^N,\\ \int_{\mathbb{R}^N}|u|^2\mathrm{d}x=a, \int_{\mathbb{R}^N}|v|^2\mathrm{d}x=b, \end{cases} N\geq 3, $$ where $μ_1,μ_2, ν, a, b>0$. We are particularly interested in the mass mixed case that $2<p, q<2+\frac{4}{N}, α>1, β>1$, and $α+β=2^*:=\frac{2N}{N-2}$. For sufficiently small $ν>0$, we demonstrate that the above system admits two positive solutions, one of which serves as a local minimizer, and the other as a mountain pass solution. By developing some new technical lemmas on the interaction estimates, we are managed to resolves Soave's open problem [{\it J. Funct. Anal.}, 2020, Remark 1.1] within the context of the system case. Notably, our existence result holds true for all dimensions $N\geq 3$. Our results also significantly extend the result of Gou and Jeanjean [{\it Nonlinearity}, 2018, Theorem 1.1] to the Sobolev critical coupled case and removing the hypothesis ``either $p,q\leq α+β-\frac{2}{N}$ or $|p-q|\leq \frac{2}{N}$" for $N\geq 5$. Additionally, we also establish a sequence of properties for the local minimizer, including local uniqueness, continuity with respect to the small parameter $ν$, and the limiting profiles for $ν\rightarrow 0^+$.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一类带有Sobolev临界指数的耦合Schrödinger系统，在质量混合情形下证明了两个正归一化解的存在性，并解决了Soave提出的公开问题。
ai.motivation: 解决耦合Schrödinger系统中质量混合情形下临界指数问题的存在性，并推广已有结果。
ai.method: 通过发展新的交互估计引理，结合变分方法（局部极小化与山路定理）构造解。
ai.result: 对于小参数ν>0，系统存在两个正解：一个局部极小化解和一个山路解；结果对所有维度N≥3成立，并去除了先前工作中的假设条件。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了耦合临界系统中归一化解的构造方法和存在性理论，可用于相关非线性偏微分方程的研究。

idea_spark.idea: 利用小参数ν的扰动，通过局部极小化和山路论证同时获得两个解。
idea_spark.risk: 小参数ν的假设可能限制结果的普适性，需验证ν较大时的情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Soave的公开问题从单方程推广到系统，启发更多临界耦合问题的研究。

en.tldr: This paper establishes two positive normalized solutions for a coupled Schrödinger system with Sobolev critical exponent in the mass mixed case, resolving an open problem by Soave.
en.motivation: To address the existence of normalized solutions for coupled critical systems and extend previous results by removing restrictive hypotheses.
en.method: New interaction estimates combined with variational methods (local minimization and mountain pass theorem).
en.result: For small ν>0, the system admits two positive solutions: a local minimizer and a mountain pass solution; holds for all N≥3 and removes previous assumptions.
en.help_to_user: Provides constructive existence theory for normalized solutions in coupled critical systems, useful for nonlinear PDE research.

idea_spark.idea: Perturbation by small parameter ν yields two distinct solutions via local minimization and mountain pass arguments.
idea_spark.risk: The small ν assumption may limit generality; behavior for larger ν remains open.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending Soave's open problem from single to coupled systems inspires further studies on critical coupled problems.

papers.title: Latent-Hysteresis Graph ODEs: Modeling Coupled Topology-Feature Evolution via Continuous Phase Transitions
papers.summary: Graph neural ordinary differential equations (Graph ODEs) extend graph learning from discrete message-passing layers to continuous-time representation flows. While it supports adaptive long-range propagation, we show that Graph ODEs with strictly positive irreducible mixing operators face an inherent \emph{monostability trap}: in the long-time regime, information leakage is unavoidable and the dynamics converge to a single global consensus attractor. We propose the \textbf{Hysteresis Graph ODE (HGODE)}, which couples feature evolution with a latent topological potential driven by a learned pairwise force. A double-well edge potential and bipolarized gate allow edge states to polarize into connected or insulated phases while preserving differentiability. We provide asymptotic analysis of the collapse mechanism and the proposed hysteretic topology dynamics, and validate HGODE on theory-driven synthetic diagnostics and real-world graph benchmarks.

ai.tldr: 提出滞后图ODE（HGODE），通过双阱势和双极化门控耦合拓扑与特征演化，解决图ODE的单调稳定陷阱。
ai.motivation: 现有图ODE在长期演化中信息泄漏并收敛到单一共识吸引子，限制了表达能力。
ai.method: 引入潜在拓扑势（由成对力驱动）和双阱边势，使边状态可极化为连接或绝缘相，同时保持可微性。
ai.result: 理论分析证明了崩溃机制和滞后拓扑动力学，在合成诊断和真实图基准上验证了有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过连续相变建模图拓扑与特征的耦合演化，避免信息过度平滑。

idea_spark.idea: 将双阱势与门控机制结合，实现拓扑状态的连续可微切换，为图ODE引入多稳态。
idea_spark.risk: 双阱势可能引入额外超参数，需谨慎调节以避免训练不稳定或模式坍塌。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受物理中滞后现象（如磁滞）启发，将拓扑相变建模为连续可微过程。

en.tldr: Proposes Hysteresis Graph ODE (HGODE) that couples topology and feature evolution via a double-well potential and bipolarized gate to overcome the monostability trap of standard Graph ODEs.
en.motivation: Standard Graph ODEs suffer from information leakage and converge to a single consensus attractor in the long-time regime, limiting expressiveness.
en.method: Introduces a latent topological potential driven by learned pairwise forces and a double-well edge potential, allowing edge states to polarize into connected or insulated phases while preserving differentiability.
en.result: Theoretical analysis of collapse mechanism and hysteretic topology dynamics; validated on synthetic diagnostics and real-world graph benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to model coupled topology-feature evolution via continuous phase transitions, avoiding over-smoothing.

idea_spark.idea: Combining double-well potential with gating enables continuous differentiable switching of topological states, introducing multistability into Graph ODEs.
idea_spark.risk: The double-well potential may introduce extra hyperparameters that require careful tuning to avoid training instability or mode collapse.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by hysteresis phenomena in physics (e.g., magnetic hysteresis), modeling topological phase transitions as a continuous differentiable process.

papers.title: Information bottleneck for learning the phase space of dynamics from high-dimensional experimental data
papers.summary: Identifying the dynamical state variables of a system from high-dimensional observations is a central problem across physical sciences. The challenge is that the state variables are not directly observable and must be inferred from raw high-dimensional data without supervision. Here we introduce DySIB (Dynamical Symmetric Information Bottleneck) as a method to learn low-dimensional representations of time-series data by maximizing predictive mutual information between past and future observation windows while penalizing representation complexity. This objective operates entirely in latent space and avoids reconstruction of the observations. We apply DySIB to an experimental video dataset of a physical pendulum, where the underlying state space is known. The method, with hyperparameters of the learning architecture set self-consistently by the data, recovers a two-dimensional representation that matches the dimensionality, topology, and geometry of the pendulum phase space, with the learned coordinates aligning smoothly with the canonical angle and angular velocity. These results demonstrate, on a well-characterized experimental system, that predictive information in latent space can be used to recover interpretable dynamical coordinates directly from high-dimensional data.

ai.tldr: 提出DySIB方法，从高维实验数据中无监督学习动力系统的低维相空间表示，并在物理摆视频数据上验证其能恢复与真实相空间匹配的二维坐标。
ai.motivation: 物理系统中状态变量通常不可直接观测，需要从高维观测数据中无监督推断，现有方法依赖重构或先验知识。
ai.method: DySIB通过最大化过去与未来观测窗口之间的预测互信息，同时惩罚表示复杂度，在潜在空间中学习低维表示，避免观测重构。
ai.result: 在物理摆实验视频上，DySIB自动恢复出二维表示，其维度、拓扑和几何与真实相空间一致，学习到的坐标平滑对齐于角度和角速度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需标签或重构即可从高维时间序列中提取可解释动力系统坐标的通用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 结合变分信息瓶颈与对称性约束，在潜在空间中直接学习预测性表示。
idea_spark.risk: 对超参数敏感，且依赖数据中预测信息的充分性；复杂系统可能需更高维表示。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用互信息最大化替代重构损失，避免解码器设计，简化无监督动力学学习。

zh.tldr: 提出DySIB方法，从高维实验数据中无监督学习动力系统的低维相空间表示，并在物理摆视频数据上验证其能恢复与真实相空间匹配的二维坐标。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需标签或重构即可从高维时间序列中提取可解释动力系统坐标的通用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 结合变分信息瓶颈与对称性约束，在潜在空间中直接学习预测性表示。
idea_spark.risk: 对超参数敏感，且依赖数据中预测信息的充分性；复杂系统可能需更高维表示。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用互信息最大化替代重构损失，避免解码器设计，简化无监督动力学学习。

en.tldr: Introduces DySIB, an unsupervised method to learn low-dimensional phase space representations from high-dimensional experimental data, validated on a physical pendulum video dataset where it recovers a 2D representation matching the true phase space.
en.motivation: State variables in physical systems are often unobservable and must be inferred from high-dimensional observations without supervision, while existing methods rely on reconstruction or prior knowledge.
en.method: DySIB maximizes predictive mutual information between past and future observation windows while penalizing representation complexity, operating entirely in latent space without reconstructing observations.
en.result: On experimental pendulum videos, DySIB automatically recovers a 2D representation whose dimensionality, topology, and geometry match the true phase space, with learned coordinates aligning smoothly with angle and angular velocity.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general method to extract interpretable dynamical coordinates from high-dimensional time series without labels or reconstruction.

idea_spark.idea: Combine variational information bottleneck with symmetry constraints to learn predictive representations directly in latent space.
idea_spark.risk: Sensitive to hyperparameters and relies on sufficient predictive information in data; complex systems may require higher-dimensional representations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using mutual information maximization instead of reconstruction loss avoids decoder design and simplifies unsupervised dynamics learning.

papers.title: PathMoG: A Pathway-Centric Modular Graph Neural Network for Multi-Omics Survival Prediction
papers.summary: Cancer survival prediction from multi-omics data remains challenging because prognostic signals are high-dimensional, heterogeneous, and distributed across interacting genes and pathways. We propose PathMoG, a pathway-centric modular graph neural network for multi-omics survival prediction. PathMoG reorganizes genome-scale inputs into 354 KEGG-informed pathway modules, introduces a Hierarchical Omics Modulation module to condition gene-expression representations on mutation, copy number variation, pathway, and clinical context, and uses dual-level attention to capture both intra-pathway driver signals and inter-pathway clinical relevance. We evaluated PathMoG on 5,650 patients across 10 TCGA cancer types and observed consistent improvements over representative survival baselines. The framework further provides gene-level, pathway-level, and patient-level interpretability, supporting biologically grounded and clinically relevant risk stratification.

ai.tldr: 提出PathMoG，一种以通路为中心的模块化图神经网络，用于多组学癌症生存预测。
ai.motivation: 多组学数据维度高、异质性强，且预后信号分布在相互作用的基因和通路中，现有方法难以有效整合。
ai.method: 将基因组输入重组为354个KEGG通路模块，设计层次化组学调制模块，利用双级注意力捕获通路内驱动信号和通路间临床相关性。
ai.result: 在10种TCGA癌症类型的5650名患者上取得一致改进，并提供基因、通路和患者级别的可解释性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员从多组学数据中识别与生存相关的关键通路和基因，实现生物学可解释的风险分层。

idea_spark.idea: 将层次化调制模块与图注意力机制结合，动态调整基因表达表示，以适应不同组学模态的交互。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖KEGG通路先验知识，可能遗漏未知通路或非通路基因的贡献。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物学中通路功能模块化启发，将图神经网络设计为与生物结构对齐，提升模型可解释性。

en.tldr: Proposes PathMoG, a pathway-centric modular graph neural network for multi-omics cancer survival prediction.
en.motivation: Multi-omics data are high-dimensional, heterogeneous, and prognostic signals are distributed across interacting genes and pathways, making integration challenging.
en.method: Reorganizes genome-scale inputs into 354 KEGG-informed pathway modules, designs a Hierarchical Omics Modulation module, and uses dual-level attention to capture intra-pathway driver signals and inter-pathway clinical relevance.
en.result: Achieves consistent improvements over baselines on 5,650 patients across 10 TCGA cancer types, with gene-level, pathway-level, and patient-level interpretability.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers identify key pathways and genes associated with survival from multi-omics data, enabling biologically interpretable risk stratification.

idea_spark.idea: Combine hierarchical modulation with graph attention to dynamically adjust gene expression representations conditioned on different omics modalities.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on KEGG pathway priors, potentially missing contributions from unknown pathways or non-pathway genes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by biological pathway functional modules, aligning graph neural network design with biological structure to enhance interpretability.

papers.title: FlowPlace: Flow Matching for Chip Placement
papers.summary: Chip placement plays an important role in physical design. While generative models like diffusion models offer promising learning-based solutions, current methods have the following limitations: they use random synthetic data for pre-training, require long sampling times, and often result in overlaps due to their dependence on gradient-based solvers during the sampling process. To overcome these issues, we propose FlowPlace, which features mask-guided synthetic data generation, flow-based efficient training with flexible prior injection, and hard constraint sampling for overlap-free layouts. Experiments on OpenROAD and ICCAD 2015 benchmarks show FlowPlace achieves better PPA metrics, 10-50$\times$ faster sampling efficiency, and zero overlaps.

ai.tldr: FlowPlace 提出基于流匹配的芯片布局方法，通过掩码引导合成数据、流式高效训练和硬约束采样，实现无重叠布局，采样速度提升10-50倍。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散模型方法存在预训练数据随机、采样时间长、布局重叠等问题。
ai.method: 采用掩码引导合成数据生成、基于流的灵活先验注入训练和硬约束采样。
ai.result: 在 OpenROAD 和 ICCAD 2015 基准上，PPA 指标更优，采样效率提升10-50倍，零重叠。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速生成高质量、无重叠的芯片布局，提升设计效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将硬约束采样与流匹配结合，确保布局无重叠。
idea_spark.risk: 硬约束可能限制解空间，影响全局最优性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 掩码引导合成数据策略可启发其他领域的数据增强方法。

en.tldr: FlowPlace proposes a flow matching method for chip placement, using mask-guided synthetic data, efficient flow-based training, and hard constraint sampling to achieve overlap-free layouts with 10-50x faster sampling.
en.motivation: Existing diffusion-based methods suffer from random synthetic pre-training data, long sampling times, and layout overlaps.
en.method: It employs mask-guided synthetic data generation, flow-based training with flexible prior injection, and hard constraint sampling.
en.result: On OpenROAD and ICCAD 2015 benchmarks, FlowPlace achieves better PPA metrics, 10-50x faster sampling, and zero overlaps.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate high-quality, overlap-free chip placements efficiently.

idea_spark.idea: Combining hard constraint sampling with flow matching ensures overlap-free layouts.
idea_spark.risk: Hard constraints may limit the solution space, potentially affecting global optimality.
idea_spark.inspiration: The mask-guided synthetic data strategy can inspire data augmentation in other domains.

papers.title: Optimal control for a fourth-order nonisothermal tumor growth model of Caginalp type
papers.summary: We study a distributed optimal control problem for a nonisothermal Caginalp-type phase-field model that describes tumour growth under thermal therapy. The PDE system couples a possibly viscous Cahn-Hilliard equation, governing the evolution of the healthy and tumor phases, with an equation for the heat balance, and a reaction-diffusion equation for the nutrient concentration. Chemotaxis and active transport effects are taken into account, and hyperthermia appears as a control variable. We introduce a suitable tracking-type cost functional and show the existence of optimal controls. Then, we analyse the differentiability of the control-to-state operator and establish necessary first-order conditions expressed through a variational inequality involving the adjoint state variables.

ai.tldr: 研究了一个用于描述热疗下肿瘤生长的非等温Caginalp型相场模型的最优控制问题。
ai.motivation: 为热疗中的肿瘤生长控制提供数学理论基础。
ai.method: 通过耦合粘性Cahn-Hilliard方程、热平衡方程和营养物反应扩散方程建立模型，引入跟踪型代价泛函，证明最优控制存在性，并推导一阶必要条件。
ai.result: 证明了最优控制的存在性，并建立了基于伴随状态变分不等式的一阶必要条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解热疗中肿瘤生长控制的数学建模与优化方法。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将控制变量扩展为时空分布的热源，并引入鲁棒优化处理参数不确定性。

en.tldr: Studies an optimal control problem for a nonisothermal Caginalp-type phase-field model describing tumor growth under thermal therapy.
en.motivation: To provide a mathematical foundation for controlling tumor growth during hyperthermia treatment.
en.method: Couples a viscous Cahn-Hilliard equation, heat balance equation, and reaction-diffusion equation for nutrients; introduces a tracking-type cost functional; proves existence of optimal controls and derives first-order necessary conditions.
en.result: Existence of optimal controls is proved, and first-order necessary conditions are established via a variational inequality involving adjoint states.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand mathematical modeling and optimization for tumor growth control in thermal therapy.

idea_spark.idea: Consider extending the control variable to spatiotemporal heat sources and incorporating robust optimization for parameter uncertainty.
idea_spark.risk: High model complexity may lead to computational challenges in numerical implementation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine machine learning surrogate models to accelerate optimal control solution.

papers.title: Gradual eigenvector ergodization in coupled Ginibre matrices
papers.summary: Non-Hermitian random matrices provide a useful framework for understanding universal characteristics of dissipative quantum chaotic systems with loss or gain. We consider a model of two such system represented by two independent $N\times N$ complex Ginibre matrices interacting via a deterministic matrix $c{\bf 1}_N$, where $c$ is the complex coupling parameter whose magnitude $|c|$ controls the interaction strength. We characterize quantitatively how the eigenvectors of the whole system, initially localized in one of the individual subsystems for $|c|=0$, eventually spread over the full system with growing interaction strength. The resulting asymptotic formula describing such spread in the limit $N\to \infty$ is very explicit and provides a full picture of the gradual ergodization of eigenvectors as a function of the coupling parameter $|c|$ in the whole transition regime. As a by-product of our method we also compute the mean eigenvalue density for our model at the origin of the spectral bulk $z=0$ in the fully ergodic regime, when the coupling is scaled with the matrix size as $c=\sqrt{N}\tilde{c}$. We find that as $N\to \infty$ the limiting density at the origin vanishes beyond the critical value $|\tilde{c}|=1$, signalling of a split of the density support in the complex plane into two disjoint domains.

ai.tldr: 通过两个耦合的Ginibre矩阵模型，定量描述了非厄米随机矩阵特征向量随耦合强度从局域化到遍历化的渐变过程，并发现谱密度支撑在强耦合下分裂为两个不相交区域。
ai.motivation: 理解耗散量子混沌系统中特征向量从局域到遍历的过渡机制，以及非厄米随机矩阵的普适性质。
ai.method: 考虑两个独立Ginibre矩阵通过确定性耦合矩阵c1_N相互作用，在N→∞极限下推导特征向量扩展的渐近公式，并计算原点处的平均特征值密度。
ai.result: 特征向量随耦合强度|c|从完全局域逐渐遍历化，得到完整的过渡图像；当耦合按c=√N c̃缩放时，原点密度在|c̃|=1处消失，表明谱支撑分裂。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了非厄米随机矩阵特征向量遍历化的精确解析描述，有助于理解开放量子系统的混沌行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用特征向量扩展的显式公式，可设计实验或数值模拟验证谱支撑分裂的临界行为。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设耦合为标量矩阵，实际物理系统可能具有更复杂的耦合结构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 谱密度支撑分裂现象可能对应物理系统中的相变，值得进一步探索其动力学含义。

en.tldr: Using a model of two coupled Ginibre matrices, we quantitatively describe the gradual ergodization of eigenvectors from localization to delocalization as coupling strength increases, and find a split of the spectral density support into two disjoint domains at strong coupling.
en.motivation: To understand the transition from localized to ergodic eigenvectors in dissipative quantum chaotic systems and universal properties of non-Hermitian random matrices.
en.method: We consider two independent Ginibre matrices coupled by a deterministic matrix c1_N, derive asymptotic formulas for eigenvector spread in the N→∞ limit, and compute the mean eigenvalue density at the origin.
en.result: Eigenvectors gradually ergodize with increasing |c|, yielding a complete transition picture; when coupling is scaled as c=√N c̃, the density at the origin vanishes at |c̃|=1, signaling a split of the spectral support.
en.help_to_user: Provides an exact analytical description of eigenvector ergodization in non-Hermitian random matrices, aiding understanding of chaotic behavior in open quantum systems.

idea_spark.idea: The explicit formula for eigenvector spread can be used to design experiments or simulations to verify the critical behavior of spectral support splitting.
idea_spark.risk: The model assumes scalar coupling, while real physical systems may have more complex coupling structures.
idea_spark.inspiration: The spectral support splitting may correspond to a phase transition in physical systems, warranting further exploration of its dynamical implications.

papers.title: MIMIC: A Generative Multimodal Foundation Model for Biomolecules
papers.summary: Biological function emerges from coupled constraints across sequence, structure, regulation, evolution, and cellular context, yet most foundation models in biology are trained within one modality or for a fixed forward task. We present MIMIC, a generative multimodal foundation model trained on our newly curated and aligned dataset, LORE, linking nucleic acid, protein, evolutionary, structural, regulatory, and semantic/contextual modalities within partially observed biomolecular states. MIMIC uses a split-track encoder-decoder architecture to condition on arbitrary subsets of observed modalities and reconstruct or generate missing components of molecular state across the genome, transcriptome, and proteome. Multimodal conditioning consistently improves MIMIC's sequence reconstruction relative to sequence-only inputs, while its learned representations enable state-of-the-art performance on RNA and protein downstream tasks. MIMIC achieves state-of-the-art splicing prediction, and its joint generative formulation enables isoform-aware inference that further improves performance. Beyond prediction, the same generative framework supports constrained design. For RNA, MIMIC identifies corrective edits in a clinically relevant HBB splice-disrupting mutation without reverting it by using evolutionary and structural signals. For proteins, jointly conditioning on shape and surface chemistry of PD-L1 and hACE2 binding sites produces diverse, high-confidence sequences with strong in silico support for target binding. Finally, MIMIC uses experimental context as semantic conditioning to model assay-dependent RNA chemical probing, rather than treating context as a fixed output. Together, these results position MIMIC's aligned multimodal generative modeling as a strong foundation for unifying representation learning, conditional prediction, and constrained biomolecular design within a single model.

ai.tldr: 提出MIMIC，一个生成式多模态基础模型，在自建对齐数据集LORE上训练，统一核酸、蛋白质、进化、结构、调控和语义模态，支持条件预测与约束设计。
ai.motivation: 生物功能源于序列、结构、调控、进化和细胞环境等多模态约束的耦合，但现有基础模型大多局限于单一模态或固定前向任务。
ai.method: 采用分裂轨道编码器-解码器架构，在部分观测的生物分子状态下，以任意观测模态子集为条件，重建或生成缺失的分子状态组件。
ai.result: 多模态条件一致提升序列重建质量；在RNA和蛋白质下游任务上达到最优；实现最优剪接预测；在HBB突变修复、PD-L1和hACE2结合位点设计中展示约束设计能力；利用实验上下文作为语义条件建模RNA化学探测。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解多模态生成模型如何统一生物分子表示学习、条件预测和约束设计，并提供具体应用案例。

idea_spark.idea: 将实验上下文（如细胞类型、处理条件）作为语义条件，使模型能泛化到未见过的实验设置，实现上下文感知的生物分子预测。
idea_spark.risk: 多模态数据对齐和缺失模态处理可能引入偏差；生成序列的生物活性验证成本高；模型复杂度高，可解释性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物系统多模态耦合本质启发，将不同生物信息层次（序列、结构、调控、进化）统一建模，类似多模态学习在计算机视觉和自然语言处理中的成功应用。

en.tldr: MIMIC is a generative multimodal foundation model trained on the aligned LORE dataset, unifying nucleic acid, protein, evolutionary, structural, regulatory, and semantic modalities for conditional prediction and constrained design.
en.motivation: Biological function emerges from coupled constraints across sequence, structure, regulation, evolution, and cellular context, yet most foundation models are trained within one modality or for a fixed forward task.
en.method: A split-track encoder-decoder architecture conditions on arbitrary subsets of observed modalities to reconstruct or generate missing components of molecular state across genome, transcriptome, and proteome.
en.result: Multimodal conditioning consistently improves sequence reconstruction; achieves state-of-the-art on RNA and protein downstream tasks, including splicing prediction; demonstrates constrained design for HBB splice-disrupting mutation repair and PD-L1/hACE2 binding site design; models assay-dependent RNA chemical probing using experimental context as semantic conditioning.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how a multimodal generative model unifies representation learning, conditional prediction, and constrained biomolecular design, with concrete application examples.

idea_spark.idea: Use experimental context (e.g., cell type, treatment condition) as semantic conditioning to enable generalization to unseen experimental settings, achieving context-aware biomolecular prediction.
idea_spark.risk: Multimodal data alignment and handling of missing modalities may introduce biases; generated sequences require costly biological validation; model complexity limits interpretability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the multimodal coupling in biological systems, unifying different information layers (sequence, structure, regulation, evolution) akin to successful multimodal learning in computer vision and natural language processing.

papers.title: h-MINT: Modeling Pocket-Ligand Binding with Hierarchical Molecular Interaction Network
papers.summary: Accurate molecular representations are critical for drug discovery, and a central challenge lies in capturing the chemical environment of molecular fragments, as key interactions, such as H-bond and π stacking, occur only under specific local conditions. Most existing approaches represent molecules as atom-level graphs; however, atom-level representations can hardly express higher-order chemical context (e.g., stereochemistry, lone pairs, conjugation). Fragment-based methods (e.g., principal subgraph, predefined functional groups) fail to preserve essential information such as chirality, aromaticity, and ionic states. This work addresses these limitations from two aspects. (i) OverlapBPE tokenization. We propose a novel data-driven molecule tokenization method. Unlike existing approaches, our method allows overlapping fragments, reflecting the inherently fuzzy boundaries of small-molecule substructures and, together with enriched chemical information at the token level, thereby preserving a more complete chemical context. (ii) h-MINT model. OverlapBPE induces many-to-many atom-fragment mappings, which necessitate a new hierarchical architecture. We therefore develop a hierarchical molecular interaction network capable of jointly modeling interactions at both atom and fragment levels. By supporting fragment overlaps, the model naturally accommodates the many-to-many atom-fragment mappings introduced by the OverlapBPE scheme. Extensive evaluation against state-of-the-art methods shows our method improves binding affinity prediction by 2-4% Pearson/Spearman correlation on PDBBind and LBA, enhances virtual screening by 1-3% in key metrics on DUD-E and LIT-PCBA, and achieves the best overall HTS performance on PubChem assays. Further analysis demonstrates that our method effectively captures interactive information while maintaining good generalization.

ai.tldr: 提出一种层次化分子交互网络h-MINT，结合重叠子词分词OverlapBPE，在原子和片段级别联合建模，提升药物结合亲和力预测与虚拟筛选性能。
ai.motivation: 现有原子级图表示难以捕捉高阶化学环境（如立体化学、孤对电子），片段方法又丢失手性、芳香性等关键信息，导致结合预测不准确。
ai.method: 设计OverlapBPE数据驱动分词，允许片段重叠以保留完整化学上下文；构建h-MINT层次网络，同时建模原子和片段级别的多对多交互。
ai.result: 在PDBBind和LBA上亲和力预测Pearson/Spearman相关系数提升2-4%；在DUD-E和LIT-PCBA上虚拟筛选关键指标提升1-3%；在PubChem高通量筛选中取得最佳整体性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种更精确的分子表示方法，可用于药物设计中的结合亲和力预测和虚拟筛选。

idea_spark.idea: 将OverlapBPE与图Transformer结合，或引入3D结构信息以进一步提升结合模式建模。
idea_spark.risk: 重叠分词可能增加计算复杂度，且对超参数敏感；层次网络训练需要更多数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴自然语言处理中的BPE分词，将其创新性地应用于分子子结构表示，启发跨领域方法迁移。

en.tldr: Proposes h-MINT, a hierarchical molecular interaction network with OverlapBPE tokenization, jointly modeling atom- and fragment-level interactions to improve binding affinity prediction and virtual screening.
en.motivation: Existing atom-level graphs fail to capture higher-order chemical context (e.g., stereochemistry, lone pairs), while fragment methods lose chirality, aromaticity, and ionic states, leading to inaccurate binding predictions.
en.method: Designs OverlapBPE, a data-driven tokenization allowing overlapping fragments to preserve complete chemical context; builds h-MINT, a hierarchical network modeling many-to-many atom-fragment interactions.
en.result: Improves binding affinity prediction by 2-4% Pearson/Spearman correlation on PDBBind and LBA; enhances virtual screening by 1-3% key metrics on DUD-E and LIT-PCBA; achieves best overall HTS performance on PubChem assays.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more accurate molecular representation for binding affinity prediction and virtual screening in drug discovery.

idea_spark.idea: Combine OverlapBPE with graph Transformers or incorporate 3D structural information to further improve binding mode modeling.
idea_spark.risk: Overlap tokenization may increase computational complexity and is sensitive to hyperparameters; hierarchical networks require more training data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrows BPE tokenization from NLP and innovatively applies it to molecular substructure representation, inspiring cross-domain method transfer.

papers.title: Exact, Efficient, and Reliable Multi-Objective and Multi-Constrained IoT Workflow Scheduling in Edge-Hub-Cloud Cyber-Physical Systems
papers.summary: Emerging IoT-enabled cyber-physical applications demand low-latency, energy-efficient, and reliable execution across resource-constrained edge devices with heterogeneous multicore processors and diverse sensing and actuating capabilities, in collaboration with a hub device and a cloud server. These workflow-based applications comprise interdependent tasks that must be executed under stringent deadline, reliability, capability, memory, storage, and energy constraints. Given their critical nature, exact optimization is necessary to obtain optimal schedules that ensure dependable operation. Existing scheduling approaches, both exact and heuristic, fail to jointly address all these objectives and constraints. To this end, we propose an exact multi-objective and multi-constrained workflow scheduling approach for edge-hub-cloud cyber-physical systems, based on continuous-time mixed integer linear programming. The proposed formulation jointly optimizes latency, energy, and reliability, while holistically addressing timing and resource constraints. To enhance reliability while avoiding the overhead of unnecessary task replicas, it selectively employs task duplication. We evaluate our approach against a widely used heuristic, which we extend to ensure a fair and meaningful comparison, using a real-world IoT workflow and synthetic task graphs of varying sizes, across different system configurations and objective trade-offs. The proposed method consistently outperforms the heuristic, achieving up to 29.83%, 33.96%, and 28.49% average improvements in latency, energy, and reliability, respectively, while attaining practical runtimes. Overall, the experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach under various system configurations and objective trade-offs, and show its practical scalability to task graphs of sizes relevant to the targeted applications and system architecture.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于连续时间混合整数线性规划的精确多目标多约束工作流调度方法，用于边缘-枢纽-云物联网系统，同时优化延迟、能耗和可靠性，并选择性使用任务复制。
ai.motivation: 现有调度方法无法同时满足物联网工作流在截止时间、可靠性、能力、内存、存储和能量等多重约束下的精确优化需求。
ai.method: 采用连续时间混合整数线性规划建模，联合优化延迟、能量和可靠性，通过选择性任务复制提升可靠性而不引入过多副本开销。
ai.result: 在真实物联网工作流和合成任务图上，相比扩展的启发式方法，延迟、能量和可靠性分别平均提升29.83%、33.96%和28.49%，且运行时间实用。
ai.help_to_user: 为物联网关键应用提供一种可证明最优的调度方案，帮助用户在设计边缘-云协同系统时平衡延迟、能耗和可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将选择性任务复制与连续时间建模结合，在保证可靠性的同时避免冗余，可启发更高效的容错调度设计。
idea_spark.risk: 连续时间MILP在大规模任务图上可能面临求解时间增长，需评估实际部署中的可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“精确优化”而非“近似”角度解决多目标调度，提示在关键系统中应优先考虑可证明最优性。

zh.method: 采用连续时间混合整数线性规划建模，联合优化延迟、能量和可靠性，通过选择性任务复制提升可靠性而不引入过多副本开销。
zh.result: 在真实物联网工作流和合成任务图上，相比扩展的启发式方法，延迟、能量和可靠性分别平均提升29.83%、33.96%和28.49%，且运行时间实用。
zh.help_to_user: 为物联网关键应用提供一种可证明最优的调度方案，帮助用户在设计边缘-云协同系统时平衡延迟、能耗和可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将选择性任务复制与连续时间建模结合，在保证可靠性的同时避免冗余，可启发更高效的容错调度设计。
idea_spark.risk: 连续时间MILP在大规模任务图上可能面临求解时间增长，需评估实际部署中的可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“精确优化”而非“近似”角度解决多目标调度，提示在关键系统中应优先考虑可证明最优性。

en.tldr: Proposes an exact multi-objective and multi-constrained workflow scheduling approach for edge-hub-cloud IoT systems using continuous-time mixed integer linear programming, jointly optimizing latency, energy, and reliability with selective task duplication.
en.motivation: Existing scheduling methods fail to simultaneously address all stringent constraints (deadline, reliability, capability, memory, storage, energy) required for exact optimization in critical IoT workflows.
en.method: Formulates the problem as a continuous-time mixed integer linear program that jointly optimizes latency, energy, and reliability, and selectively employs task duplication to enhance reliability without unnecessary overhead.
en.result: Outperforms an extended heuristic on real-world IoT workflows and synthetic task graphs, achieving average improvements of 29.83% in latency, 33.96% in energy, and 28.49% in reliability, with practical runtimes.
en.help_to_user: Provides a provably optimal scheduling solution for critical IoT applications, helping users balance latency, energy, and reliability when designing edge-cloud collaborative systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combining selective task duplication with continuous-time modeling ensures reliability without redundancy, inspiring more efficient fault-tolerant scheduling designs.
idea_spark.risk: Continuous-time MILP may face scalability issues on large task graphs; practical deployment requires evaluating solver runtime.
idea_spark.inspiration: Adopting 'exact optimization' over approximation for multi-objective scheduling suggests prioritizing provable optimality in critical systems.

papers.title: Imaging Exploration of Molecular Subtypes in Tongue Squamous Cell Carcinoma
papers.summary: Tongue squamous cell carcinoma (TSCC) is an aggressive malignancy with marked biological heterogeneity and variable clinical outcomes. Although molecular profiling has improved understanding of TSCC heterogeneity, its clinical use remains constrained by invasive tissue sampling and limited representation of whole-tumor spatial complexity. Meanwhile, most radiomics studies in TSCC have focused on downstream clinical endpoints, and whether imaging can non-invasively reflect intrinsic molecular subtypes remains unclear. In this study, an integrated transcriptomic-radiomics framework was used to investigate the relationship between preoperative imaging phenotypes and molecular subtypes in TSCC. Transcriptomic data from 60 TSCC cases in The Cancer Genome Atlas were analyzed using unsupervised consensus clustering, followed by differential expression and functional enrichment analyses. Matched preoperative imaging data from The Cancer Imaging Archive were manually annotated for primary tumor regions, and radiomic features were extracted using PyRadiomics; group differences were assessed with the U-test. Two stable molecular subtypes, C1 and C2, were identified. Their biological differences were mainly associated with squamous epithelial differentiation, inflammatory signaling, and lipid metabolism, with C2 showing greater enrichment of immune-related pathways. In addition, 10 radiomic features differed significantly between the two subtypes, mainly wavelet-derived texture features from gray-level size zone, dependence, co-occurrence, and run length matrices (P=0.00202-0.0162). These findings support the potential of radiomics as a non-invasive approach for characterizing molecular heterogeneity in TSCC and provide an initial radiogenomic framework for biologically informed preoperative assessment.

ai.tldr: 本研究通过整合转录组与影像组学，在舌鳞状细胞癌中识别出两种分子亚型，并发现10个影像组学特征在亚型间存在显著差异，支持影像组学作为非侵入性分子分型工具的潜力。
ai.motivation: 舌鳞状细胞癌具有高度异质性，传统分子分型依赖有创组织取样且难以反映肿瘤整体空间复杂性，而现有影像组学研究多关注临床终点，缺乏与内在分子亚型的关联探索。
ai.method: 利用TCGA中60例舌鳞状细胞癌的转录组数据进行无监督共识聚类，结合差异表达和功能富集分析；从TCIA匹配术前影像中手动勾画肿瘤区域，用PyRadiomics提取影像组学特征，通过U检验评估亚型间差异。
ai.result: 鉴定出C1和C2两种稳定分子亚型，生物学差异涉及鳞状上皮分化、炎症信号和脂质代谢，C2免疫相关通路富集更显著；10个以小波纹理特征为主的影像组学特征在亚型间差异显著（P=0.00202-0.0162）。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种非侵入性评估舌鳞状细胞癌分子异质性的影像组学框架，有助于术前生物学分型指导个体化治疗决策。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多模态影像（如PET/CT、MRI）与深度学习特征，进一步提升分子亚型预测的准确性和空间分辨率。
idea_spark.risk: 样本量较小（60例），影像特征与分子亚型的因果关系尚未验证，需更大规模独立队列验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 影像组学特征（尤其是小波纹理）可能反映肿瘤微环境中的免疫和代谢异质性，启发开发影像生物标志物指导免疫治疗。

en.tldr: This study integrated transcriptomic and radiomic data to identify two molecular subtypes in tongue squamous cell carcinoma, and found 10 radiomic features significantly differing between subtypes, supporting radiomics as a non-invasive tool for molecular subtyping.
en.motivation: Tongue squamous cell carcinoma exhibits high heterogeneity; conventional molecular subtyping relies on invasive tissue sampling and fails to capture whole-tumor spatial complexity, while existing radiomics studies focus on clinical endpoints without linking to intrinsic molecular subtypes.
en.method: Unsupervised consensus clustering was applied to transcriptomic data from 60 TSCC cases in TCGA, followed by differential expression and functional enrichment analyses. Matched preoperative imaging from TCIA was manually annotated for primary tumors, radiomic features were extracted using PyRadiomics, and group differences were assessed via U-test.
en.result: Two stable molecular subtypes (C1 and C2) were identified, with biological differences in squamous epithelial differentiation, inflammatory signaling, and lipid metabolism; C2 showed greater enrichment of immune-related pathways. Ten radiomic features, mainly wavelet-derived texture features, differed significantly between subtypes (P=0.00202-0.0162).
en.help_to_user: Provides a non-invasive radiomics framework for assessing molecular heterogeneity in TSCC, potentially enabling preoperative biological subtyping to guide personalized treatment.

idea_spark.idea: Combine multimodal imaging (e.g., PET/CT, MRI) with deep learning features to improve accuracy and spatial resolution of molecular subtype prediction.
idea_spark.risk: Small sample size (60 cases) and lack of causal validation between imaging features and molecular subtypes; larger independent cohorts are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Radiomic features, especially wavelet textures, may reflect immune and metabolic heterogeneity in the tumor microenvironment, inspiring imaging biomarkers for immunotherapy guidance.

papers.title: Integrative neurocybernetic modeling in the era of large-scale neuroscience
papers.summary: Large-scale neuroscience is generating rich datasets across animals, brain areas and behavioral contexts, yet our modeling efforts remains fragmented across isolated experiments. We argue that understanding behavior requires integrative neurocybernetic models: understandable dynamical models that capture the closed-loop coupling of brain, body and environment, treat the brain as a controller pursuing latent objectives, represent structured variation across scales, and scale to heterogeneous datasets. Such models shift the goal from predicting neural recordings in isolation to inferring the organizing principles that govern neural and behavioral dynamics. We outline a practical route toward this goal by combining nonlinear state-space models and meta-dynamical extensions with scalable inference, knowledge distillation, mixed open- and closed-loop training, and connectomics-informed architectures. By pooling complementary constraints from recordings, behavior, perturbations and anatomy, integrative neurocybernetic models can provide statistical amplification, few-shot generalization, and mechanistic insight into shared dynamical structure, individual variation, and the control objectives that govern behavior. This agenda offers a model-centric path from fragmented data to a mechanistic science of how brains produce behavior.

ai.tldr: 提出整合神经控制论模型，以理解大脑、身体和环境的闭环耦合，从碎片化数据中推断行为控制原理。
ai.motivation: 大规模神经科学产生丰富数据，但现有建模分散于孤立实验，缺乏统一框架。
ai.method: 结合非线性状态空间模型、元动力学扩展、可扩展推理、知识蒸馏、混合开闭环训练和连接组学架构。
ai.result: 模型能实现统计放大、少样本泛化，并揭示共享动态结构、个体差异及控制目标。
ai.help_to_user: 提供从碎片数据到行为机制理解的模型驱动路径。

idea_spark.idea: 利用连接组学约束和混合训练，构建可解释的闭环动态模型。
idea_spark.risk: 模型复杂度高，可能面临可扩展性和可解释性之间的权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将大脑视为追求潜在目标的控制器，启发新的人机交互和自适应系统设计。

en.tldr: Proposes integrative neurocybernetic models to understand the closed-loop coupling of brain, body, and environment, inferring organizing principles of behavior from fragmented data.
en.motivation: Large-scale neuroscience generates rich datasets but modeling remains fragmented across isolated experiments, lacking a unified framework.
en.method: Combines nonlinear state-space models, meta-dynamical extensions, scalable inference, knowledge distillation, mixed open- and closed-loop training, and connectomics-informed architectures.
en.result: Models achieve statistical amplification, few-shot generalization, and reveal shared dynamical structure, individual variation, and control objectives.
en.help_to_user: Provides a model-centric path from fragmented data to mechanistic understanding of behavior.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage connectomics constraints and mixed training to build interpretable closed-loop dynamical models.
idea_spark.risk: High model complexity may pose trade-offs between scalability and interpretability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating the brain as a controller pursuing latent objectives inspires new designs for human-machine interaction and adaptive systems.

papers.title: Chemotaxis compressible Navier-Stokes equations with density-dependent viscosity modeling vascular network formation
papers.summary: The existence of global weak solutions to the compressible Navier-Stokes equations for the density of endothelial cells and their velocity, coupled to a reaction-diffusion equation for the concentration of the chemoattractant, is established in a three-dimensional torus for energy-finite initial data. The coupling of the equations arises through the chemotaxis force, which contributes to the momentum balance equation, and the signal production due to the cells in the chemotaxis equation. The equations model the self-assembly of endothelial cells during the early stages of blood vessel formation. The existence result holds for adiabatic pressure exponents $γ>4/3$, matching the exponent found in the existence analysis for the degenerate Keller-Segel equations. The proof leverages an approximation via Korteweg and drag terms, the BD entropy inequality, and a construction of weak solutions that are renormalized in the velocity variable.

ai.tldr: 在三维环面上，针对内皮细胞密度和速度的压缩Navier-Stokes方程与趋化物质浓度反应扩散方程的耦合系统，证明了全局弱解的存在性，其中压力指数γ>4/3。
ai.motivation: 模拟血管形成早期内皮细胞的自组装过程，为生物医学中的血管网络形成提供数学理论基础。
ai.method: 利用Korteweg和阻力项进行近似，结合BD熵不等式，构造速度变量重整化的弱解。
ai.result: 对于能量有限初始数据，建立了全局弱解的存在性，压力指数与退化Keller-Segel方程的存在性分析相匹配。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解趋化性驱动的血管形成数学模型，以及弱解存在性的分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将密度依赖黏性引入趋化Navier-Stokes系统，通过BD熵不等式克服非线性耦合带来的分析困难。
idea_spark.risk: 三维情形下全局弱解的正则性和唯一性尚未解决，可能限制模型的实际应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴Keller-Segel方程的存在性分析技术，为更复杂的生物流体模型提供理论框架。

zh.tldr: 在三维环面上，针对内皮细胞密度和速度的压缩Navier-Stokes方程与趋化物质浓度反应扩散方程的耦合系统，证明了全局弱解的存在性，其中压力指数γ>4/3。

en.tldr: Global weak solutions are established for the compressible Navier-Stokes equations coupled with a chemotaxis reaction-diffusion system on a 3D torus, with adiabatic exponent γ>4/3, modeling early vascular network formation.
en.motivation: To provide a rigorous mathematical foundation for the self-assembly of endothelial cells during blood vessel formation.
en.method: Approximation via Korteweg and drag terms, BD entropy inequality, and construction of renormalized weak solutions in the velocity variable.
en.result: Existence of global weak solutions for energy-finite initial data, with the pressure exponent matching that of degenerate Keller-Segel equations.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the mathematical analysis of chemotaxis-fluid models for biological pattern formation.

idea_spark.idea: Introduce density-dependent viscosity into chemotaxis-Navier-Stokes systems and use BD entropy to handle nonlinear coupling.
idea_spark.risk: Global weak solutions lack regularity and uniqueness in 3D, limiting practical applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage existence techniques from Keller-Segel equations to tackle complex bio-fluid models.

papers.title: Large-Scale Regularity for the Periodic Kinetic Fokker-Planck equation
papers.summary: We first prove a homogenization result for the fundamental solution of the linear kinetic Fokker Planck equation. We show that this solution converges, in an averaged $L^2$ sense, to the fundamental solution of an effective heat equation with constant effective diffusivity determined by corrector functions solving associated cell problems on the torus. A key feature of the proof is the necessity of second-order correctors to control the averaging of the velocity variable, and the handling of a non-divergence form error term arising from limited spatial regularity of solutions.   Additionally, building on this homogenization result, we establish a large-scale regularity result for solutions of this Fokker Planck equation. More specifically, we show that solutions by heterogeneous polynomials, analogous to Taylor polynomials, with an explicit error on large scale domains. Furthermore, we show that in a larger regime, this approximating polynomial solves this Fokker Planck equation.

ai.tldr: 证明了周期动力学Fokker-Planck方程基本解的均匀化结果，并建立了大尺度正则性。
ai.motivation: 理解周期介质中动力学Fokker-Planck方程解的长时间行为和大尺度结构。
ai.method: 通过二阶校正子处理速度平均，并控制非散度形式的误差项。
ai.result: 基本解在平均L²意义下收敛到有效热方程的基本解；解可由异质多项式近似，误差在大尺度域上显式。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了周期Fokker-Planck方程均匀化和大尺度正则性的严格数学框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用异质多项式近似解，可能用于多尺度模拟中的数值格式设计。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于周期结构，非周期或随机介质中可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将均匀化与正则性理论结合，启发对复杂系统多尺度行为的分析。

en.tldr: Proves homogenization for the fundamental solution of the periodic kinetic Fokker-Planck equation and establishes large-scale regularity.
en.motivation: To understand the long-time behavior and large-scale structure of solutions to the kinetic Fokker-Planck equation in periodic media.
en.method: Uses second-order correctors to handle velocity averaging and controls a non-divergence form error term.
en.result: The fundamental solution converges in an averaged L² sense to that of an effective heat equation; solutions are approximated by heterogeneous polynomials with explicit error on large-scale domains.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for homogenization and large-scale regularity of periodic Fokker-Planck equations.

idea_spark.idea: Using heterogeneous polynomial approximations may inspire numerical schemes for multiscale simulations.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical results rely on periodicity and may not hold in non-periodic or random media.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining homogenization with regularity theory inspires analysis of multiscale behavior in complex systems.

papers.title: An Intelligent Fault Diagnosis Method for General Aviation Aircraft Based on Multi-Fidelity Digital Twin and FMEA Knowledge Enhancement
papers.summary: Fault diagnosis of general aviation aircraft faces challenges including scarce real fault data, diverse fault types, and weak fault signatures. This paper proposes an intelligent fault diagnosis framework based on multi-fidelity digital twin, integrating four modules: high-fidelity flight dynamics simulation, FMEA-driven fault injection, multi-fidelity residual feature extraction, and large language model (LLM)-enhanced interpretable report generation. A digital twin is constructed using the JSBSim six-degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) flight dynamics engine, generating 23-channel engine health monitoring data via semi-empirical sensor synthesis equations. A three-layer fault injection engine based on failure mode and effects analysis (FMEA) models the physical causal propagation of 19 engine fault types. A multi-fidelity residual computation framework comprising paired-mirror residuals and GRU surrogate prediction residuals is proposed: the high-fidelity path obtains clean fault deviation signals using nominal mirror trajectories with identical initial conditions, while the low-fidelity path achieves online real-time residual computation through a multi-step prediction GRU surrogate model. A 1D-CNN classifier performs end-to-end diagnosis of 20 fault classes. An LLM diagnostic report engine enhanced with FMEA knowledge fuses classification results, residual evidence, and domain causal knowledge to generate interpretable natural language reports. Experiments show the paired-mirror residual scheme achieves a Macro-F1 of 96.2% on the 20-class task, while the GRU surrogate scheme achieves 4.3x inference acceleration at only 0.6% performance cost. Comparison across 24 schemes reveals that residual feature quality contributes approximately 5x more to diagnostic performance than classifier architecture, establishing the "residual quality first" design principle.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于多保真数字孪生和FMEA知识增强的通用航空飞机智能故障诊断方法，通过高保真飞行仿真、故障注入、残差提取和LLM报告生成四个模块，实现高精度可解释诊断。
ai.motivation: 通用航空飞机故障诊断面临真实故障数据稀缺、故障类型多样、故障特征微弱等挑战。
ai.method: 构建基于JSBSim六自由度飞行动力学引擎的数字孪生，生成23通道发动机健康监测数据；设计基于FMEA的三层故障注入引擎模拟19种发动机故障的物理因果传播；提出包含配对镜像残差和GRU代理预测残差的多保真残差计算框架；使用1D-CNN分类器进行20类故障诊断；利用FMEA知识增强的LLM诊断报告引擎生成可解释自然语言报告。
ai.result: 配对镜像残差方案在20类任务上达到96.2%的Macro-F1；GRU代理方案实现4.3倍推理加速，性能仅下降0.6%；残差特征质量对诊断性能的贡献约为分类器架构的5倍。
ai.help_to_user: 为通用航空飞机提供高精度、可解释的智能故障诊断方案，帮助维护人员快速定位故障原因。

idea_spark.idea: 将配对镜像残差思想应用于其他领域（如结构健康监测）的异常检测，利用标称轨迹对比提取纯净偏差信号。
idea_spark.risk: 数字孪生模型保真度不足或FMEA知识不完整可能影响诊断准确性；LLM生成报告的可信度需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 残差质量优先的设计原则启发：在故障诊断中应优先优化特征提取而非分类器架构。

zh.tldr: 提出一种基于多保真数字孪生和FMEA知识增强的通用航空飞机智能故障诊断方法，通过高保真飞行仿真、故障注入、残差提取和LLM报告生成四个模块，实现高精度可解释诊断。

en.tldr: Proposes an intelligent fault diagnosis method for general aviation aircraft based on multi-fidelity digital twin and FMEA knowledge enhancement, integrating high-fidelity flight simulation, fault injection, residual extraction, and LLM-based interpretable report generation.
en.motivation: Fault diagnosis of general aviation aircraft faces challenges including scarce real fault data, diverse fault types, and weak fault signatures.
en.method: Constructs a digital twin using JSBSim 6-DoF flight dynamics engine to generate 23-channel engine health monitoring data; designs a three-layer FMEA-based fault injection engine to model physical causal propagation of 19 engine fault types; proposes a multi-fidelity residual computation framework with paired-mirror residuals and GRU surrogate prediction residuals; uses a 1D-CNN classifier for 20-class fault diagnosis; employs an LLM diagnostic report engine enhanced with FMEA knowledge to generate interpretable natural language reports.
en.result: Paired-mirror residual scheme achieves 96.2% Macro-F1 on 20-class task; GRU surrogate scheme achieves 4.3x inference acceleration at only 0.6% performance cost; residual feature quality contributes approximately 5x more to diagnostic performance than classifier architecture.
en.help_to_user: Provides high-accuracy, interpretable intelligent fault diagnosis for general aviation aircraft, assisting maintenance personnel in quickly identifying fault causes.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the paired-mirror residual concept to anomaly detection in other domains (e.g., structural health monitoring) by using nominal trajectory comparison to extract clean deviation signals.
idea_spark.risk: Insufficient fidelity of the digital twin or incomplete FMEA knowledge may affect diagnostic accuracy; trustworthiness of LLM-generated reports needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The 'residual quality first' design principle inspires that in fault diagnosis, feature extraction should be prioritized over classifier architecture.

papers.title: Doubly Reflected Backward SDEs Driven by $G$-Brownian Motion with Quadratic Generator
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the doubly reflected backward stochastic differential equations driven by $G$-Brownian motion ($G$-BSDEs for short) when the generator has quadratic growth in the $z$-component. Based on the theory of $G$-BMO martingale and $G$-Girsanov theorem, we establish the existence and uniqueness result when the upper obstacle is almost a generalized $G$-Itô's process. Moreover, the solution can be approximated monotonically by the solutions to a family of penalized reflected $G$-BSDEs with a lower obstacle, which plays an important role to establish the relation between doubly reflected $G$-BSDEs and fully nonlinear partial differential equations with double obstacles.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了由G-布朗运动驱动的二次生成元双反射倒向随机微分方程，建立了存在唯一性结果，并揭示了其与双障碍完全非线性偏微分方程的联系。
ai.motivation: 现有G-布朗运动框架下的反射倒向随机微分方程研究主要针对单障碍情形，双障碍情形特别是生成元具有二次增长时尚未解决。
ai.method: 利用G-BMO鞅理论和G-Girsanov定理，结合惩罚逼近方法，通过一族带下障碍的惩罚反射G-BSDE的解单调逼近原方程的解。
ai.result: 当上障碍几乎为广义G-Itô过程时，证明了双反射G-BSDE解的存在唯一性，并建立了与双障碍完全非线性偏微分方程的联系。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理金融中带上下界约束的随机控制问题提供了数学工具，并拓展了非线性期望框架下的随机分析理论。

idea_spark.idea: 将双反射G-BSDE的解与双障碍完全非线性PDE的粘性解对应，可能用于期权定价中的上下界套利分析。
idea_spark.risk: 二次增长条件可能导致解的唯一性依赖于特定的G-BMO范数假设，实际应用中需验证该假设是否满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴G-BMO鞅的稳定性，可尝试设计数值算法（如惩罚迭代）来近似计算双障碍问题。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了由G-布朗运动驱动的二次生成元双反射倒向随机微分方程，建立了存在唯一性结果，并揭示了其与双障碍完全非线性偏微分方程的联系。

en.tldr: This paper studies doubly reflected backward stochastic differential equations driven by G-Brownian motion with quadratic generator, establishes existence and uniqueness, and reveals connections to fully nonlinear PDEs with double obstacles.
en.motivation: Existing work on reflected G-BSDEs mainly deals with a single obstacle; the double-obstacle case with quadratic growth generator remains open.
en.method: Using G-BMO martingale theory and G-Girsanov theorem, combined with a penalization approach, the solution is monotonically approximated by solutions to a family of penalized reflected G-BSDEs with a lower obstacle.
en.result: Existence and uniqueness are proved when the upper obstacle is almost a generalized G-Itô process, and a link to fully nonlinear PDEs with double obstacles is established.
en.help_to_user: Provides mathematical tools for stochastic control problems with upper and lower bounds in finance, and extends stochastic analysis under nonlinear expectation.

idea_spark.idea: Mapping the solution to viscosity solutions of double-obstacle fully nonlinear PDEs may enable arbitrage analysis in option pricing with bounds.
idea_spark.risk: Quadratic growth may require specific G-BMO norm assumptions for uniqueness, which need verification in applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging stability of G-BMO martingales, one could design numerical algorithms (e.g., penalized iteration) to approximate double-obstacle problems.

papers.title: DPRM: A Plug-in Doob h transform-induced Token-Ordering Module for Diffusion Language Models
papers.summary: Diffusion language models generate without a fixed left-to-right order, making token ordering a central algorithmic choice: which tokens should be revealed, retained, revised or verified at each step? Existing systems mainly use random masking or confidence-driven ordering. Random masking creates train--test mismatch, while confidence-only rules are efficient but can be myopic and suppress useful exploration.   We introduce DPRM (Doob h-transform Process Reward Model), a plug-in token-ordering module for diffusion language models. DPRM keeps the host architecture, denoising objective and supervision unchanged, and changes only the ordering policy. It starts from confidence-driven progressive ordering and gradually shifts to Doob h transform Process Reward guided ordering through online estimates.   We characterize the exact DPRM policy as a reward-tilted Gibbs reveal law, prove O(1/N) convergence of the stagewise Soft-BoN approximation, and show that the online bucketized controller tracks the exact DPRM score at empirical-Bernstein rates. Under tractable optimization assumptions, DPRM also yields a sample-complexity advantage over random and confidence-only ordering.   DPRM improves over confidence-based baselines in pretraining, post-training, test-time scaling, and single-cell masked diffusion, with particularly strong gains on harder reasoning subsets. In protein, molecular generation and DNA design, the effect is more multi-objective: ordering-aware variants significantly improve selected structural or fragment-constrained metrics while not uniformly dominating the host baseline on every quality metric. These results identify token ordering as a fundamental control axis in diffusion language models and establish DPRM as a general-purpose module for improving it. Code is available at https://github.com/DakeBU/DPRM-DLLM.

ai.tldr: 提出DPRM模块，通过Doob h变换过程奖励模型优化扩散语言模型的令牌排序策略，在多个任务上优于随机和置信度排序基线。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散语言模型令牌排序存在训练-测试不匹配或短视问题，需要更优的排序策略。
ai.method: DPRM作为插件模块，从置信度驱动排序逐步过渡到Doob h变换过程奖励引导排序，采用在线桶控控制器逼近精确DPRM分数。
ai.result: 在预训练、后训练、测试时扩展和单细胞掩码扩散中均优于置信度基线，在蛋白质、分子和DNA生成中改善多目标指标。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过令牌排序提升扩散语言模型的生成质量和可控性。

idea_spark.idea: 将Doob h变换与过程奖励结合，实现动态令牌排序。
idea_spark.risk: 多目标场景下可能无法在所有指标上同时最优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从随机过程理论中借鉴Doob h变换，为生成模型提供新的控制轴。

zh.tldr: 提出DPRM模块，通过Doob h变换过程奖励模型优化扩散语言模型的令牌排序策略，在多个任务上优于随机和置信度排序基线。

idea_spark.risk: 多目标场景下可能无法在所有指标上同时最优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从随机过程理论中借鉴Doob h变换，为生成模型提供新的控制轴。

en.tldr: DPRM is a plug-in token-ordering module for diffusion language models that uses Doob h-transform process reward to improve ordering, outperforming random and confidence-based baselines across tasks.
en.motivation: Existing token ordering in diffusion language models suffers from train-test mismatch or myopia, requiring a better ordering policy.
en.method: DPRM starts from confidence-driven ordering and gradually shifts to Doob h-transform process reward guided ordering via online bucketized controller approximation.
en.result: Outperforms confidence-based baselines in pretraining, post-training, test-time scaling, and single-cell masked diffusion; improves multi-objective metrics in protein, molecule, and DNA generation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how token ordering can enhance generation quality and controllability in diffusion language models.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Doob h-transform with process reward for dynamic token ordering.
idea_spark.risk: May not uniformly dominate on all metrics in multi-objective settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging Doob h-transform from stochastic process theory provides a new control axis for generative models.

papers.title: From PDEs on standard domains to self-similar particle systems on fractals
papers.summary: We construct transported PDEs on self-similar fractal domains from reference equations posed on the unit interval, and derive explicit self-similar interacting particle systems that approximate the resulting dynamics. The construction combines a measure-preserving isometry between $L^2$-spaces on $[0,1]$ and on the fractal \cite{Med2026}, a nonlocal-to-local approximation of differential operators \cite{PauTre2025}, and a Galerkin discretization on the canonical self-similar partitions. This yields a two-parameter approximation scheme whose error separates a nonlocal consistency term from a Galerkin network term. We work out the transport, Burgers, and heat equations, discuss the relation with intrinsic operators on fractals, and outline extensions to local charts and to pullbacks of nonlocal equations on fractal domains. Moreover, the reverse mapping transforms a nonlocal evolution equation on a fractal domains into the evolution equation on the unit interval, where the methods of classical numerical analysis can be applied. This suggests a promising direction for the development of numerical methods for nonlocal models on fractals, including fractional heat equation, fractal scattering, and related models.

ai.tldr: 从单位区间上的参考方程出发，在自相似分形域上构造输运偏微分方程，并推导出显式的自相似相互作用粒子系统来近似动力学。
ai.motivation: 分形域上的偏微分方程缺乏通用的数值方法，本文旨在通过标准域与分形之间的等距映射，建立可计算的粒子系统近似。
ai.method: 结合L²空间等距映射、非局部到局部微分算子近似以及自相似剖分上的伽辽金离散，得到双参数逼近格式，误差分解为一致性项和网络项。
ai.result: 具体处理了输运方程、Burgers方程和热方程，并展示了反向映射可将分形上的非局部演化方程转化为单位区间上的经典问题。
ai.help_to_user: 为分形上的非局部模型（如分数阶热方程、分形散射）提供了数值方法开发的新方向。

idea_spark.idea: 利用等距映射和粒子系统，将分形上的复杂动力学简化为标准域上的经典数值分析问题。
idea_spark.risk: 映射的构造依赖于特定分形的自相似性，对一般分形可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受L²等距映射和非局部近似技术的启发，将分形问题转化为标准域问题。

zh.tldr: 从单位区间上的参考方程出发，在自相似分形域上构造输运偏微分方程，并推导出显式的自相似相互作用粒子系统来近似动力学。

idea_spark.idea: 利用等距映射和粒子系统，将分形上的复杂动力学简化为标准域上的经典数值分析问题。
idea_spark.risk: 映射的构造依赖于特定分形的自相似性，对一般分形可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受L²等距映射和非局部近似技术的启发，将分形问题转化为标准域问题。

en.tldr: We construct transported PDEs on self-similar fractal domains from reference equations on the unit interval, and derive explicit self-similar interacting particle systems that approximate the resulting dynamics.
en.motivation: PDEs on fractal domains lack general numerical methods; this work aims to build computable particle approximations via isometric mappings between standard domains and fractals.
en.method: Combining an L² isometry, a nonlocal-to-local approximation of differential operators, and a Galerkin discretization on self-similar partitions yields a two-parameter scheme with error split into consistency and network terms.
en.result: The transport, Burgers, and heat equations are worked out; the reverse mapping transforms nonlocal evolution on fractals into classical problems on the unit interval.
en.help_to_user: It suggests a promising direction for developing numerical methods for nonlocal models on fractals, such as fractional heat equations and fractal scattering.

idea_spark.idea: Use isometries and particle systems to reduce complex dynamics on fractals to classical numerical analysis on standard domains.
idea_spark.risk: The construction relies on the self-similarity of specific fractals and may not generalize to arbitrary fractals.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by L² isometries and nonlocal approximations, we transform fractal problems into standard-domain problems.

papers.title: One Size Fits None: Heuristic Collapse in LLM Investment Advice
papers.summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as advisors in high-stakes domains -- answering medical questions, interpreting legal documents, recommending financial products -- where good advice requires integrating a user's full context rather than responding to salient surface features. We investigate whether frontier LLMs actually do this, or whether they instead exhibit heuristic collapse: a systematic reduction of complex, multi-factor decisions to a small number of dominant inputs. We study the phenomenon in investment advice, where legal standards explicitly require individualized reasoning over a client's full circumstances. Applying interpretable surrogate models to LLM outputs, we find systematic heuristic collapse: investment allocation decisions are largely determined by self-reported risk tolerance, while other relevant factors contribute minimally. We further find that web search partially attenuates heuristic collapse but does not resolve it. These findings suggest that heuristic collapse is not resolved by web search augmentation or model scale alone, and that deploying LLMs as advisors requires auditing input sensitivity, not just output quality.

ai.tldr: 大型语言模型在投资建议中表现出启发式崩溃，即仅依赖风险承受能力等少数特征，忽略其他相关因素。
ai.motivation: LLM在高风险领域（如金融）被用作顾问，但可能无法真正整合用户完整背景，而是依赖表面特征。
ai.method: 使用可解释的替代模型分析LLM输出，评估其对多因素决策的敏感性。
ai.result: 发现LLM的投资分配主要由自我报告的风险承受能力决定，其他因素贡献极小；网络搜索可部分缓解但未解决该问题。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解LLM在金融建议中的局限性，避免过度依赖单一因素。

idea_spark.idea: 设计多因素输入测试集，系统评估LLM对上下文信息的敏感性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能因启发式崩溃导致个性化建议失败，引发用户信任危机。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发开发更鲁棒的LLM训练策略，强制模型学习多因素交互。

en.tldr: Large language models exhibit heuristic collapse in investment advice, relying predominantly on risk tolerance while ignoring other relevant factors.
en.motivation: LLMs are deployed as advisors in high-stakes domains but may fail to integrate full user context, instead responding to salient surface features.
en.method: Interpretable surrogate models are applied to LLM outputs to assess sensitivity to multi-factor decisions.
en.result: Investment allocations are largely determined by self-reported risk tolerance; web search partially attenuates but does not resolve heuristic collapse.
en.help_to_user: Highlights the limitations of LLMs in financial advice, cautioning against over-reliance on single factors.

idea_spark.idea: Develop multi-factor input test suites to systematically evaluate LLM sensitivity to contextual information.
idea_spark.risk: Heuristic collapse may lead to poor personalized advice, eroding user trust.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires training strategies that force LLMs to learn multi-factor interactions for robust decision-making.

papers.title: Existence of stationary solutions for some systems of integro-differential equations with Laplace and bi-Laplace operators
papers.summary: The article is devoted to the solvability of a system of integro-differential equations in the case of the difference of the standard Laplacian and the bi-Laplacian in the diffusion terms. The proof of the existence of solutions is based on a fixed point technique. We use the solvability conditions for the elliptic operators without the Fredholm property in unbounded domains.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一类带有拉普拉斯和双拉普拉斯算子的积分-微分方程组的稳态解存在性问题。
ai.motivation: 探索非弗雷德霍姆椭圆算子在无界区域中积分-微分方程组的可解性。
ai.method: 采用不动点技术，结合无界区域上非弗雷德霍姆椭圆算子的可解性条件。
ai.result: 证明了在扩散项包含拉普拉斯与双拉普拉斯算子之差时，方程组稳态解的存在性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理类似非标准椭圆算子的积分-微分方程提供理论依据和证明框架。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将方法应用于带分数阶拉普拉斯算子的积分-微分方程。
idea_spark.risk: 分数阶算子的非局部性可能破坏现有可解性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从非弗雷德霍姆算子角度重新审视经典反应扩散系统的稳态问题。
