en.tldr: This paper studies the existence of stationary solutions for a system of integro-differential equations involving the difference of the Laplacian and bi-Laplacian in the diffusion terms.
en.motivation: To explore the solvability of integro-differential systems with non-Fredholm elliptic operators in unbounded domains.
en.method: A fixed point technique is employed, combined with solvability conditions for elliptic operators without the Fredholm property in unbounded domains.
en.result: Existence of stationary solutions is proved for the system when the diffusion terms contain the difference of the Laplacian and bi-Laplacian.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and proof strategy for integro-differential equations with non-standard elliptic operators.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying the method to integro-differential equations with fractional Laplacians.
idea_spark.risk: The nonlocality of fractional operators may break the existing solvability conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisit stationary problems in classical reaction-diffusion systems from the perspective of non-Fredholm operators.

papers.title: Nonlinear balanced truncation model reduction through scalable Taylor series
papers.summary: The theory of nonlinear balanced truncation provides a system-theoretic framework for model reduction that preserves important properties such as stability, controllability, and observability. We present a scalable algorithm for computing reduced-order models based on the nonlinear balancing theory. The approach is based on polynomial approximations using the Kronecker product representation, building on recent numerical linear algebra advancements to enable scalability. We derive polynomial approximations for the balancing transformation and the explicit balanced realization of the full-order model, which yields true nonlinear reduced-order models upon truncation of redundant state components. The proposed tools are tested on various examples, demonstrating a nuanced perspective of the benefits and limitations of nonlinear balancing not shown in the existing literature.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于泰勒级数的可扩展非线性平衡截断模型降阶算法，利用Kronecker积表示实现多项式近似，并在多个算例中展示了其优势与局限。
ai.motivation: 非线性平衡截断理论虽能保持稳定性、可控性和可观性，但现有算法难以扩展到大规模系统。
ai.method: 通过Kronecker积表示进行多项式近似，推导平衡变换和显式平衡实现的解析形式，然后截断冗余状态得到非线性降阶模型。
ai.result: 在多个算例上验证了方法的有效性，揭示了非线性平衡方法在现有文献中未充分讨论的优缺点。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可扩展的非线性模型降阶工具，适用于需要保持系统结构特性的仿真与控制场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用高阶泰勒展开和Kronecker代数构造显式平衡变换，避免传统迭代求解的瓶颈。
idea_spark.risk: 多项式近似阶数选择不当可能导致精度损失或计算量激增。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将数值线性代数的最新进展（如Kronecker积快速算法）引入系统理论，实现理论方法的实用化。

en.tldr: A scalable algorithm for nonlinear balanced truncation model reduction using Taylor series and Kronecker product representation, tested on multiple examples to reveal nuanced benefits and limitations.
en.motivation: Nonlinear balanced truncation theory preserves stability, controllability, and observability, but existing algorithms are not scalable to large systems.
en.method: Polynomial approximations via Kronecker product representation are used to derive the balancing transformation and explicit balanced realization, followed by truncation of redundant states.
en.result: The method is validated on several examples, showing a nuanced perspective of the advantages and limitations of nonlinear balancing not previously reported.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable nonlinear model reduction tool suitable for simulation and control applications requiring preservation of system structure.

idea_spark.idea: Use high-order Taylor expansion and Kronecker algebra to construct explicit balancing transformations, avoiding iterative solvers.
idea_spark.risk: Improper choice of polynomial order may cause accuracy loss or computational explosion.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage recent advances in numerical linear algebra (e.g., fast Kronecker product algorithms) to make theoretical methods practical.

papers.title: Efficient primal-dual algorithm for imaging applications with matrix stacking, applied to DBT image reconstruction
papers.summary: The primal-dual hybrid gradient (PDHG) algorithm for solving convex optimization problems that arise in tomographic imaging is revisited. In particular, simplification of the selection of step-size parameters is developed for optimization problems with multiple terms, each containing a linear transform subject to splitting. This simplification maintains algorithm efficiency while avoiding massive grid searches for the optimal parameter settings. The PDHG framework is demonstrated on an image reconstruction problem for wide-angle digital breast tomosythesis (DBT); use of the proposed optimization problem is enabled by the framework and it is demonstrated to have some advantage in quantitative accuracy of the reconstructed volume and in improving DBT depth resolution.

ai.tldr: 提出一种简化的PDHG算法参数选择方法，应用于数字乳腺断层合成（DBT）图像重建，提高了定量精度和深度分辨率。
ai.motivation: 现有PDHG算法在多线性变换项优化问题中步长参数选择复杂，需大量网格搜索，效率低。
ai.method: 针对含多个线性变换项的凸优化问题，简化PDHG步长参数选择，避免网格搜索，保持算法效率。
ai.result: 在宽角DBT重建中，该方法提高了重建体积的定量精度和深度分辨率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户更高效地设置PDHG算法参数，提升DBT图像重建质量。

idea_spark.idea: 将PDHG参数选择与问题结构（如线性变换的谱范数）自动关联，实现自适应调参。
idea_spark.risk: 简化参数可能在某些非凸或病态问题中导致收敛性下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用线性变换的矩阵堆叠特性，启发设计更通用的无网格搜索优化框架。

en.tldr: A simplified step-size selection for the PDHG algorithm is proposed and applied to digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) image reconstruction, improving quantitative accuracy and depth resolution.
en.motivation: Existing PDHG algorithm requires extensive grid search for optimal step-size parameters in optimization problems with multiple linear transforms, which is inefficient.
en.method: Simplify PDHG step-size parameter selection for convex optimization with multiple linear transform terms, avoiding grid search while maintaining algorithm efficiency.
en.result: In wide-angle DBT reconstruction, the method improves quantitative accuracy of the reconstructed volume and depth resolution.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently set PDHG parameters and improve DBT image reconstruction quality.

idea_spark.idea: Automatically link PDHG parameter selection to problem structure (e.g., spectral norms of linear transforms) for adaptive tuning.
idea_spark.risk: Simplified parameters may lead to convergence issues in non-convex or ill-conditioned problems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging matrix stacking properties of linear transforms inspires the design of more general grid-search-free optimization frameworks.

papers.title: Surrogate-Based Co-Design Coupling Analysis for Floating Offshore Wind Turbines
papers.summary: This work presents a design coupling analysis (DCA) framework to investigate the interactions among control and plant design variables in floating offshore wind turbine (FOWT) and to support the formulation of tractable control co-design (CCD) optimization strategies. DCA provides quantitative information that reveals the relationships and dependencies among design variables and to objective function, enabling improved design variable selection, identification of dominant variables that drive system interactions, and informed selection of optimization solution strategies. However, applying DCA to complex systems is challenging because the models used to describe their dynamics are computationally expensive, and constructing DCA information requires exhaustive model evaluations and optimizations. Here, a surrogate model of the FOWT system is employed to make the repeated model evaluations required for DCA computationally feasible. Using this framework, the bidirectional couplings between control and plant design variables, as well as the couplings among plant design variables, are estimated. The results reveal strong interactions among various design variables, and identify the most influential plant design variables affecting system performance. These insights guide the development of two DCA-based optimization strategies for large CCD problems: a sequential decomposition approach that preserves dominant design variable couplings while reducing problem size at each stage, and a reduced dimensional optimization approach that focuses on collectively the most influential variables. The results demonstrate that these strategies significantly reduce computational complexity while achieving solutions comparable to those obtained through full simultaneous optimization, demonstrating the value of DCA for understanding and solving complex design problems.

ai.tldr: 提出基于代理模型的设计耦合分析框架，用于研究浮式海上风力发电机控制与结构设计变量间的相互作用，并指导控制协同设计优化策略。
ai.motivation: 浮式海上风力发电机控制与结构设计变量间存在强耦合，但传统设计耦合分析因计算成本高而难以应用。
ai.method: 采用代理模型替代高保真仿真，实现设计耦合分析所需的重复模型评估，量化控制与结构设计变量间的双向耦合。
ai.result: 识别出影响系统性能的关键结构设计变量，并基于此提出两种优化策略：顺序分解法和降维优化法，显著降低计算复杂度且解质量接近全局优化。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解复杂系统中设计变量间的耦合关系，并指导高效协同优化策略的制定。

idea_spark.idea: 结合主动学习或贝叶斯优化进一步减少代理模型训练所需的样本量，提升框架效率。
idea_spark.risk: 代理模型精度不足可能导致耦合分析结果偏差，需谨慎验证模型可靠性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将设计耦合分析与多保真度建模结合，有望在更广泛的工程优化中实现精度与效率的平衡。

en.tldr: A surrogate-based design coupling analysis framework is proposed to investigate interactions between control and plant design variables in floating offshore wind turbines, guiding control co-design optimization strategies.
en.motivation: Strong couplings between control and plant design variables in floating offshore wind turbines make traditional design coupling analysis computationally prohibitive.
en.method: A surrogate model replaces high-fidelity simulations to enable repeated model evaluations for design coupling analysis, quantifying bidirectional couplings between control and plant variables.
en.result: Key plant design variables affecting system performance are identified, and two optimization strategies (sequential decomposition and reduced-dimensional optimization) are developed, significantly reducing computational cost while achieving near-global-optimum solutions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand coupling relationships among design variables in complex systems and guides efficient co-design optimization strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate active learning or Bayesian optimization to further reduce the number of samples needed for surrogate model training, improving framework efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Insufficient surrogate model accuracy may bias coupling analysis results; careful validation is required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining design coupling analysis with multi-fidelity modeling could achieve a better balance between accuracy and efficiency in broader engineering optimization.

papers.title: The Benjamin-Ono equation with 2D control input: approximate controllability and its application
papers.summary: We establish the approximate controllability in $L^2$ for the nonlinear Benjamin-Ono equation on torus via two-dimensional control input. Our proof is based on adaptations of geometric control approach introduced by Agrachev and Sarychev. As an application of this control result, we study long-time dynamics of a randomly forced equation. It is proved that the trajectories are unbounded in Sobolev norms almost surely, when the random force is nondegenerate and statistically periodic in time.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了环面上非线性Benjamin-Ono方程在二维控制输入下的近似可控性，并应用于随机强迫方程，证明其轨迹在Sobolev范数下几乎必然无界。
ai.motivation: 研究非线性色散方程的可控性及其在随机动力学中的应用。
ai.method: 采用Agrachev和Sarychev的几何控制方法，结合二维控制输入。
ai.result: 建立了L^2近似可控性，并证明随机强迫下轨迹在Sobolev范数中几乎必然无界。
ai.help_to_user: 为非线性PDE可控性和随机长期行为分析提供理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用二维控制输入实现近似可控性，并分析随机强迫下的无界性。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖环面结构，推广至其他域可能需调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将可控性结果与随机动力学结合，探索长期行为。

en.tldr: This paper establishes approximate controllability in L^2 for the nonlinear Benjamin-Ono equation on the torus via 2D control input, and applies it to a randomly forced equation, proving trajectories are almost surely unbounded in Sobolev norms.
en.motivation: To study controllability of nonlinear dispersive equations and their application in random dynamics.
en.method: Adapts the geometric control approach of Agrachev and Sarychev with two-dimensional control input.
en.result: Proves L^2 approximate controllability and shows unboundedness of trajectories in Sobolev norms under nondegenerate, statistically periodic random forcing.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for controllability and long-time behavior of nonlinear PDEs with random forcing.

idea_spark.idea: Achieve approximate controllability via 2D control input and analyze unboundedness under random forcing.
idea_spark.risk: Method relies on torus geometry; generalization to other domains may require modifications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine controllability results with random dynamics to explore long-term behavior.

papers.title: When Chain-of-Thought Fails, the Solution Hides in the Hidden States
papers.summary: Whether intermediate reasoning is computationally useful or merely explanatory depends on whether chain-of-thought (CoT) tokens contain task-relevant information. We present a mechanistic causal analysis of CoT on GSM8K using activation patching: transferring token-level hidden states from a CoT generation to a direct-answer run for the same question, then measuring the effect on final-answer accuracy. Across models, generating after patching yields substantially higher accuracy than both direct-answer prompting and the original CoT trace, revealing that individual CoT tokens can encode sufficient information to recover the correct answer, even when the original trace is incorrect. This task-relevant information is more prevalent in correct than incorrect CoT runs and is unevenly distributed across tokens, concentrating in mid-to-late layers and appearing earlier in the reasoning trace. Moreover, patching language tokens such as verbs and entities carry task-solving information that steers generation toward correct reasoning, whereas mathematical tokens encode answer-proximal content that rarely succeeds. Patched outputs are often shorter and yet exceed the accuracy of a full CoT trace, suggesting complete reasoning chains are not always necessary. Together, these findings demonstrate that CoT encodes recoverable, token-level problem-solving information, offering new insight into how reasoning is represented and where it breaks down.

ai.tldr: 通过激活修补分析，发现链式思维（CoT）的每个token在隐藏状态中编码了可恢复的任务相关信息，即使原始推理链错误，也能通过修补隐藏状态获得更高准确率。
ai.motivation: 探究CoT中间推理token是否真正包含任务相关信息，以及这些信息如何分布和利用。
ai.method: 在GSM8K数据集上，使用激活修补方法将CoT生成过程中的token级隐藏状态转移到直接回答运行中，测量对最终答案准确率的影响。
ai.result: 修补隐藏状态后生成的准确率显著高于直接提示和原始CoT轨迹；正确CoT中任务相关信息更丰富，且集中在中间到后期层和推理早期；动词和实体token携带推理信息，数学token编码答案邻近内容但成功率低。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解CoT推理的内部机制，指导如何更有效地利用或改进推理链。

idea_spark.idea: 设计仅使用关键token（如动词、实体）的轻量推理链，减少计算开销。
idea_spark.risk: 关键token的选择可能依赖任务，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: CoT并非必须完整，可探索部分推理链或选择性信息注入。

zh.tldr: 通过激活修补分析，发现链式思维（CoT）的每个token在隐藏状态中编码了可恢复的任务相关信息，即使原始推理链错误，也能通过修补隐藏状态获得更高准确率。
zh.motivation: 探究CoT中间推理token是否真正包含任务相关信息，以及这些信息如何分布和利用。
zh.method: 在GSM8K数据集上，使用激活修补方法将CoT生成过程中的token级隐藏状态转移到直接回答运行中，测量对最终答案准确率的影响。
zh.result: 修补隐藏状态后生成的准确率显著高于直接提示和原始CoT轨迹；正确CoT中任务相关信息更丰富，且集中在中间到后期层和推理早期；动词和实体token携带推理信息，数学token编码答案邻近内容但成功率低。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解CoT推理的内部机制，指导如何更有效地利用或改进推理链。

idea_spark.idea: 设计仅使用关键token（如动词、实体）的轻量推理链，减少计算开销。
idea_spark.risk: 关键token的选择可能依赖任务，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: CoT并非必须完整，可探索部分推理链或选择性信息注入。

en.tldr: Using activation patching, we show that individual chain-of-thought tokens encode recoverable task-relevant information in hidden states, enabling higher accuracy than full CoT traces even when the original trace is incorrect.
en.motivation: To determine whether intermediate CoT tokens contain task-relevant information and how such information is distributed and utilized.
en.method: On GSM8K, we apply activation patching to transfer token-level hidden states from a CoT generation to a direct-answer run, measuring the effect on final-answer accuracy.
en.result: Patched outputs achieve significantly higher accuracy than direct prompting and original CoT; correct CoT runs encode more task-relevant information, concentrated in mid-to-late layers and early reasoning tokens; verbs and entities steer reasoning, while mathematical tokens encode answer-proximal content but rarely succeed.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into how CoT represents reasoning internally, guiding more efficient use or improvement of reasoning chains.

idea_spark.idea: Design lightweight reasoning chains using only key tokens (e.g., verbs, entities) to reduce computational cost.
idea_spark.risk: Selection of key tokens may be task-dependent, requiring validation of generalizability.
idea_spark.inspiration: CoT does not need to be complete; exploring partial reasoning chains or selective information injection is promising.

papers.title: Towards Causally Interpretable Wi-Fi CSI-Based Human Activity Recognition with Discrete Latent Compression and LTL Rule Extraction
papers.summary: We address Human Activity Recognition (HAR) utilizing Wi-Fi Channel State Information (CSI) under the joint requirements of causal interpretability, symbolic controllability, and direct operation on high-dimensional raw signals. Deep neural models achieve strong predictive performance on CSI-based HAR (CHAR), yet rely on continuous latent representations that are opaque and difficult to modify; purely symbolic approaches, in contrast, cannot process raw CSI streams. We propose a fully automatic and strictly decoupled pipeline in which CSI magnitude windows are compressed by a categorical variational autoencoder with Gumbel-Softmax latent variables under a capacity-controlled objective, yielding a compact discrete representation. The encoder is then frozen and used as a deterministic mapping to one-hot latent trajectories. Causal discovery is performed on these trajectories to estimate class-conditional temporal dependency graphs. Statistically supported lagged dependencies are translated into Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) rules, producing a fully symbolic and deterministic classifier based solely on rule evaluation and aggregation, without any learned discriminative head. Because rules are defined over discrete latent variables, antenna-specific rule sets can in principle be combined at the symbolic level, enabling structured multi-antenna fusion without retraining the encoder. Results from CHAR Latent Temporal Rule Extraction (CHARL-TRE) indicate competitive performance while preserving explicit temporal and causal structure, showing that deterministic symbolic classification grounded in unsupervised discrete latent representations constitutes a viable alternative to end-to-end black-box models for wireless HAR.

ai.tldr: 提出一种完全自动且严格解耦的流程，通过离散潜在压缩和LTL规则提取，实现基于Wi-Fi CSI的人类活动识别，兼具因果可解释性和符号可控性。
ai.motivation: 现有深度模型在CSI-HAR上表现优异，但连续潜在表示不透明且难以修改；纯符号方法无法处理原始CSI流。
ai.method: 使用带Gumbel-Softmax潜在变量的分类变分自编码器压缩CSI幅度窗口，得到紧凑离散表示；冻结编码器后对离散轨迹进行因果发现，提取类条件时间依赖图；将统计支持的滞后依赖转化为LTL规则，构建完全符号化的确定性分类器。
ai.result: 在CHARL-TRE上取得竞争性性能，同时保留显式时间和因果结构，证明基于无监督离散潜在表示的确定性符号分类是端到端黑箱模型的有效替代。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将无线感知中的深度学习模型转化为可解释、可控制的符号规则系统。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将多天线符号级融合扩展为跨模态符号融合，例如结合Wi-Fi和毫米波雷达的离散潜在表示。
idea_spark.risk: 离散潜在表示可能丢失细微运动信息，导致规则覆盖不全；因果发现依赖数据量，小样本下可能不可靠。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经符号方法启发，将无监督离散编码与形式化逻辑结合，实现可解释的无线感知。

en.tldr: Proposes a fully automatic and strictly decoupled pipeline that achieves causal interpretability and symbolic controllability for Wi-Fi CSI-based human activity recognition via discrete latent compression and LTL rule extraction.
en.motivation: Deep models excel at CSI-based HAR but rely on opaque continuous latent representations; purely symbolic approaches cannot process raw CSI streams.
en.method: Compresses CSI magnitude windows using a categorical VAE with Gumbel-Softmax latent variables under a capacity-controlled objective to obtain compact discrete representations. After freezing the encoder, causal discovery is performed on the discrete trajectories to estimate class-conditional temporal dependency graphs. Statistically supported lagged dependencies are translated into LTL rules, yielding a fully symbolic deterministic classifier.
en.result: Competitive performance on CHARL-TRE while preserving explicit temporal and causal structure, demonstrating that deterministic symbolic classification grounded in unsupervised discrete latent representations is a viable alternative to end-to-end black-box models.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to transform deep learning models in wireless sensing into interpretable and controllable symbolic rule systems.

idea_spark.idea: Explore extending multi-antenna symbolic fusion to cross-modal symbolic fusion, e.g., combining discrete latent representations from Wi-Fi and mmWave radar.
idea_spark.risk: Discrete latent representations may lose fine-grained motion information, leading to incomplete rule coverage; causal discovery relies on sufficient data and may be unreliable with small samples.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by neuro-symbolic approaches, combining unsupervised discrete encoding with formal logic for interpretable wireless sensing.

papers.title: A Reinforcement-learning-based Column Generation Algorithm for Integrated Operating Room Planning and Scheduling
papers.summary: In this paper, we propose a novel mixed integer programming model to formulate integrated operating room planning and scheduling problems, where several mandatory and elective surgeries are to be assigned and scheduled in operating rooms on different days. We consider both overtime in operating rooms and surgeons' daily availability limits. We propose a column generation (CG) algorithm to solve large-scale instances. In order to enhance the CG, we integrate the Reinforcement Learning Algorithm and the Genetic Algorithm and develop a hybrid algorithm to generate initial columns for the CG algorithm. For our analysis, we employed two sets of test instances: one consisting of synthetic data and the other based on real-world cases from a local hospital in Naples, Italy. Computational experiments demonstrate that our proposed model and methodology yields an average optimality gap of 1.23% for synthetic instances and 1.49% on real-world scenarios, significantly outperforming previous solution methodologies in the literature. Additionally, we demonstrate that the developed CG algorithm provides a high-quality solution for large-scale instances where other models and methods fail to obtain even a feasible solution. To further evaluate robustness under uncertainty, we examined scenarios with 20% variability in surgery durations. The results indicate that incorporating a 120-minute buffer time minimizes the overall cost. Moreover, we investigated the impact of emergency surgeries by either introducing additional cases or escalating surgical priorities. For synthetic instances, the inclusion of emergency surgeries increased the total rescheduling cost by 4.13%, whereas in the real-world Naples cases, priority escalation led to only a 0.11% increase.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合强化学习和遗传算法的列生成方法，用于手术室综合规划与调度，在合成和真实数据上分别达到1.23%和1.49%的最优性差距。
ai.motivation: 手术室规划与调度问题复杂，现有方法难以处理大规模实例和不确定性。
ai.method: 建立混合整数规划模型，采用列生成算法，并用强化学习和遗传算法生成初始列以加速求解。
ai.result: 合成实例平均最优性差距1.23%，真实场景1.49%；在不确定性下，120分钟缓冲时间可最小化总成本；紧急手术使合成实例重调度成本增加4.13%，真实案例仅增加0.11%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效求解手术室调度问题，处理手术时长不确定性和紧急手术影响。

idea_spark.idea: 利用强化学习动态调整列生成中的定价子问题，或自适应选择初始列生成策略。
idea_spark.risk: 强化学习训练可能不稳定，需要大量调参；真实场景数据有限时泛化能力存疑。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将强化学习用于列生成初始解构造，启发其他调度或资源分配问题中智能初始化方法的设计。

en.tldr: Proposes a column generation algorithm enhanced by reinforcement learning and genetic algorithm for integrated operating room planning and scheduling, achieving 1.23% and 1.49% optimality gaps on synthetic and real-world instances respectively.
en.motivation: Operating room planning and scheduling is complex; existing methods struggle with large-scale instances and uncertainty.
en.method: Formulates a mixed integer programming model, solves via column generation, and uses reinforcement learning with genetic algorithm to generate initial columns for acceleration.
en.result: Average optimality gaps of 1.23% on synthetic and 1.49% on real-world data; a 120-minute buffer minimizes total cost under uncertainty; emergency surgeries increase rescheduling cost by 4.13% (synthetic) and 0.11% (real-world).
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently solve operating room scheduling problems, handling surgery duration uncertainty and emergency impacts.

idea_spark.idea: Use reinforcement learning to dynamically adjust pricing subproblems in column generation or adaptively select initial column generation strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Reinforcement learning training may be unstable and require extensive tuning; generalization may be limited with scarce real-world data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using reinforcement learning for initial solution construction in column generation inspires intelligent initialization methods for other scheduling or resource allocation problems.

papers.title: On Tikhonov Regularization for Direct and Indirect Data-Driven LQR Control
papers.summary: In recent years, the so-called `direct data-driven control' has been a topic of intense research, and it is expected that it will become prominent in future complex dynamical systems control. Within this framework, regularization not only implicitly enforces system identification, but also plays a crucial role in ensuring reliable closed-loop behavior. To further enhance the performance of data-driven controllers, we propose a new regularization method for direct data-driven LQR control of unknown LTI systems, based on a regularized covariance parameterization. Unlike existing data-driven techniques, the proposed method remains effective in handling ill-conditioned cases, such as when the data matrix has a large condition number. Then, we demonstrate that our method is equivalent to the indirect certainty-equivalence LQR combined with Tikhonov regularization. Furthermore, we extend our method to the design of controllers for unknown nonlinear systems using Koopman linear embedding. Finally, the simulation results validate the effectiveness and advantages of the proposed regularization method.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于正则化协方差参数化的直接数据驱动LQR控制新方法，适用于病态数据，并扩展到非线性系统。
ai.motivation: 现有直接数据驱动方法在处理病态数据矩阵时性能下降，需要更鲁棒的控制器设计方法。
ai.method: 采用正则化协方差参数化，等价于间接确定性等价LQR结合Tikhonov正则化，并通过Koopman线性嵌入扩展到非线性系统。
ai.result: 仿真验证了所提正则化方法在处理病态情况下的有效性和优势。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户设计更可靠的数据驱动LQR控制器，尤其当数据存在病态问题时。

idea_spark.idea: 探索自适应正则化参数选择策略，或结合贝叶斯方法进行不确定性量化。
idea_spark.risk: 正则化可能引入偏差，需平衡偏差与方差；Koopman嵌入的线性近似精度可能影响非线性控制性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从系统辨识中的Tikhonov正则化获得灵感，将其与直接数据驱动控制框架融合。

en.tldr: Proposes a new regularization method for direct data-driven LQR control using regularized covariance parameterization, effective for ill-conditioned data and extended to nonlinear systems.
en.motivation: Existing direct data-driven methods degrade when the data matrix is ill-conditioned, necessitating a more robust controller design approach.
en.method: Uses regularized covariance parameterization, equivalent to indirect certainty-equivalence LQR with Tikhonov regularization, and extends to nonlinear systems via Koopman linear embedding.
en.result: Simulations validate the effectiveness and advantages of the proposed regularization method in handling ill-conditioned cases.
en.help_to_user: Helps users design more reliable data-driven LQR controllers, especially when data is ill-conditioned.

idea_spark.idea: Explore adaptive regularization parameter selection strategies or combine with Bayesian methods for uncertainty quantification.
idea_spark.risk: Regularization may introduce bias, requiring bias-variance trade-off; Koopman linear approximation accuracy may affect nonlinear control performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Tikhonov regularization in system identification, integrated into the direct data-driven control framework.

papers.title: A Specialized Importance-Aware Quantum Convolutional Neural Network with Ring-Topology (IA-QCNN) for MGMT Promoter Methylation Prediction in Glioblastoma
papers.summary: GBM is a highly aggressive primary malignancy in adults, necessitating personalized therapeutic strategies due to its inherent molecular heterogeneity. MGMT promoter methylation is a pivotal prognostic biomarker for anticipating response to temozolomide-based chemotherapy. Although various AI frameworks have been developed for non-invasive MGMT prediction, spatial heterogeneity of methylation status and the high-dimensional and correlated nature of MRI data frequently constrain discriminative feature learning and generalizability of classical models. To circumvent these limitations, a specialized IA-QCNN architecture is proposed, based on the principles of quantum mechanics, including superposition and entanglement, and enabling more efficient representation learning in high-dimensional Hilbert space. The framework establishes a methodological bridge between GBM radiogenomics and quantum deep learning by integrating energy-based slice selection, importance-aware weighting, ring-topology quantum convolution, and folding-based pooling layers. When the model predicts MGMT promoter methylation status using both mpMRI and T1Gd images, experimental results demonstrate that the IA-QCNN achieves high accuracy despite its low number of trainable parameters while effectively minimizing the overfitting problem observed in classical models. Quantitative analyses reveal that the T1Gd modality possesses higher discriminative power than mpMRI, establishing a clinically significant sequence preference. Furthermore, the model exhibits exceptional robustness in hybrid noise environments, effectively utilizing noise as a regularization mechanism to enhance predictive performance. Consequently, the specialized IA-QCNN architecture provides a robust and computationally efficient alternative to classical approaches in the analysis of heterogeneous radiogenomic data.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于量子力学原理的IA-QCNN架构，用于预测胶质母细胞瘤中MGMT启动子甲基化状态，在低参数下实现高精度并缓解过拟合。
ai.motivation: 经典AI模型受限于MRI数据的高维相关性和甲基化空间异质性，难以学习判别性特征且易过拟合。
ai.method: 集成能量基切片选择、重要性感知加权、环拓扑量子卷积和折叠池化层，构建量子深度学习框架。
ai.result: IA-QCNN在T1Gd和mpMRI上均取得高准确率，T1Gd模态判别力更强；模型在混合噪声环境中表现鲁棒，利用噪声作为正则化机制。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、鲁棒的量子深度学习方法，用于非侵入性预测胶质母细胞瘤关键生物标志物。

idea_spark.idea: 利用量子叠加和纠缠特性在希尔伯特空间中高效表示MRI特征，结合环拓扑卷积增强局部与全局信息融合。
idea_spark.risk: 量子计算硬件当前受限，模拟环境下的性能可能无法直接迁移至真实量子设备。
idea_spark.inspiration: 噪声作为正则化机制的设计思路可启发其他鲁棒深度学习模型的开发。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、鲁棒的量子深度学习方法，用于非侵入性预测胶质母细胞瘤关键生物标志物。

idea_spark.idea: 利用量子叠加和纠缠特性在希尔伯特空间中高效表示MRI特征，结合环拓扑卷积增强局部与全局信息融合。
idea_spark.risk: 量子计算硬件当前受限，模拟环境下的性能可能无法直接迁移至真实量子设备。

en.tldr: A specialized IA-QCNN architecture based on quantum mechanics is proposed to predict MGMT promoter methylation in glioblastoma, achieving high accuracy with few parameters and mitigating overfitting.
en.motivation: Classical AI models struggle with high-dimensional correlated MRI data and spatial heterogeneity of methylation, limiting discriminative feature learning and generalizability.
en.method: Integrates energy-based slice selection, importance-aware weighting, ring-topology quantum convolution, and folding-based pooling layers within a quantum deep learning framework.
en.result: IA-QCNN achieves high accuracy on both T1Gd and mpMRI, with T1Gd showing higher discriminative power; the model is robust in hybrid noise environments, using noise as a regularizer.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and robust quantum deep learning approach for non-invasive prediction of a key biomarker in glioblastoma.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage quantum superposition and entanglement for efficient MRI feature representation in Hilbert space, combined with ring-topology convolution for enhanced local-global fusion.
idea_spark.risk: Current quantum hardware limitations may prevent direct transfer of simulation performance to real quantum devices.
idea_spark.inspiration: The use of noise as a regularization mechanism can inspire development of other robust deep learning models.

papers.title: Reconstructive Authority Model: Runtime Execution Validity Under Partial Observability
papers.summary: Autonomous systems increasingly operate under partial observability where execution-relevant state is never fully accessible. Existing governance mechanisms -- trusted execution environments, oracle-signed state proofs, cryptographic attestation -- enforce the integrity of computation and state projections. We show this is structurally insufficient: an authenticated projection of state is necessary but never sufficient for execution validity.   We introduce the Reconstructive Authority Model (RAM), which separates integrity from coverage. RAM defines a reconstruction gate that reasons over an explicit coverage envelope -- comprising proven state, declared assumptions, and an acknowledged unobservable residual -- and permits execution only when coverage is adequate for the action class. When coverage is insufficient, RAM narrows privileges dynamically or fails closed. Attestation proves trust in measurement; RAM proves adequacy of what is measured.   We formalize RAM, prove necessity via two theorems (attestation insufficiency and RAM necessity) and three corollaries, and present a hybrid RAM+Attestation architecture with privilege-narrowing. Synthetic experiments (N=100,000, seed=42) show RAM achieves zero invalid execution rates at all coverage levels. Attestation-based systems exhibit IER=0.423 at low coverage and IER=0.233 even at full coverage, the latter arising from undefined-state handling failures undetectable by integrity checks alone.   This reframes execution validity as a coverage reconstruction problem, distinct from and complementary to integrity guarantees provided by attestation.

ai.tldr: 提出重构权威模型（RAM），通过覆盖包络和特权收窄机制，在部分可观测条件下保证执行有效性，弥补了仅靠认证的不足。
ai.motivation: 现有认证机制（如可信执行环境、密码学证明）只能保证状态投影的真实性，但无法确保执行所需覆盖的充分性，导致部分可观测场景下执行无效。
ai.method: RAM 引入重构门，基于覆盖包络（包含已证明状态、声明假设和不可观测残差）判断覆盖是否足够，不足时动态收窄特权或安全关闭。
ai.result: 合成实验（N=100,000）显示 RAM 在所有覆盖水平下无效执行率为零，而纯认证系统在低覆盖时 IER=0.423，全覆盖时仍有 IER=0.233。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解在部分可观测系统中，如何通过覆盖重构而非仅靠认证来保障执行有效性。

idea_spark.idea: 将执行有效性重新定义为覆盖重构问题，与完整性保证互补。
idea_spark.risk: 覆盖包络的精确建模和假设声明可能引入新的不确定性，需谨慎设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从认证的不足出发，提出覆盖充分性作为独立维度，启发新的系统治理架构。

en.tldr: Proposes the Reconstructive Authority Model (RAM) that ensures execution validity under partial observability via coverage envelope and privilege narrowing, addressing the insufficiency of attestation alone.
en.motivation: Existing attestation mechanisms (e.g., TEEs, cryptographic proofs) guarantee integrity of state projections but not the adequacy of coverage for execution, leading to invalid executions under partial observability.
en.method: RAM introduces a reconstruction gate that reasons over a coverage envelope (proven state, declared assumptions, acknowledged unobservable residual) and permits execution only when coverage is adequate; otherwise narrows privileges or fails closed.
en.result: Synthetic experiments (N=100,000) show RAM achieves zero invalid execution rate at all coverage levels, while attestation-only systems yield IER=0.423 at low coverage and IER=0.233 even at full coverage.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to ensure execution validity in partially observable systems via coverage reconstruction rather than relying solely on attestation.

idea_spark.idea: Reframes execution validity as a coverage reconstruction problem, complementary to integrity guarantees.
idea_spark.risk: Precise modeling of coverage envelopes and assumption declarations may introduce new uncertainties that require careful design.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from the insufficiency of attestation, proposes coverage adequacy as an independent dimension, inspiring new system governance architectures.

papers.title: Optimal Pilot and Payload Power Control in Single-Cell Massive MIMO Systems
papers.summary: This paper considers the jointly optimal pilot and data power allocation in single-cell uplink massive multiple-input-multiple-output (MIMO) systems. Using the spectral efficiency (SE) as performance metric and setting a total energy budget per coherence interval, the power control is formulated as optimization problems for two different objective functions: the weighted minimum SE among the users and the weighted sum SE. A closed form solution for the optimal length of the pilot sequence is derived. The optimal power control policy for the former problem is found by solving a simple equation with a single variable. Utilizing the special structure arising from imperfect channel estimation, a convex reformulation is found to solve the latter problem to global optimality in polynomial time. The gain of the optimal joint power control is theoretically justified, and is proved to be large in the low SNR regime. Simulation results also show the advantage of optimizing the power control over both pilot and data power, as compared to the cases of using full power and of only optimizing the data powers as done in previous work.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了单小区上行大规模MIMO系统中导频和数据功率的联合最优分配，以频谱效率为指标，在总能量预算下求解加权最小SE和加权和SE两个优化问题，并给出了闭式解和凸重构方法。
ai.motivation: 现有工作通常只优化数据功率而忽略导频功率，导致低信噪比下性能损失。本文旨在联合优化导频和数据功率以提升系统频谱效率。
ai.method: 针对加权最小SE问题，通过单变量方程求解最优功率控制策略；针对加权和SE问题，利用信道估计误差的特殊结构进行凸重构，实现多项式时间全局最优解。
ai.result: 推导了最优导频序列长度的闭式解，理论证明联合功率控制在低信噪比下增益显著，仿真验证了其优于全功率方案和仅优化数据功率的方案。
ai.help_to_user: 为大规模MIMO系统的功率控制设计提供了理论最优解和实用算法，可直接用于提升上行链路性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将导频长度和功率分配联合优化，利用凸优化技巧处理非凸问题，实现全局最优。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设单小区和理想信道统计信息，实际多小区干扰和信道时变可能降低增益。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在资源分配中同时考虑训练和传输阶段，避免次优解。

en.tldr: This paper studies joint optimal pilot and data power allocation in single-cell uplink massive MIMO, optimizing weighted minimum SE and weighted sum SE under a total energy budget, with closed-form pilot length and convex reformulation.
en.motivation: Existing work often optimizes only data power, ignoring pilot power, leading to performance loss in low SNR. This work jointly optimizes both to improve spectral efficiency.
en.method: For weighted minimum SE, solve a single-variable equation; for weighted sum SE, exploit channel estimation error structure for convex reformulation achieving global optimality in polynomial time.
en.result: Closed-form optimal pilot sequence length derived; theoretical proof of large gain in low SNR; simulations show advantage over full-power and data-only optimization.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical optimal solutions and practical algorithms for power control in massive MIMO, directly improving uplink performance.

idea_spark.idea: Jointly optimize pilot length and power allocation, using convex techniques to handle non-convex problems for global optimum.
idea_spark.risk: Assumes single-cell and ideal channel statistics; real multi-cell interference and channel time-variation may reduce gains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires considering both training and transmission phases in resource allocation to avoid suboptimal solutions.

papers.title: An Exponentially stable Extended Kalman Filter with Estimate dependent Process noise Covariance for Chemical Reaction Networks
papers.summary: Biomolecular systems are often modeled with partially known nonlinear stochastic dynamics, making state and parameter estimation a central challenge. While Kalman filtering techniques are widely used in this setting, their performance critically depends on the choice of the process noise covariance, which is typically assumed constant and heuristically tuned. Such assumptions are not justified for biomolecular systems, where intrinsic noise arises from underlying reaction kinetics. In this work, we propose an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) with a state estimate-dependent process noise covariance based on Chemical Langevin Equation (CLE). Further, we analyze the stochastic stability of the proposed filter and derive conditions under which the estimation error remains exponentially bounded in the mean-square sense. In particular, we obtain an upper bound on the sampling period for discrete-time biomolecular systems that guarantees this property. The proposed framework is validated through simulations on a nonlinear gene expression model. This approach enables first principle-based modeling and filter design choices for synthetic biomolecular circuits, eliminating the need for heuristic tuning of the process noise covariance.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于化学朗之万方程的状态估计依赖过程噪声协方差的扩展卡尔曼滤波器，并证明其估计误差在均方意义下指数有界。
ai.motivation: 生物分子系统的内在噪声源于反应动力学，传统卡尔曼滤波假设过程噪声协方差恒定且需启发式调节，缺乏理论依据。
ai.method: 利用化学朗之万方程构建状态估计依赖的过程噪声协方差，并分析离散时间系统的随机稳定性，推导保证指数有界的采样周期上界。
ai.result: 在非线性基因表达模型仿真中验证了滤波器的有效性，实现了基于第一性原理的滤波器设计，无需启发式调参。
ai.help_to_user: 为生物分子系统的状态与参数估计提供一种理论严谨、无需手动调节噪声协方差的卡尔曼滤波方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将化学朗之万方程与扩展卡尔曼滤波结合，使过程噪声协方差随状态估计动态更新，从而更准确反映系统内在噪声。
idea_spark.risk: 推导的稳定性条件依赖于系统模型和采样周期，实际应用中模型误差或采样率不满足条件可能导致滤波发散。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用系统内在的随机动力学模型（如化学朗之万方程）来指导滤波器设计，避免经验调参，为合成生物电路提供理论支撑。

en.tldr: Proposes an Extended Kalman Filter with state estimate-dependent process noise covariance based on the Chemical Langevin Equation, and proves exponential boundedness of estimation error in mean-square sense.
en.motivation: Intrinsic noise in biomolecular systems arises from reaction kinetics; conventional Kalman filters assume constant process noise covariance and rely on heuristic tuning, lacking theoretical justification.
en.method: Constructs estimate-dependent process noise covariance using the Chemical Langevin Equation, analyzes stochastic stability of discrete-time systems, and derives an upper bound on sampling period to guarantee exponential boundedness.
en.result: Simulations on a nonlinear gene expression model validate the filter, enabling first-principles-based design without heuristic tuning of process noise covariance.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically rigorous Kalman filtering approach for state and parameter estimation in biomolecular systems, eliminating the need for manual noise covariance tuning.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate the Chemical Langevin Equation with the Extended Kalman Filter so that process noise covariance adapts dynamically with state estimates, better capturing intrinsic noise.
idea_spark.risk: Stability conditions depend on system model and sampling period; model mismatch or insufficient sampling rate may cause filter divergence in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage intrinsic stochastic dynamics models (e.g., Chemical Langevin Equation) to guide filter design, avoiding empirical tuning and providing theoretical support for synthetic biomolecular circuits.

papers.title: DeepTaxon: An Interpretable Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Framework for Unified Species Identification and Discovery
papers.summary: Identifying species in biology among tens of thousands of visually similar taxa while discovering unknown species in open-world environments remains a fundamental challenge in biodiversity research. Current methods treat identification and discovery as separate problems, with classification models assuming closed sets and discovery relying on threshold-based rejection. Here we present DeepTaxon, a retrieval-augmented multimodal framework that unifies species identification and discovery through interpretable reasoning over retrieved visual evidence. Given a query image, DeepTaxon retrieves the top-$k$ candidate species with $n$ exemplar images each from a retrieval index and performs chain-of-thought comparative reasoning. Critically, we redefine discovery as an explicit, retrieval-based decision problem rather than an implicit parametric memory problem. A sample is novel if and only if the retrieval index lacks sufficient evidence for identification, so each retrieval naturally yields a classification or discovery label without manual annotation, thereby providing automatic supervision for both tasks. We train the framework via supervised fine-tuning on synthetic retrieval-augmented data, followed by reinforcement learning on hard samples, converting high-recall retrieval into high-precision decisions that scale to massive taxonomic vocabularies. Extensive experiments on a large-scale in-distribution benchmark and six out-of-distribution datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in both identification and discovery. Ablation studies further reveal effective test-time scaling with candidate count $k$ and exemplar count $n$, strong zero-shot transfer to unseen domains, and consistent performance across retrieval encoders, establishing an interpretable solution for biodiversity research.

ai.tldr: 提出DeepTaxon，一个检索增强的多模态框架，统一了物种识别与发现，通过检索证据进行可解释推理。
ai.motivation: 现有方法将物种识别与发现视为分离问题，分类模型假设封闭集，发现依赖阈值拒绝，无法统一处理。
ai.method: 构建检索索引，对查询图像检索top-k候选物种及示例图像，进行链式比较推理；将发现重新定义为检索决策问题，利用合成数据微调与强化学习训练。
ai.result: 在分布内基准和六个分布外数据集上，识别与发现性能一致提升，并展现出有效的测试时缩放和零样本迁移能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助生物多样性研究者实现统一的物种识别与未知物种发现，提供可解释的决策依据。

idea_spark.idea: 将发现问题显式建模为检索证据不足的决策，实现自动标注与联合训练。
idea_spark.risk: 检索索引的覆盖度和质量直接影响发现性能，对罕见物种可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用检索而非参数记忆处理开放世界问题，可启发其他领域的未知类别检测。

en.tldr: DeepTaxon is a retrieval-augmented multimodal framework that unifies species identification and discovery via interpretable reasoning over retrieved visual evidence.
en.motivation: Current methods treat identification and discovery as separate problems, with closed-set classification and threshold-based rejection, lacking a unified solution.
en.method: Retrieves top-k candidate species with exemplar images from an index, performs chain-of-thought comparative reasoning, redefines discovery as a retrieval decision problem, and trains via supervised fine-tuning on synthetic data plus reinforcement learning on hard samples.
en.result: Consistent improvements on in-distribution benchmark and six out-of-distribution datasets, with effective test-time scaling and strong zero-shot transfer.
en.help_to_user: Enables unified species identification and unknown species discovery with interpretable decisions for biodiversity research.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly model discovery as a decision based on insufficient retrieval evidence, enabling automatic labeling and joint training.
idea_spark.risk: Retrieval index coverage and quality critically affect discovery performance, potentially failing for rare species.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using retrieval instead of parametric memory for open-world problems can inspire unknown class detection in other domains.

papers.title: Heterogeneous-Horizon Exact-Weight Local SGD
papers.summary: We study adaptive aggregation for heterogeneous local SGD in convex finite-sum optimization, allowing heterogeneous local horizons, minibatch sizes, gradient noise, and participation. We introduce HEW-Local SGD, a corrected local-SGD method that chooses nodewise server weights by minimizing an explicit one-round upper bound on the next objective value. This yields an exact local-control formulation with a threshold simplex update, separable amplitude updates, and a one-step guarantee under arbitrary predictable participation. We also introduce two post-local variants: a corrected heterogeneous method and a simpler homogeneous specialization. We establish one-step guarantees and global benchmark-style convergence results. In the regimes where comparison is appropriate, the theory matches the qualitative communication-efficient picture of recent LocalSGD/SCAFFOLD analyses, while also giving explicit guarantees for unequal local horizons.

ai.tldr: 提出一种自适应聚合的异质局部SGD方法HEW-Local SGD，支持不同局部步数、批次大小和噪声，并提供理论保证。
ai.motivation: 现有局部SGD方法通常假设同质局部设置，无法处理实际中节点间局部步数、批次大小等异质情况。
ai.method: 通过最小化下一轮目标值的显式上界，设计节点级服务器权重，得到阈值单纯形更新和可分离幅度更新。
ai.result: 建立了单步保证和全局收敛结果，在可比场景下匹配近期LocalSGD/SCAFFOLD的通信效率理论。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解异质分布式优化中如何自适应聚合，以及如何获得显式收敛保证。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将阈值单纯形更新与动量或方差缩减技术结合，进一步提升收敛速度？
idea_spark.risk: 上界最小化可能依赖问题参数，实际中参数未知时性能可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受局部SGD和SCAFFOLD启发，利用显式上界指导聚合权重。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受局部SGD和SCAFFOLD启发，利用显式上界指导聚合权重。

en.tldr: Proposes HEW-Local SGD, an adaptive aggregation method for heterogeneous local SGD with different local horizons, batch sizes, and noise, providing theoretical guarantees.
en.motivation: Existing local SGD methods often assume homogeneous local settings, failing to handle practical heterogeneity in local steps, batch sizes, etc.
en.method: Minimizes an explicit one-round upper bound on the next objective value to design node-wise server weights, yielding a threshold simplex update and separable amplitude updates.
en.result: Establishes one-step guarantees and global convergence results, matching recent LocalSGD/SCAFFOLD theory in comparable regimes.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand adaptive aggregation in heterogeneous distributed optimization and how to obtain explicit convergence guarantees.

idea_spark.idea: Could the threshold simplex update be combined with momentum or variance reduction to further improve convergence speed?
idea_spark.risk: Minimizing the upper bound may depend on problem parameters; performance may degrade when parameters are unknown in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by local SGD and SCAFFOLD, using an explicit upper bound to guide aggregation weights.

papers.title: Constraint-Based Analysis of Reasoning Shortcuts in Neurosymbolic Learning
papers.summary: Neurosymbolic systems can satisfy logical constraints during learning without achieving the intended concept-label correspondence; this is a problem known as reasoning shortcuts. We formalize reasoning shortcuts as a constraint satisfaction problem and investigate under which conditions concept mappings are uniquely determined by the constraints. We prove that a discrimination property (requiring that no valid concept mapping can be transformed into another valid mapping by swapping two concept values) is necessary for shortcut-freeness under bijective mappings, but demonstrate via a counterexample that it is insufficient even when the constraint graph is connected. We develop an ASP-based algorithm that verifies whether a given constraint set uniquely determines the intended concept mapping, with proven soundness and completeness. When shortcuts are detected, a greedy repair algorithm eliminates them by augmenting the constraint set, converging in at most $k$ iterations, where $k$ is the number of alternative valid mappings. We further provide a complexity classification: deciding shortcut-freeness is coNP-complete, counting shortcuts is #P-complete, and finding minimal repairs is NP-hard. We also establish sample complexity bounds showing that logarithmically many label queries suffice for disambiguation in favorable cases, while querying all ambiguous positions suffices in the worst case. Experiments across eight benchmark domains validate our approach.

ai.tldr: 本文形式化神经符号学习中的推理捷径问题，通过约束满足分析概念映射的唯一性，并提出检测与修复算法。
ai.motivation: 神经符号系统在学习中可能满足逻辑约束却未实现正确的概念-标签对应，即推理捷径问题，需要形式化分析与解决。
ai.method: 将推理捷径建模为约束满足问题，证明区分性属性在双射映射下的必要性及不足，开发基于ASP的验证算法和贪心修复算法。
ai.result: 验证算法具有可靠性和完备性，修复算法最多k次迭代收敛；复杂度分类表明捷径判定为coNP完全，计数为#P完全，最小修复为NP难；样本复杂度界表明有利情况下对数级标签查询即可。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解并检测神经符号学习中的推理捷径，提供自动修复方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用ASP求解器自动发现并修复逻辑约束中的歧义，减少人工干预。
idea_spark.risk: 修复可能引入过强约束，影响模型泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将推理捷径视为约束满足问题，启发从逻辑角度分析学习中的歧义。

en.tldr: This paper formalizes reasoning shortcuts in neurosymbolic learning as a constraint satisfaction problem, analyzes uniqueness of concept mappings, and proposes detection and repair algorithms.
en.motivation: Neurosymbolic systems may satisfy logical constraints without achieving correct concept-label correspondence, known as reasoning shortcuts, requiring formal analysis and resolution.
en.method: Models reasoning shortcuts as a constraint satisfaction problem, proves necessity and insufficiency of a discrimination property, develops an ASP-based verification algorithm and a greedy repair algorithm.
en.result: Verification algorithm is sound and complete; repair converges in at most k iterations; complexity classification shows shortcut-freeness is coNP-complete, counting is #P-complete, minimal repair is NP-hard; sample complexity bounds show logarithmic label queries suffice in favorable cases.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand and detect reasoning shortcuts in neurosymbolic learning, and provides automatic repair methods.

idea_spark.idea: Use ASP solvers to automatically discover and repair ambiguities in logical constraints, reducing manual intervention.
idea_spark.risk: Repair may introduce overly strong constraints, harming model generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing reasoning shortcuts as a constraint satisfaction problem inspires logical analysis of ambiguities in learning.

papers.title: SUDA-Muon: Structural Design Principles and Boundaries for Fully Decentralized Muon
papers.summary: Fully decentralized Muon is difficult because its nonlinear matrix-sign operator does not commute with linear gossip averaging. This makes decentralized Muon a structural design problem: in designing the algorithm, one must distinguish modular components from non-modular ones. We propose \sudamuon{}, which realizes this separation through a unified primal--dual communication template called SUDA; within this template, ED/D$^2$, EXTRA, and gradient tracking become modular backbone choices. We prove a topology-separated non-asymptotic convergence guarantee in the nuclear-norm geometry: the dominant term scales as $\mathcal{O}((1+σ/\sqrt{N})K^{-1/4})$ and does not explicitly involve graph quantities, identifying the communication backbone as the modular axis in the structure design. We then establish two complementary non-modular boundaries. Internally, tracking-before-polarization is necessary for this natural no-tracking variant to avoid non-stationary fixed points under heterogeneous objectives. Externally, in the absence of a central server, a fully decentralized method cannot perform the federated average-then-polarize update; we show that this non-modular local-polarize-then-average design is the essential reason why can fail to exhibit linear speedup. Experiments on CIFAR-100 and GPT-2 fine-tuning support the same picture: the unified template makes different communication algorithms directly comparable. In mild near-IID regimes, the resulting variants perform similarly, while in the more difficult long-horizon non-IID CIFAR-100 setting, \sudamuon{} achieves higher accuracy and lower loss than \textsc{DeMuon}.

ai.tldr: 提出SUDA-Muon，一种基于统一原对偶通信模板的全去中心化Muon算法，解决了非线性矩阵符号算子与线性平均通信的不兼容问题，并给出了拓扑分离的收敛保证。
ai.motivation: 全去中心化Muon因非线性矩阵符号算子与线性平均通信不兼容而难以实现，需要从结构设计角度区分模块化与非模块化组件。
ai.method: 通过统一原对偶通信模板SUDA实现模块化分离，将ED/D²、EXTRA和梯度跟踪作为可替换的通信骨干，并识别出跟踪-前-极化等非模块化边界。
ai.result: 在核范数几何下证明了拓扑分离的非渐近收敛保证，主导项为O((1+σ/√N)K^{-1/4})且不显式依赖图量；实验表明在非IID CIFAR-100上SUDA-Muon优于DeMuon。
ai.help_to_user: 为设计去中心化优化算法提供了结构设计原则和模块化框架，帮助理解通信骨干与非线性算子的交互边界。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将SUDA模板应用于联邦学习中的异构模型聚合，或用于图神经网络中的消息传递设计。
idea_spark.risk: 非模块化边界（如跟踪-前-极化）可能限制模板的通用性，需针对具体算子重新验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从线性代数中非交换算子的视角，启发设计更通用的去中心化算法结构分类学。

en.tldr: Proposes SUDA-Muon, a fully decentralized Muon algorithm based on a unified primal-dual communication template, addressing the incompatibility between nonlinear matrix-sign operator and linear gossip averaging, with topology-separated convergence guarantees.
en.motivation: Fully decentralized Muon is difficult because its nonlinear matrix-sign operator does not commute with linear gossip averaging, necessitating a structural design that distinguishes modular from non-modular components.
en.method: Achieves modular separation via a unified primal-dual communication template (SUDA), where ED/D², EXTRA, and gradient tracking become interchangeable backbones, and identifies non-modular boundaries such as tracking-before-polarization.
en.result: Proves a topology-separated non-asymptotic convergence guarantee in nuclear-norm geometry, with dominant term O((1+σ/√N)K^{-1/4}) independent of graph quantities; experiments on non-IID CIFAR-100 show SUDA-Muon outperforms DeMuon.
en.help_to_user: Provides structural design principles and a modular framework for decentralized optimization algorithms, clarifying the interaction boundaries between communication backbones and nonlinear operators.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying the SUDA template to heterogeneous model aggregation in federated learning or message passing design in graph neural networks.
idea_spark.risk: Non-modular boundaries (e.g., tracking-before-polarization) may limit template generality, requiring re-validation for specific operators.
idea_spark.inspiration: From the perspective of non-commuting operators in linear algebra, inspires a taxonomy of structural designs for general decentralized algorithms.

papers.title: Accelerating sampling via asymptotic relaxation enhancing flows
papers.summary: In this paper, we accelerate Langevin Monte Carlo sampling from Gibbs measures $π\propto \exp(-U)$ by adding a large drift that preserves the invariant measure. For warm-start initial data, we characterize the sharp asymptotic decay rate of the relative entropy and introduce asymptotic relaxation enhancing flows: sequences that achieve arbitrarily fast decay. We construct such flows on the torus by scaling cellular flows and pushing them forward via diffeomorphisms, and we extend the construction to the full space using a Lyapunov function method to control behavior at infinity without periodization, obtaining explicit finite energy flows that guarantee arbitrarily fast convergence under natural growth conditions on $U$.

ai.tldr: 本文通过添加保持不变测度的大漂移项，加速了从吉布斯测度进行朗之万蒙特卡洛采样的过程，并引入了渐近松弛增强流以实现任意快的相对熵衰减。
ai.motivation: 加速朗之万蒙特卡洛采样，特别是从吉布斯测度采样时的收敛速度。
ai.method: 在环面上通过缩放细胞流并利用微分同胚推进构造渐近松弛增强流，在全空间上使用李雅普诺夫函数方法控制无穷远处的行为，得到显式有限能量流。
ai.result: 在温和初始条件下，刻画了相对熵的渐近衰减率，并构造了可实现任意快衰减的流。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种加速采样收敛的理论框架和构造方法，可用于需要高效采样的统计计算和贝叶斯推断。

idea_spark.idea: 将渐近松弛增强流与神经网络结合，学习最优漂移场以自适应加速采样。
idea_spark.risk: 构造的流可能对势函数的光滑性要求较高，实际应用中需处理非光滑或高维情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受流体力学中细胞流加速混合的启发，将几何流形上的加速机制引入采样领域。

en.tldr: This paper accelerates Langevin Monte Carlo sampling from Gibbs measures by adding a large drift that preserves the invariant measure, and introduces asymptotic relaxation enhancing flows achieving arbitrarily fast relative entropy decay.
en.motivation: To accelerate Langevin Monte Carlo sampling, especially from Gibbs measures.
en.method: Constructs asymptotic relaxation enhancing flows on the torus by scaling cellular flows and pushing them forward via diffeomorphisms; extends to full space using a Lyapunov function method to control behavior at infinity, yielding explicit finite energy flows.
en.result: Characterizes sharp asymptotic decay rate of relative entropy for warm-start data and constructs flows that achieve arbitrarily fast decay under natural growth conditions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and construction for accelerating sampling convergence, useful in statistical computation and Bayesian inference.

idea_spark.idea: Combine asymptotic relaxation enhancing flows with neural networks to learn optimal drift fields for adaptive sampling acceleration.
idea_spark.risk: The constructed flows may require smoothness of the potential function, posing challenges in non-smooth or high-dimensional settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by cellular flows accelerating mixing in fluid dynamics, the mechanism of geometric manifold acceleration is introduced into sampling.

papers.title: Improved global stability bounds for two-dimensional plane Poiseuille flow
papers.summary: This work provides new lower bounds on the global (nonlinear) stability limit of pressure-driven two-dimensional plane Poiseuille flow, improving on the energy stability limit, $Re_E$, originally computed by Orr in 1907. Using a computer we carefully construct quartic Lyapunov functionals of the velocity perturbations about the laminar profile, yielding rigorous nonlinear stability certificates. The formulation combines a decomposition of the velocity into finitely many energy eigenmodes, referred to as a 'mode set', and an infinite-dimensional 'tail', together with explicit bounds that recast the Lyapunov inequality conditions as semidefinite programs, whose feasibility is tested. Over the streamwise lengths considered, the certified stability limit exceeds the classical energy bound. In particular, at the critical energy-stable streamwise length, $L_E\approx 2.99$, where $Re_E\approx 87.59$, the flow is found to be globally stable up to $Re \approx 106.8$ (representing a $22\%$ improvement). Various modestly-sized mode sets, capable of capturing sufficient features of the nonlinear dynamics of energy growth and subsequent decay, are proposed and found to be successful in producing improved bounds, with the simplest one involving only five modes.

ai.tldr: 本文通过构造四次Lyapunov泛函，改进了二维平面泊肃叶流的全局非线性稳定性下界，在关键波数下将稳定雷诺数从约87.59提升至约106.8，提升约22%。
ai.motivation: 经典能量稳定性极限（Orr, 1907）过于保守，需要更精确的全局稳定性边界。
ai.method: 将速度扰动分解为有限个能量本征模（模式集）和无穷维尾部，结合显式界将Lyapunov不等式转化为半定规划，通过计算机验证可行性。
ai.result: 在临界能量稳定波长L_E≈2.99处，认证的稳定雷诺数Re≈106.8，比能量极限Re_E≈87.59提高22%；最简单的五模式集即可获得改进。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了流体稳定性分析中构造Lyapunov泛函的数值框架，可推广至其他剪切流。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将模式集自适应选择与机器学习结合，自动发现最优低维截断。
idea_spark.risk: 高维模式集可能导致半定规划规模过大，计算可行性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Orr的经典能量法出发，用现代计算工具重新审视百年问题，启发对经典理论数值化改进的路径。

en.tldr: This work improves the global nonlinear stability lower bound for two-dimensional plane Poiseuille flow by constructing quartic Lyapunov functionals, raising the critical Reynolds number from about 87.59 to 106.8 (a 22% improvement).
en.motivation: The classical energy stability limit (Orr, 1907) is overly conservative; tighter global stability bounds are needed.
en.method: Velocity perturbations are decomposed into a finite set of energy eigenmodes (mode set) and an infinite-dimensional tail; explicit bounds convert Lyapunov inequalities into semidefinite programs verified by computer.
en.result: At the critical energy-stable streamwise length L_E≈2.99, the certified stability Reynolds number is Re≈106.8, a 22% improvement over Re_E≈87.59; a simple five-mode set suffices.
en.help_to_user: Provides a numerical framework for constructing Lyapunov functionals in fluid stability analysis, transferable to other shear flows.

idea_spark.idea: Combine adaptive mode-set selection with machine learning to automatically discover optimal low-dimensional truncations.
idea_spark.risk: High-dimensional mode sets may lead to prohibitively large semidefinite programs; computational feasibility must be checked.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting a century-old problem (Orr's energy method) with modern computational tools inspires a path for numerical improvement of classical theories.

papers.title: NIH-MPINet: A Large-Scale Feature-Rich Network Dataset for Mapping the Frontiers of Team Science
papers.summary: This study presents a large-scale network dataset, NIH-MPINet, curated from NIH RePORTER and PubMed, characterizing collaboration among multiple Principal Investigators (multi-PIs) on NIH R01-equivalent grants from 2006 to 2023. The network characterizes 30,127 PIs as nodes and their collaborations on 86,743 NIH R01-equivalent grants as edges, spanning 888 recipient organizations and supported by 40 NIH Institutes and Centers. We also curated comprehensive metadata, including node-level features such as PI affiliation, alongside edge-level features comprising grant years, titles, and abstracts. Using these data, we constructed a PI collaboration network and identified 19 communities as well as 20 major research topics. Several collaboration communities showed distinct thematic profiles, such as cardiovascular health, cancer immunotherapy, neuroscience, and microbiome research, while genetics and genomics were broadly represented across communities. By incorporating temporal analysis, we observed shifts in research topics and collaboration patterns over time. Topics like healthcare and outcomes research, cognitive health, and Alzheimer's disease have become more prominent in recent years, whereas molecular and cellular biology has seen a relative decline. Overall, this work provides a high-fidelity, feature-rich resource for advancing statistical learning methods and network analysis-based discoveries in the study of long-term biomedical collaboration.

ai.tldr: 本研究构建了一个大规模多PI合作网络数据集NIH-MPINet，包含30127名PI和86743项NIH R01等效资助，并分析了19个社区和20个研究主题的演变。
ai.motivation: 现有团队科学数据集缺乏大规模、特征丰富的多PI合作网络，难以支持统计学习和网络分析的深入研究。
ai.method: 从NIH RePORTER和PubMed收集2006-2023年数据，构建PI合作网络，提取节点和边特征，进行社区检测和主题建模。
ai.result: 识别出19个合作社区和20个主要研究主题，发现心血管健康、癌症免疫治疗等社区具有独特主题，而遗传学与基因组学广泛分布；时间分析显示医疗保健、阿尔茨海默病等主题近年更突出，分子与细胞生物学相对下降。
ai.help_to_user: 该数据集可直接用于研究团队科学中的合作模式、主题演变及预测模型，尤其适合网络分析和统计学习方法的验证。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该数据集训练图神经网络，预测未来高影响力合作团队或新兴研究主题。
idea_spark.risk: 数据仅涵盖NIH资助，可能遗漏非NIH资助的重要合作；社区划分依赖算法参数，需谨慎解释。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合时间动态和主题演化，可设计动态网络嵌入模型，捕捉合作关系的长期变化趋势。

zh.tldr: 本研究构建了一个大规模多PI合作网络数据集NIH-MPINet，包含30127名PI和86743项NIH R01等效资助，并分析了19个社区和20个研究主题的演变。
zh.motivation: 现有团队科学数据集缺乏大规模、特征丰富的多PI合作网络，难以支持统计学习和网络分析的深入研究。
zh.method: 从NIH RePORTER和PubMed收集2006-2023年数据，构建PI合作网络，提取节点和边特征，进行社区检测和主题建模。
zh.result: 识别出19个合作社区和20个主要研究主题，发现心血管健康、癌症免疫治疗等社区具有独特主题，而遗传学与基因组学广泛分布；时间分析显示医疗保健、阿尔茨海默病等主题近年更突出，分子与细胞生物学相对下降。
zh.help_to_user: 该数据集可直接用于研究团队科学中的合作模式、主题演变及预测模型，尤其适合网络分析和统计学习方法的验证。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该数据集训练图神经网络，预测未来高影响力合作团队或新兴研究主题。
idea_spark.risk: 数据仅涵盖NIH资助，可能遗漏非NIH资助的重要合作；社区划分依赖算法参数，需谨慎解释。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合时间动态和主题演化，可设计动态网络嵌入模型，捕捉合作关系的长期变化趋势。

en.tldr: This study presents NIH-MPINet, a large-scale multi-PI collaboration network dataset with 30,127 PIs and 86,743 NIH R01-equivalent grants, identifying 19 communities and 20 research topics with temporal shifts.
en.motivation: Existing team science datasets lack large-scale, feature-rich multi-PI collaboration networks, hindering statistical learning and network analysis.
en.method: Data from NIH RePORTER and PubMed (2006-2023) were used to construct a PI collaboration network with node and edge features, followed by community detection and topic modeling.
en.result: 19 communities and 20 major research topics were identified; communities like cardiovascular health and cancer immunotherapy showed distinct themes, while genetics and genomics were cross-cutting. Temporal analysis revealed rising topics (e.g., healthcare outcomes, Alzheimer's) and declining ones (e.g., molecular and cellular biology).
en.help_to_user: This dataset enables studies of collaboration patterns, topic evolution, and predictive models in team science, particularly for network analysis and statistical learning.

idea_spark.idea: Train graph neural networks on this dataset to predict high-impact future collaborations or emerging research topics.
idea_spark.risk: Data is limited to NIH-funded grants, potentially missing important non-NIH collaborations; community detection depends on algorithmic parameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporate temporal dynamics and topic evolution to design dynamic network embedding models capturing long-term collaboration trends.

papers.title: Process Supervision of Confidence Margin for Calibrated LLM Reasoning
papers.summary: Scaling test-time computation with reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a reliable path to improve large language models (LLM) reasoning ability. Yet, outcome-based reward often incentivizes models to be overconfident, leading to hallucinations, unreliable confidence-based control, and unnecessary compute allocation. We introduce Reinforcement Learning with Confidence Margin (\textbf{RLCM}), a calibration-aware RL framework that jointly optimizes correctness and confidence reliability via a margin-enhanced process reward over intermediate-budget completions. Rather than aligning confidence to correctness likelihoods, RLCM encourages to widen the confidence margin between correct and incorrect steps within a single reasoning trajectory. Across mathematical, code, logic and science benchmarks, our method substantially improves calibration while maintaining or improving accuracy. We further show that, with calibrated confidence signals, the resulting models enable more efficient conformal risk control and effective confidence-weighted aggregation.

ai.tldr: 提出RLCM框架，通过置信度边际增强的过程奖励，在保持或提升准确率的同时改善LLM推理的校准性。
ai.motivation: 基于结果的奖励常使模型过度自信，导致幻觉、不可靠的置信度控制和计算浪费。
ai.method: 在中间预算的完成序列上，使用边际增强的过程奖励，联合优化正确性和置信度可靠性。
ai.result: 在数学、代码、逻辑和科学基准上，校准性显著提升，准确率持平或提高；校准的置信度信号支持更高效的风险控制和聚合。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户获得更可靠的不确定性估计，从而在关键应用中做出更安全的决策。

idea_spark.idea: 将过程奖励与置信度边际结合，在推理步骤层面区分正确与错误。
idea_spark.risk: 边际阈值的选择可能影响泛化性，需针对不同任务调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类教学中的“信心区间”概念获得启发，将置信度差异作为奖励信号。

en.tldr: We propose RLCM, a calibration-aware RL framework that uses margin-enhanced process rewards to improve LLM reasoning calibration while maintaining or improving accuracy.
en.motivation: Outcome-based rewards often incentivize overconfidence, causing hallucinations, unreliable confidence control, and wasted computation.
en.method: We jointly optimize correctness and confidence reliability via a margin-enhanced process reward over intermediate-budget completions.
en.result: On math, code, logic, and science benchmarks, calibration improves substantially with accuracy maintained or improved; calibrated confidence signals enable more efficient conformal risk control and aggregation.
en.help_to_user: It helps users obtain more reliable uncertainty estimates for safer decision-making in critical applications.

idea_spark.idea: Combine process rewards with confidence margins to distinguish correct and incorrect steps at the reasoning step level.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of margin threshold may affect generalization and requires tuning per task.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the concept of 'confidence intervals' in human teaching, using confidence disparity as a reward signal.

papers.title: Vanishing interfaces in an asymmetric fast reaction limit
papers.summary: We study the fast reaction limit for a two-component reaction-diffusion system with asymmetric reaction terms, where only one component diffuses. For nonnegative and mutually segregated initial data, we prove that the initial interface vanishes instantaneously. More precisely, the diffusive component converges uniformly to the solution of the heat equation, while the non-diffusive component vanishes away from the initial time. The proof is based on explicit barriers and a comparison argument, and applies under both Dirichlet and Neumann boundary conditions.

ai.tldr: 研究非对称快速反应极限下，仅一个组分扩散的两组分反应扩散系统，证明初始界面瞬时消失。
ai.motivation: 理解非对称扩散与快速反应耦合时界面的奇异行为。
ai.method: 通过构造显式上下解和比较原理进行证明。
ai.result: 扩散组分一致收敛到热方程解，非扩散组分在初始时刻后消失。
ai.help_to_user: 为反应扩散系统中界面瞬时消失现象提供严格数学分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用比较原理处理非对称扩散与快速反应的耦合。
idea_spark.risk: 结果依赖于初始数据非负且互斥，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 界面瞬时消失可能对应物理中的快速混合或反应前沿消失。

en.tldr: We study the fast reaction limit for a two-component reaction-diffusion system with asymmetric reaction terms, where only one component diffuses, and prove that the initial interface vanishes instantaneously.
en.motivation: To understand the singular behavior of interfaces when asymmetric diffusion couples with fast reactions.
en.method: The proof uses explicit barriers and a comparison argument.
en.result: The diffusive component converges uniformly to the solution of the heat equation, while the non-diffusive component vanishes away from the initial time.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical analysis of instantaneous interface vanishing in reaction-diffusion systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use comparison principles to handle the coupling of asymmetric diffusion and fast reactions.
idea_spark.risk: The result relies on nonnegative and mutually segregated initial data; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Instantaneous interface vanishing may correspond to rapid mixing or reaction front disappearance in physics.

papers.title: Nash-Aronson Estimate for the Linear Kinetic Fokker-Planck equation
papers.summary: We prove a Nash-Aronson-type upper bound on the fundamental solution of the linear kinetic Fokker Planck equation with friction term, distinguishing two regimes. For long times, we derive a Gaussian upper bound matching the classical parabolic estimate, which reflects the averaging of the velocity variable that occurs in this regime. For short times, the fundamental solution is governed by that of the constant-coefficient Kolmogorov equation, with the friction and potential terms negligible.

ai.tldr: 证明了线性动力学Fokker-Planck方程基本解的Nash-Aronson型上界，区分了长时间和短时间两种情形。
ai.motivation: 为线性动力学Fokker-Planck方程的基本解建立精确的上界估计，以理解其在不同时间尺度下的行为。
ai.method: 通过分析方程的结构，将长时间行为归约为经典抛物型估计，短时间行为归约为常系数Kolmogorov方程的解。
ai.result: 长时间下得到匹配经典抛物型估计的高斯上界，短时间下基本解由Kolmogorov方程主导。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了该方程基本解的定量上界，有助于分析相关随机过程和偏微分方程的渐近行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用时间尺度分离，分别用抛物型和Kolmogorov型估计处理不同时间区域。
idea_spark.risk: 短时间估计可能依赖于方程的具体系数，推广时需验证条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将复杂方程分解为不同时间尺度的已知模型，是一种有效的分析策略。

en.tldr: Proves a Nash-Aronson-type upper bound for the fundamental solution of the linear kinetic Fokker-Planck equation, distinguishing long-time and short-time regimes.
en.motivation: To establish precise upper bounds for the fundamental solution of the linear kinetic Fokker-Planck equation, understanding its behavior across different time scales.
en.method: By analyzing the equation's structure, reducing long-time behavior to classical parabolic estimates and short-time behavior to the constant-coefficient Kolmogorov equation.
en.result: A Gaussian upper bound matching classical parabolic estimates for long times, and dominance by the Kolmogorov equation for short times.
en.help_to_user: Provides quantitative upper bounds for the fundamental solution, aiding analysis of related stochastic processes and PDE asymptotics.

idea_spark.idea: Use time-scale separation to handle different regimes with parabolic and Kolmogorov-type estimates respectively.
idea_spark.risk: Short-time estimates may depend on specific coefficients; generalization requires verification of conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing a complex equation into known models on different time scales is an effective analytical strategy.

papers.title: Weak solutions to distribution-dependent stochastic Volterra equations
papers.summary: We prove the existence of weak solutions for distribution-dependent stochastic Volterra equations under linear growth and continuity conditions on the coefficients and mild regularity assumptions on the kernels, including singular kernels. To this end, we formulate an associated local martingale problem and establish its connection with weak solutions. Moreover, we derive continuity and integrability properties of the solutions.

ai.tldr: 证明了在系数线性增长和连续条件下，分布依赖随机Volterra方程弱解的存在性，包括奇异核情形。
ai.motivation: 分布依赖随机Volterra方程在金融、物理等领域有重要应用，但其弱解存在性理论尚不完善，尤其对奇异核情形缺乏系统研究。
ai.method: 通过构造关联的局部鞅问题，并建立其与弱解的联系，利用线性增长和连续性条件证明解的存在性。
ai.result: 获得了弱解的存在性，并推导了解样本路径的连续性和可积性性质。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理含奇异核的分布依赖随机Volterra方程提供了严格的理论基础，可用于金融建模或物理系统分析。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将弱解存在性结果应用于随机最优控制问题，或结合机器学习方法近似解路径。
idea_spark.risk: 奇异核情形下解的唯一性尚未证明，可能限制实际应用中的可预测性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典随机微分方程弱解理论的启发，将局部鞅问题框架拓展至分布依赖Volterra方程。

en.tldr: We prove the existence of weak solutions for distribution-dependent stochastic Volterra equations under linear growth and continuity conditions, including singular kernels.
en.motivation: Distribution-dependent stochastic Volterra equations have important applications in finance and physics, but the theory of weak solutions is incomplete, especially for singular kernels.
en.method: We formulate an associated local martingale problem and establish its connection with weak solutions, then prove existence using linear growth and continuity conditions.
en.result: Existence of weak solutions is obtained, along with continuity and integrability properties of the solution paths.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous theoretical foundation for handling distribution-dependent stochastic Volterra equations with singular kernels, useful for financial modeling or physical system analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to apply the weak solution existence result to stochastic optimal control problems, or combine with machine learning methods to approximate solution paths.
idea_spark.risk: Uniqueness of solutions for singular kernels is not yet proven, which may limit predictability in practical applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by classical weak solution theory for stochastic differential equations, we extend the local martingale problem framework to distribution-dependent Volterra equations.

papers.title: Passage of particles through matter and the effective straggling-function: High-fidelity accelerated simulation via Physics-Informed Machine Learning
papers.summary: High-fidelity simulation of particle-matter interactions provides the essential theoretical reference for diverse physics disciplines, yet generating synthetic datasets at the scale of current and future experiments has become prohibitive. Here, we introduce PHIN-GAN, a novel physics-informed generative adversarial network designed to address this challenge. We derive a set of analytical probability density functions, that effectively describe the ``straggling function'' identified with Landau. For the first time, this enables their continuous evaluation across the entire phase-space. These analytical forms are leveraged to enforce a parametric distribution-level learning objective. Rooted in first principles, PHIN-GAN offers a generalizable, interpretable and scalable proof-of-concept approach for a lossless generative model that maintains the high fidelity of the standard-bearer for simulating such interactions, namely GEANT4, at a fraction of the computational cost.

ai.tldr: 提出PHIN-GAN，一种物理信息生成对抗网络，以极低计算成本实现与GEANT4同等保真的粒子-物质相互作用模拟。
ai.motivation: 高保真粒子-物质相互作用模拟是多个物理学科的基础，但传统方法（如GEANT4）计算成本过高，难以满足当前及未来实验的大规模数据生成需求。
ai.method: 推导出描述Landau“离散函数”的解析概率密度函数，实现全相空间连续评估；利用这些解析形式构建参数化分布级学习目标，训练PHIN-GAN。
ai.result: PHIN-GAN在保持与GEANT4同等高保真度的同时，计算成本大幅降低，提供了可泛化、可解释、可扩展的无损生成模型概念验证。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速理解如何利用物理信息生成对抗网络加速高保真粒子模拟，适用于需要大规模合成数据集的物理实验或研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将解析概率密度函数与生成对抗网络结合，实现连续相空间的高效采样，替代传统离散蒙特卡洛方法。
idea_spark.risk: 解析函数的推导可能依赖于特定物理假设，对于复杂或未知的相互作用过程，其泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用第一性原理推导的解析分布作为学习目标，可启发其他领域（如流体力学、电磁学）中物理信息生成模型的开发。
