en.tldr: Proposes RLSCG, a reinforcement learning-guided framework for adaptive stabilization parameter selection in column generation, significantly accelerating large-scale linear programming.
en.motivation: Column generation suffers from slow convergence due to poor initial dual estimates and oscillations; existing stabilization techniques require manual tuning.
en.method: Unifies smoothing and penalization under a common framework, derives parameter bounds ensuring progress, and designs RLSCG that adaptively selects stabilization parameters via reinforcement learning at each iteration.
en.result: On the cutting stock problem, RLSCG substantially reduces solution time and iteration count compared to traditional column generation, rule-based adaptive stabilization, and learning-based column selection, with largest gains on large-scale instances.
en.help_to_user: Provides an automatic parameter tuning method for column generation stabilization, reducing manual effort and improving efficiency for large-scale linear programs.

idea_spark.idea: Model stabilization parameter selection as a Markov decision process, learning optimal policy from historical iteration data.
idea_spark.risk: RL training may overfit to specific problem distributions; generalization to new problems may require retraining or transfer learning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing column generation stabilization as a dynamic regulation problem from control theory inspires the use of online learning or adaptive control methods.

papers.title: Transferable Human Mobility Network Reconstruction with neuroGravity
papers.summary: Accurate modeling of human mobility is critical for tackling urban planning and public health challenges. In undeveloped regions, the absence of comprehensive travel surveys necessitates reconstructing mobility networks from publicly available data. Here we develop neuroGravity, a physics-informed deep learning model that reliably reconstructs mobility flows from limited observations and transfers to unobserved cities. Using only urban facility and population distributions, we find that neuroGravity's regional representations strongly correlate with socioeconomic and livability status, offering scalable proxies for costly surveys. Furthermore, we uncover that spatial income segregation plays a key role in model transferability: mobility networks are most reliably reconstructed when target cities share similar segregation levels with the source. We design an index to quantify this segregation and accurately predict transferability. Finally, we generate mobility flow proxies for over 1,200 cities worldwide, highlighting neuroGravity's potential to mitigate critical data shortages in resource-limited, underdeveloped areas.

en.tldr: Proposes neuroGravity, a physics-informed deep learning model that reconstructs human mobility networks from limited observations and transfers to unobserved cities, revealing spatial income segregation as key to transferability, and generates mobility proxies for over 1,200 cities worldwide.
en.motivation: Lack of comprehensive travel surveys in underdeveloped regions causes severe data scarcity for mobility networks, necessitating low-cost, transferable reconstruction from publicly available data.
en.method: Develops neuroGravity, a physics-informed deep learning model integrating gravity law with neural networks, using only urban facility and population distributions to output inter-region mobility flows; designs a spatial income segregation index to predict model transferability.
en.result: Regional representations strongly correlate with socioeconomic and livability status; reconstruction reliability depends on similarity of income segregation between source and target cities; successfully generates mobility flow proxies for over 1,200 cities globally.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to reconstruct human mobility networks at low cost using public geographic data and assess the feasibility of transferring the model to new cities.

idea_spark.idea: Combine physical priors (gravity law) with deep learning to design an interpretable transferability metric, enabling knowledge transfer from data-rich to data-poor regions.
idea_spark.risk: Model relies on quality and granularity of urban facility and population data; income segregation index may not fully capture other sociocultural factors affecting transferability.
idea_spark.inspiration: The physics-constrained + transfer learning paradigm can inspire reconstruction and transfer in other data-scarce scenarios (e.g., ecological networks, infrastructure networks).

papers.title: PhysCodeBench: Benchmarking Physics-Aware Symbolic Simulation of 3D Scenes via Self-Corrective Multi-Agent Refinement
papers.summary: Physics-aware symbolic simulation of 3D scenes is critical for robotics, embodied AI, and scientific computing, requiring models to understand natural language descriptions of physical phenomena and translate them into executable simulation environments. While large language models (LLMs) excel at general code generation, they struggle with the semantic gap between physical descriptions and simulation implementation. We introduce PhysCodeBench, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating physics-aware symbolic simulation, comprising 700 manually-crafted diverse samples across mechanics, fluid dynamics, and soft-body physics with expert annotations. Our evaluation framework measures both code executability and physical accuracy through automated and visual assessment. Building on this, we propose a Self-Corrective Multi-Agent Refinement Framework (SMRF) with three specialized agents (simulation generator, error corrector, and simulation refiner) that collaborate iteratively with domain-specific validation to produce physically accurate simulations. SMRF achieves 67.7 points overall performance compared to 36.3 points for the best baseline among evaluated SOTA models, representing a 31.4-point improvement. Our analysis demonstrates that error correction is critical for accurate physics-aware symbolic simulation and that specialized multi-agent approaches significantly outperform single-agent methods across the tested physical domains.

ai.tldr: 提出首个物理感知符号模拟基准PhysCodeBench，包含700个手工样本，并设计自纠正多智能体精炼框架SMRF，在物理模拟代码生成上显著优于现有模型。
ai.motivation: 现有大语言模型在将物理描述转化为可执行模拟代码时存在语义鸿沟，缺乏专门评估物理感知符号模拟的基准。
ai.method: 构建包含力学、流体、软体物理的700样本基准，提出SMRF框架，由模拟生成器、错误纠正器、模拟精炼器三个智能体协作迭代，结合领域验证。
ai.result: SMRF总体得分67.7，比最佳基线提升31.4分，错误纠正和专用多智能体方法显著优于单智能体。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户评估和提升LLM在物理模拟代码生成方面的能力，提供可复用的基准和框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将SMRF的领域验证模块扩展为可学习的物理规则库，自动适应新物理领域。
idea_spark.risk: 多智能体迭代可能增加计算开销，且领域验证依赖专家知识，扩展性受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴错误纠正与精炼分离的设计，可应用于机器人任务规划中的物理合理性检查。

en.tldr: Introduces PhysCodeBench, the first benchmark for physics-aware symbolic simulation with 700 samples, and a Self-Corrective Multi-Agent Refinement Framework (SMRF) that significantly outperforms existing models.
en.motivation: LLMs struggle to translate physical descriptions into executable simulation code due to the semantic gap, and no dedicated benchmark exists for this task.
en.method: Constructs a 700-sample benchmark covering mechanics, fluid dynamics, and soft-body physics; proposes SMRF with three specialized agents (generator, corrector, refiner) that collaborate iteratively with domain-specific validation.
en.result: SMRF achieves 67.7 overall score, a 31.4-point improvement over the best baseline; error correction and multi-agent approach are critical for performance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users evaluate and improve LLM capabilities in physics simulation code generation, providing a reusable benchmark and framework.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the domain validation module of SMRF into a learnable physics rule library that adapts to new physical domains automatically.
idea_spark.risk: Multi-agent iteration may increase computational cost, and domain validation relies on expert knowledge, limiting scalability.
idea_spark.inspiration: The separation of error correction and refinement can inspire physical plausibility checks in robot task planning.

papers.title: Universal tracer statistics in single-file transport
papers.summary: We uncover an emergent universality in the large-scale, long-time statistics of a one-dimensional hard-rod gas evolving under two fundamentally different classes of microscopic dynamics: stochastic (diffusive) and unitary (ballistic). Remarkably, despite the difference of the two systems, the one-time joint distribution of the positions of multiple tracers exhibits identical non-Gaussian fluctuations, up to a simple dynamical scaling. This universality holds in both annealed and quenched ensembles, demonstrating a persistent memory of the initial state. Differences between the dynamics manifest at large scales only in multi-time statistics. Our conclusions are based on explicit large-deviation results for the one-time statistics of tracer pairs and the two-time statistics of a single tracer. Similar physics extends to current fluctuations, demonstrated explicitly in the quenched ensemble. We obtain these results from exact microscopic solutions for both dynamics and, independently, from fluctuating hydrodynamics in the ballistic case in the annealed ensemble. Our rare-event simulations further corroborate these findings and provide a novel demonstration of sampling atypical fluctuations in both types of hard-rod gas.

ai.tldr: 揭示一维硬棒气体在随机扩散和弹道两种微观动力学下，多示踪粒子位置联合分布具有相同的非高斯涨落，仅需简单动力学标度。
ai.motivation: 探索不同微观动力学（随机与弹道）下，一维单列输运中示踪粒子统计的普适性。
ai.method: 精确微观解、涨落流体力学、大偏差理论及罕见事件模拟。
ai.result: 单时联合分布具有普适非高斯涨落，多时统计才体现动力学差异；电流涨落也呈现类似普适性。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解低维输运中示踪粒子的普适统计行为提供理论框架和精确结果。

idea_spark.idea: 利用大偏差理论分析多示踪粒子联合分布，揭示初始记忆的持久性。
idea_spark.risk: 普适性可能仅适用于硬棒气体，对其他相互作用类型需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将单时普适性与多时差异结合，可设计实验区分微观动力学类型。

en.tldr: Uncover emergent universality in the joint distribution of multiple tracers in a 1D hard-rod gas under stochastic and ballistic dynamics, with identical non-Gaussian fluctuations up to a dynamical scaling.
en.motivation: To explore universal statistics of tracer particles in single-file transport under fundamentally different microscopic dynamics (diffusive vs. ballistic).
en.method: Exact microscopic solutions, fluctuating hydrodynamics, large-deviation theory, and rare-event simulations.
en.result: One-time joint distributions exhibit universal non-Gaussian fluctuations; differences appear only in multi-time statistics. Current fluctuations show similar universality.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and exact results for understanding universal tracer statistics in low-dimensional transport.

idea_spark.idea: Use large-deviation theory to analyze joint distributions of multiple tracers, revealing persistent memory of the initial state.
idea_spark.risk: Universality may be specific to hard-rod gas; validation needed for other interaction types.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine single-time universality with multi-time differences to design experiments distinguishing microscopic dynamics.

papers.title: CaTherine wheels
papers.summary: A CaTherine wheel is a surjective continuous map $f:S^1 \to S^2$ such that for every closed interval $I\subset S^1$ the image $f(I)$ is homeomorphic to a disk, and $f(\partial I)$ is contained in the boundary of this disk. CaTherine wheels arise in many areas of low-dimensional geometry and topology, including conformal dynamics (expanding Thurston maps, expanding origamis), probability theory (whole plane ${\rm SLE}_κ$ for $κ\ge 8$, LQG metric trees) and elsewhere. We develop their theory in generality, and explain how CaTherine wheels and their associated structures can serve as a dictionary between these various fields.   Our most substantial applications are to the theory of hyperbolic 3-manifolds. If $M$ is a closed hyperbolic 3-manifold and $G=π_1(M)$, we show that there is a canonical bijection between four kinds of structures associated to $M$:   1. orbit-equivalence classes of pseudo-Anosov flows on $M$ without perfect fits;   2. $G$-equivariant CaTherine wheels up to conjugacy;   3. minimal $G$-zippers; and   4. connected components of the space of uniform quasimorphisms on $G$.   This generalizes and amplifies the theory of fiberings of hyperbolic 3-manifolds over the circle and the Thurston norm.

ai.tldr: 本文系统发展了Catherine wheel理论，并建立了它与伪Anosov流、等变映射、均匀拟同态等结构之间的典范双射，特别应用于闭双曲三维流形。
ai.motivation: Catherine wheel出现在低维几何拓扑的多个领域，但缺乏统一理论；本文旨在建立通用框架并揭示不同结构间的深层联系。
ai.method: 定义Catherine wheel为从圆周到球面的满射连续映射，满足区间像同胚于圆盘且边界映射到圆盘边界；通过等变版本与双曲三维流形的基本群作用相关联。
ai.result: 对闭双曲三维流形M，建立了伪Anosov流（无完美拟合）、等变Catherine wheel、极小G-拉链、均匀拟同态空间连通分支之间的典范一一对应。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解低维几何拓扑中看似不同结构（如动力系统、概率论、双曲流形）之间的内在联系，并提供统一的数学语言。

idea_spark.idea: 将Catherine wheel视为连接不同数学领域的“词典”，可尝试在其他双曲流形或更一般的几何结构中寻找类似对应。
idea_spark.risk: 理论高度抽象，需要深厚的低维拓扑和动力系统背景；实际计算或构造具体例子可能非常困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Thurston纤维化理论的启发，将流形上的动力系统与等变映射空间联系起来，可能启发新的纤维化或分解定理。

en.tldr: This paper develops a general theory of Catherine wheels and establishes canonical bijections between pseudo-Anosov flows, equivariant Catherine wheels, minimal G-zippers, and uniform quasimorphisms for closed hyperbolic 3-manifolds.
en.motivation: Catherine wheels appear across low-dimensional geometry and topology but lacked a unified framework; the paper aims to provide a general theory and reveal deep connections between different structures.
en.method: Define Catherine wheels as surjective continuous maps from S^1 to S^2 such that the image of any closed interval is homeomorphic to a disk and its boundary maps to the disk boundary; then consider equivariant versions with respect to the fundamental group of a hyperbolic 3-manifold.
en.result: For a closed hyperbolic 3-manifold M, there is a canonical bijection between: (1) orbit-equivalence classes of pseudo-Anosov flows without perfect fits, (2) G-equivariant Catherine wheels up to conjugacy, (3) minimal G-zippers, and (4) connected components of the space of uniform quasimorphisms on G.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the intrinsic connections between seemingly different structures in low-dimensional geometry and topology, such as dynamical systems, probability, and hyperbolic manifolds, providing a unified language.

idea_spark.idea: View Catherine wheels as a dictionary linking different mathematical fields; try to find analogous correspondences in other hyperbolic manifolds or more general geometric settings.
idea_spark.risk: The theory is highly abstract and requires deep background in low-dimensional topology and dynamical systems; constructing concrete examples may be very difficult.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Thurston's theory of fiberings, connecting dynamical systems on manifolds with equivariant mapping spaces may lead to new fibration or decomposition theorems.

keywords_raw: surjective continuous map s 1 to s 2

papers.title: GSC-QEMit: A Telemetry-Driven Hierarchical Forecast-and-Bandit Framework for Adaptive Quantum Error Mitigation
papers.summary: Quantum error mitigation (QEM) is essential for extracting reliable results from near-term quantum devices, yet practical deployments must balance mitigation strength against runtime overhead under time-varying noise. We introduce \emph{GSC-QEMit}, a telemetry-driven, \textbf{context--forecast--bandit} framework for \emph{adaptive} mitigation that switches between lightweight suppression and heavier intervention as drift evolves. GSC-QEMit composes three coupled modules: (G) a Growing Hierarchical Self-Organizing Map (GHSOM) that clusters streaming telemetry into operating contexts; (S) an uncertainty-aware subsampled Gaussian-process forecaster that predicts short-horizon fidelity degradation; and (C) a cost-aware contextual multi-armed bandit (CMAB) that selects mitigation actions via Thompson sampling with explicit intervention cost. We evaluate GSC-QEMit on benchmark circuit families (GHZ, Quantum Fourier Transform, and Grover search) under nonstationary noise regimes simulated in Qiskit Aer, using an instrumented testbed where action labels correspond to graded mitigation intensity. Across Clifford, non-Clifford, and structured workloads, GSC-QEMit improves average logical fidelity by \textbf{+9.0\%} relative to unmitigated execution while reducing unnecessary heavy interventions by reserving them for inferred noise spikes. The resulting policies exhibit a favorable fidelity--cost trade-off and transfer across the evaluated workloads without circuit-specific tuning.

ai.tldr: 提出一个遥测驱动的分层预测-赌博机框架，用于自适应量子错误缓解，在轻量抑制和重干预之间动态切换。
ai.motivation: 近期的量子设备噪声随时间变化，固定缓解策略要么过度消耗资源，要么缓解不足，需要自适应方法。
ai.method: 框架包含三个模块：GHSOM聚类遥测上下文、高斯过程预测短期保真度退化、成本感知的上下文多臂赌博机通过汤普森采样选择缓解动作。
ai.result: 在GHZ、量子傅里叶变换和Grover搜索基准电路上，平均逻辑保真度提升9.0%，同时减少不必要的重干预。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何根据实时噪声动态调整量子错误缓解策略，以平衡保真度和计算成本。

idea_spark.idea: 将遥测数据聚类与不确定性感知预测结合，使赌博机决策更鲁棒，可启发类似的自适应系统设计。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖实时遥测和预测模型，若噪声模式突变或预测不准，可能导致次优缓解决策。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受强化学习中上下文赌博机与时间序列预测结合的启发，实现动态权衡。

zh.motivation: 近期的量子设备噪声随时间变化，固定缓解策略要么过度消耗资源，要么缓解不足，需要自适应方法。
zh.method: 框架包含三个模块：GHSOM聚类遥测上下文、高斯过程预测短期保真度退化、成本感知的上下文多臂赌博机通过汤普森采样选择缓解动作。
zh.result: 在GHZ、量子傅里叶变换和Grover搜索基准电路上，平均逻辑保真度提升9.0%，同时减少不必要的重干预。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何根据实时噪声动态调整量子错误缓解策略，以平衡保真度和计算成本。

idea_spark.idea: 将遥测数据聚类与不确定性感知预测结合，使赌博机决策更鲁棒，可启发类似的自适应系统设计。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖实时遥测和预测模型，若噪声模式突变或预测不准，可能导致次优缓解决策。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受强化学习中上下文赌博机与时间序列预测结合的启发，实现动态权衡。

en.tldr: A telemetry-driven hierarchical forecast-and-bandit framework for adaptive quantum error mitigation, switching between lightweight suppression and heavier intervention as noise drifts.
en.motivation: Time-varying noise in near-term quantum devices makes fixed mitigation strategies either over-consuming or under-mitigating, necessitating adaptive approaches.
en.method: The framework comprises three modules: GHSOM for clustering telemetry contexts, Gaussian process forecaster for short-horizon fidelity prediction, and cost-aware contextual multi-armed bandit using Thompson sampling to select mitigation actions.
en.result: On GHZ, Quantum Fourier Transform, and Grover search circuits, average logical fidelity improves by 9.0% while reducing unnecessary heavy interventions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to dynamically adjust quantum error mitigation strategies based on real-time noise to balance fidelity and computational cost.

idea_spark.idea: Combining telemetry clustering with uncertainty-aware prediction makes bandit decisions more robust, inspiring similar adaptive system designs.
idea_spark.risk: The framework relies on real-time telemetry and prediction models; sudden noise pattern changes or inaccurate predictions may lead to suboptimal mitigation decisions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by combining contextual bandits with time series forecasting in reinforcement learning to achieve dynamic trade-offs.

papers.title: Reachability Analysis of the State Transition and State Covariance Matrices for an LTV System
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the reachability of two closely related matrices appearing in the analysis of linear time-varying (LTV) systems over a finite time interval, namely, its closed-loop state transition matrix via a state feedback control and its state covariance matrix starting from some given initial state covariance matrix. Under a mild assumption, we first characterize the set of closed-loop terminal state transition matrices reachable from the identity matrix using controls of the state feedback form. Then, we provide the set of terminal state covariance matrices reachable from any given positive definite initial state covariance matrix when the LTV system is not necessarily controllable. Both results are based on the solutions of corresponding matrix Riccati differential equations (RDE).

ai.tldr: 本文研究了线性时变系统在有限时间区间内，通过状态反馈控制可达到的闭环状态转移矩阵集合，以及从给定初始协方差矩阵出发可达到的终端状态协方差矩阵集合。
ai.motivation: 线性时变系统的状态转移矩阵和状态协方差矩阵的可达性分析对于系统控制和估计理论具有重要意义，现有结果多针对可控系统，本文放宽了可控性假设。
ai.method: 基于矩阵Riccati微分方程的解，分别刻画了闭环状态转移矩阵和状态协方差矩阵的可达集。
ai.result: 在温和假设下，给出了从单位矩阵出发通过状态反馈可达到的终端状态转移矩阵集合，以及从任意正定初始协方差矩阵出发可达到的终端协方差矩阵集合（系统不一定可控）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解线性时变系统中状态反馈控制和协方差传播的极限能力，为控制器设计和状态估计提供理论边界。

idea_spark.idea: 将状态转移矩阵和协方差矩阵的可达性结果用于设计最优反馈增益，使得系统状态协方差满足特定性能指标。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中模型不确定性可能使理论可达集与实际可达集存在偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将可达性分析扩展到具有输入约束或状态约束的线性时变系统。

en.tldr: This paper studies the reachable sets of the closed-loop state transition matrix via state feedback and the terminal state covariance matrix from a given initial covariance for linear time-varying systems, under mild assumptions and without requiring controllability.
en.motivation: Reachability analysis of state transition and covariance matrices is crucial for control and estimation of LTV systems; existing results often assume controllability, which is relaxed here.
en.method: Characterizes reachable sets using solutions of matrix Riccati differential equations.
en.result: Provides the set of terminal state transition matrices reachable from identity via state feedback, and the set of terminal covariance matrices reachable from any positive definite initial covariance, even when the system is not controllable.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the limits of state feedback control and covariance propagation in LTV systems, providing theoretical bounds for controller design and state estimation.

idea_spark.idea: Use the reachable sets of state transition and covariance matrices to design optimal feedback gains that achieve desired covariance performance.
idea_spark.risk: Model uncertainties may cause deviations between theoretical and actual reachable sets.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extend reachability analysis to LTV systems with input or state constraints.

papers.title: From Skeletons to Pixels: Few-Shot Precise Event Spotting via Representation and Prediction Distillation
papers.summary: Precise Event Spotting (PES) is essential in fast-paced sports such as tennis, where fine-grained events occur within very short temporal windows. Accurate frame-level localization is challenging because of motion blur, subtle action differences, and limited annotated data. We study two complementary distillation strategies for few-shot PES: Adaptive Weight Distillation (AWD), a prediction-level method that adaptively weights teacher supervision on unlabeled data, and Annealed Multimodal Distillation for Few-Shot Event Detection (AMD-FED), a representation-level framework that transfers robust skeleton knowledge into visual modalities through annealed pseudo-labeling. Both methods use multimodal distillation to improve generalization under limited supervision. We evaluate them on F3Set-Tennis(sub) under few-shot k-clip settings, where they consistently outperform single-modality baselines and prior PES approaches. After observing the stronger performance of representation-level distillation on tennis, we further validate AMD-FED on a second sports dataset, Figure Skating, where it also shows robust performance in the k-clip scenario. These results highlight the effectiveness of multimodal distillation, especially representation-level transfer, for few-shot precise event spotting.

ai.tldr: 提出两种多模态蒸馏策略（AWD和AMD-FED），在少量标注下实现精确事件定位，在网球和花样滑冰数据集上优于基线方法。
ai.motivation: 精确事件定位在快节奏运动中因运动模糊、动作细微差异和标注数据有限而极具挑战。
ai.method: 采用预测级蒸馏（AWD）和表征级蒸馏（AMD-FED），通过自适应加权教师监督和退火伪标签将骨架知识迁移到视觉模态。
ai.result: 在F3Set-Tennis(sub)和花样滑冰数据集上，k-clip少样本设置下均优于单模态基线和先前方法，表征级蒸馏表现更佳。
ai.help_to_user: 为少样本精确事件定位提供了有效的多模态蒸馏框架，尤其适合标注稀缺的运动视频分析场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将骨架知识蒸馏与自监督学习结合，进一步减少对标注数据的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 退火伪标签可能引入噪声累积，需谨慎设计退火调度以避免性能退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从骨架到像素的知识迁移思路可启发其他跨模态少样本学习问题，如音频到视频的事件检测。

en.tldr: Proposes two multimodal distillation strategies (AWD and AMD-FED) for few-shot precise event spotting, outperforming baselines on tennis and figure skating datasets.
en.motivation: Precise event spotting in fast-paced sports is challenging due to motion blur, subtle action differences, and limited annotations.
en.method: Uses prediction-level distillation (AWD) and representation-level distillation (AMD-FED) with adaptive weighting and annealed pseudo-labeling to transfer skeleton knowledge to visual modalities.
en.result: Under few-shot k-clip settings, both methods outperform single-modality baselines and prior approaches on F3Set-Tennis(sub) and Figure Skating, with representation-level distillation showing stronger performance.
en.help_to_user: Provides effective multimodal distillation frameworks for few-shot precise event spotting, especially useful for sports video analysis with scarce annotations.

idea_spark.idea: Combine skeleton knowledge distillation with self-supervised learning to further reduce annotation dependency.
idea_spark.risk: Annealed pseudo-labeling may accumulate noise; careful annealing schedule design is needed to avoid performance degradation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The skeleton-to-pixel knowledge transfer inspires cross-modal few-shot learning problems, such as audio-to-video event detection.

papers.title: ClusterFusion++: Expanding Cluster-Level Fusion to Full Transformer-Block Decoding
papers.summary: Large language model (LLM) decoding is latency-sensitive and often bottlenecked by fragmented operator execution and repeated off-chip materialization of intermediate tensors. Prior work expands fusion scope by leveraging thread-block clusters and on-chip inter-block collectives to fuse attention-side operators such as QKV projection, attention, and output projection.   We develop ClusterFusion++, a CUDA-level extension that broadens fusion to the full Transformer decoder block for GPT-NeoX/Pythia models: LayerNorm -> QKV -> RoPE -> decode attention -> output projection -> Post-LN -> MLP -> residual. We additionally engineer a CUDA-Graph-compatible execution mode with persistent Tensor Memory Accelerator (TMA) descriptors to reduce per-step overhead.   On an NVIDIA RTX 5090-class GPU, ClusterFusion++ improves throughput by 1.34x for Pythia-2.8B and yields similar gains for Pythia-6.9B, while maintaining high output fidelity (near-token-identical generation, with minor non-determinism from FP16 atomics).

ai.tldr: 提出ClusterFusion++，将融合范围扩展到完整的Transformer解码器块，在RTX 5090上实现1.34倍吞吐提升。
ai.motivation: LLM解码延迟敏感，现有融合方法仅覆盖注意力侧算子，未充分利用片上资源。
ai.method: 利用线程块簇和片上集体通信，融合LayerNorm、QKV、RoPE、注意力、输出投影、Post-LN、MLP和残差连接，并设计CUDA Graph兼容模式。
ai.result: 在Pythia-2.8B和6.9B模型上吞吐提升1.34倍，输出保真度高。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效融合完整解码器块的CUDA实现方案，可降低LLM推理延迟。

idea_spark.idea: 将融合范围从注意力侧扩展到整个解码器块，利用线程块簇和TMA描述符减少中间张量搬运。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖特定硬件（RTX 5090）和CUDA特性，跨平台移植性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过扩大融合粒度突破内存带宽瓶颈，启发更粗粒度的算子融合策略。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种高效融合完整解码器块的CUDA实现方案，可降低LLM推理延迟。

idea_spark.inspiration: 通过扩大融合粒度突破内存带宽瓶颈，启发更粗粒度的算子融合策略。

en.tldr: ClusterFusion++ extends fusion to the full Transformer decoder block, achieving 1.34x throughput improvement on RTX 5090.
en.motivation: LLM decoding is latency-sensitive; prior fusion only covers attention-side operators, leaving on-chip resources underutilized.
en.method: Leverages thread-block clusters and on-chip collectives to fuse LayerNorm, QKV, RoPE, attention, output projection, Post-LN, MLP, and residual, with a CUDA-Graph-compatible mode.
en.result: 1.34x throughput gain on Pythia-2.8B and 6.9B with high output fidelity.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient CUDA implementation for fusing the entire decoder block, reducing LLM inference latency.

idea_spark.idea: Expand fusion scope from attention side to the full decoder block using thread-block clusters and TMA descriptors to reduce intermediate tensor movement.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on specific hardware (RTX 5090) and CUDA features, limiting cross-platform portability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Breaking memory bandwidth bottlenecks by coarser-grained fusion inspires more aggressive operator integration strategies.

papers.title: Computational Method for Desensitized Optimal Guidance Using Direct Collocation
papers.summary: A computational method is developed for desensitized optimal guidance using adaptive Gaussian quadrature collocation. The method computes a reference trajectory that reduces the sensitivity to uncertainties in the dynamic model by augmenting the objective functional to explicitly penalize the sensitivity of the state with respect to uncertain parameters. Using this desensitized reference trajectory as a starting point, the desensitized optimal guidance method developed in this paper computes a new optimal control on the remaining horizon at specified guidance update times. This shrinking horizon optimal control problem is solved using a Legendre-Gauss-Radau collocation method where, at each guidance update, a reduced-horizon mesh is determined by remapping the mesh to the remaining horizon and deleting the portion of the mesh associated with the expired portion of the horizon. The resulting guidance solution is found to improve robustness to external disturbances and modeling errors. The method is demonstrated on two numerical examples. The first example is Zermelo's navigation problem which illustrates the behavior of the method on a simple example. The second example is an atmospheric reentry problem that demonstrates the performance of the method on a more complex problem. For both examples, the dynamics are simulated in the presence of parameter uncertainties in the dynamic model, and Monte Carlo analysis is performed. The results show that the method developed in this paper produces tighter trajectory envelopes and smaller terminal state errors without significantly increasing the computational burden when compared with a method that does not penalize sensitivities.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于自适应高斯求积配点法的去敏最优制导计算方法，通过惩罚状态对不确定参数的敏感性生成参考轨迹，并在制导更新时重新求解缩减视界最优控制问题，提高了对外部扰动和建模误差的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 传统最优制导方法对动态模型中的参数不确定性敏感，导致轨迹分散和终端误差增大，需要一种计算高效且鲁棒性更强的制导方法。
ai.method: 采用自适应高斯求积配点法，在目标函数中显式惩罚状态对不确定参数的敏感性，生成去敏参考轨迹；然后在每个制导更新时刻，使用Legendre-Gauss-Radau配点法求解缩减视界最优控制问题，并通过重新映射网格处理已过期部分。
ai.result: 在Zermelo导航问题和大气再入问题两个数值算例中，结合蒙特卡洛分析，该方法相比不惩罚敏感性的方法，产生了更紧凑的轨迹包络和更小的终端状态误差，且计算负担未显著增加。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过配点法实现去敏最优制导，提升飞行器或机器人等系统在不确定性下的轨迹跟踪精度和鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将去敏制导与在线模型辨识结合，根据实时估计的不确定性参数动态调整惩罚权重，进一步提升适应性。
idea_spark.risk: 实时重新映射网格和求解最优控制可能对计算资源要求较高，在嵌入式系统中实现时需考虑实时性限制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于将灵敏度惩罚引入最优控制框架，可探索在强化学习奖励函数中嵌入类似灵敏度项，以训练对模型误差鲁棒的策略。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过配点法实现去敏最优制导，提升飞行器或机器人等系统在不确定性下的轨迹跟踪精度和鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将去敏制导与在线模型辨识结合，根据实时估计的不确定性参数动态调整惩罚权重，进一步提升适应性。

en.tldr: A computational method for desensitized optimal guidance is developed using adaptive Gaussian quadrature collocation, which reduces sensitivity to dynamic model uncertainties by penalizing state sensitivity in the objective, and solves a shrinking-horizon optimal control problem at each guidance update via Legendre-Gauss-Radau collocation with mesh remapping.
en.motivation: Conventional optimal guidance methods are sensitive to parameter uncertainties in the dynamic model, leading to trajectory dispersion and terminal errors, motivating a computationally efficient and robust guidance approach.
en.method: Adaptive Gaussian quadrature collocation is used to generate a desensitized reference trajectory by explicitly penalizing state sensitivity to uncertain parameters in the objective functional. At each guidance update, a Legendre-Gauss-Radau collocation method solves a reduced-horizon optimal control problem, with the mesh remapped to the remaining horizon.
en.result: In two numerical examples (Zermelo's navigation problem and atmospheric reentry problem) with Monte Carlo analysis, the method yields tighter trajectory envelopes and smaller terminal state errors compared to a method without sensitivity penalization, without significantly increasing computational burden.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to implement desensitized optimal guidance using collocation methods to improve trajectory tracking accuracy and robustness under uncertainties.

idea_spark.idea: Combine desensitized guidance with online model identification to dynamically adjust penalty weights based on real-time uncertainty estimates, enhancing adaptability.
idea_spark.risk: Real-time mesh remapping and optimal control solving may demand high computational resources, posing challenges for embedded systems with strict real-time constraints.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by incorporating sensitivity penalties into optimal control, one could explore adding similar sensitivity terms in reinforcement learning reward functions to train policies robust to model errors.

papers.title: Torus one-point functions in critical loop models
papers.summary: We show that in critical loop models, torus 1-point functions can be expressed in terms of sphere 4-point functions at a different central charge. Unlike in the Moore--Seiberg formalism, crossing symmetry on the sphere therefore implies modular covariance on the torus.   We systematically compute torus 1-point functions in critical loop models, using a numerical bootstrap approach. We focus on the 1-point functions of the 6 simplest primary fields, which give rise to 10 solutions of modular covariance equations. Such 1-point functions are infinite linear combinations of conformal blocks. The coefficients are products of double Gamma functions, times polynomial functions of loop weights. For each solution, we determine the first 6 to 12 polynomials.

ai.tldr: 在临界环模型中，环面一点函数可表示为不同中心荷下球面四点函数，并通过数值自举计算了六个最简单初级场的一点函数，得到十个模协方差解。
ai.motivation: 理解临界环模型中环面一点函数的结构及其与球面四点函数的关系。
ai.method: 利用数值自举方法，结合模协方差方程，将一点函数展开为共形块的无穷线性组合，系数由双Gamma函数和环权重的多项式函数给出。
ai.result: 确定了六个最简单初级场的一点函数，得到十个模协方差解，并计算了每个解的前6至12个多项式。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了临界环模型中环面一点函数的系统计算方法，有助于研究共形场论中的模不变性。

idea_spark.risk: 数值自举的精度可能受限于截断阶数，且多项式解的唯一性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将环面关联函数转化为球面关联函数，可能揭示共形场论中更深层的对偶关系。

en.tldr: In critical loop models, torus 1-point functions can be expressed as sphere 4-point functions at a different central charge, and we compute them for six simplest primary fields using numerical bootstrap, obtaining ten modular covariance solutions.
en.motivation: To understand the structure of torus 1-point functions in critical loop models and their relation to sphere 4-point functions.
en.method: Using numerical bootstrap with modular covariance equations, expanding 1-point functions as infinite linear combinations of conformal blocks with coefficients given by double Gamma functions and polynomial functions of loop weights.
en.result: Determined 1-point functions for six simplest primary fields, yielding ten modular covariance solutions, and computed the first 6 to 12 polynomials for each solution.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic method for computing torus 1-point functions in critical loop models, aiding studies of modular invariance in conformal field theory.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit the duality between sphere 4-point functions and torus 1-point functions to simplify solving modular covariance equations.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical bootstrap accuracy may be limited by truncation order, and uniqueness of polynomial solutions requires further verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Mapping torus correlation functions to sphere correlation functions may reveal deeper dualities in conformal field theory.

papers.title: BiTA: Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit-Transformer Aggregator in a Temporal Graph Network Framework for Alert Prediction in Computer Networks
papers.summary: Proactive alert prediction in computer networks is critical for mitigating evolving cyber threats and enabling timely defensive actions. Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNs) provide a principled framework for modeling time-evolving interactions; however, existing TGN-based methods predominantly rely on unidirectional or single-mechanism temporal aggregation, which limits their ability to capture recursive, multi-scale temporal patterns commonly observed in real-world attack behaviors. In this paper, we propose BiTA, a Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit-Transformer Aggregator for temporal graph learning. Rather than introducing a deeper or higher-capacity model, BiTA redesigns the temporal aggregation function within the TGN framework by jointly encoding bidirectional sequential dependencies and long-range contextual relations over each node's temporal neighborhood. This aggregation strategy enables complementary temporal reasoning at different scales while preserving the original TGN memory and message-passing structure. We evaluate BiTA on real-world alert datasets, demonstrating significant improvements in key performance metrics such as area under the curve, average precision, mean reciprocal rank, and per-category prediction accuracy when compared to state-of-the-art temporal graph models. BiTA outperforms baseline methods under both transductive and inductive settings, highlighting its robustness and generalization capabilities in dynamic network environments. BiTA is a scalable and interpretable framework for real-time cyber threat anticipation, paving the way toward more intelligent and adaptive intrusion detection systems.

ai.tldr: 提出BiTA框架，在时序图网络中融合双向GRU和Transformer聚合器，提升计算机网络告警预测性能。
ai.motivation: 现有TGN方法主要依赖单向或单一机制的时间聚合，难以捕捉真实攻击行为中递归、多尺度的时间模式。
ai.method: 在TGN框架内重新设计时间聚合函数，联合编码节点时间邻域上的双向序列依赖和长程上下文关系，保持原有记忆和消息传递结构。
ai.result: 在真实告警数据集上，AUC、平均精度、平均倒数排名和各类别预测准确率均优于现有时序图模型，且在直推和归纳设置下均表现鲁棒。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助网络运维人员提前预测告警，及时采取防御措施，提升入侵检测系统的智能性和适应性。

idea_spark.idea: 将双向时序编码与注意力机制结合，替代传统单向或单一聚合器，提升对复杂时间模式的捕获能力。
idea_spark.risk: 双向聚合可能增加计算开销，需评估实时部署的延迟和资源消耗。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受自然语言处理中双向编码和Transformer成功应用的启发，将其引入图时间聚合以增强时序推理。

en.tldr: Proposes BiTA, a framework that integrates bidirectional GRU and Transformer aggregator in temporal graph networks to improve alert prediction in computer networks.
en.motivation: Existing TGN methods rely on unidirectional or single-mechanism temporal aggregation, limiting their ability to capture recursive, multi-scale temporal patterns in real-world attacks.
en.method: Redesigns the temporal aggregation function within TGN by jointly encoding bidirectional sequential dependencies and long-range contextual relations over each node's temporal neighborhood, preserving the original memory and message-passing structure.

idea_spark.idea: Combine bidirectional temporal encoding with attention to replace traditional unidirectional or single aggregators, improving the capture of complex temporal patterns.
idea_spark.risk: Bidirectional aggregation may increase computational overhead; real-time deployment latency and resource consumption need evaluation.

papers.title: High-Probability Guarantees for Random Zeroth-Order (Stochastic) Gradient Descent
papers.summary: Zeroth-order optimization aims to minimize an objective function using only function evaluations, and is therefore fundamental in black-box optimization, hyperparameter tuning, bandit learning, and adversarial machine learning. While classical zeroth-order methods are well understood in expectation, much less is known about their high-probability behavior, especially for smooth and strongly convex objectives. In this paper, we establish high-probability convergence guarantees for random zeroth-order gradient descent in both deterministic and stochastic settings. For deterministic $L$-smooth and $μ$-strongly convex objectives of $d$-dimension, we show that the classical two-query random zeroth-order method finds an $\varepsilon$-suboptimal solution with probability at least $1-δ$ using   \[   \mathcal{O}\left(   \frac{dL}μ\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}   +   \log\frac{1}δ   \right)   \]   function queries. Thus, compared with the standard in-expectation complexity, only an additive logarithmic dependence on the confidence parameter is needed. For stochastic objectives, under a bounded-noise condition and without assuming uniformly bounded stochastic gradients, we prove that random zeroth-order stochastic gradient descent achieves an $\varepsilon$-suboptimal solution with probability at least $1-δ$ using   \[   \mathcal{O}\left(   \frac{   d\log(1/\varepsilon)   \left(\log(1/\varepsilon)+\log(1/δ)\right)   }{\varepsilon}   \right)   \]   queries. Our results provide high-confidence counterparts to classical expectation-based zeroth-order convergence guarantees and clarify the additional cost required to obtain reliable performance guarantees.

ai.tldr: 本文为随机零阶梯度下降在确定性和随机环境下建立了高概率收敛保证，并给出了相应的查询复杂度。
ai.motivation: 经典零阶方法在期望意义下已被充分理解，但其高概率行为（尤其是对光滑强凸目标）知之甚少，而高概率保证对于可靠性能至关重要。
ai.method: 针对确定性L-光滑μ-强凸d维目标，分析经典两查询随机零阶方法；针对随机目标，在有限噪声条件下分析随机零阶随机梯度下降。
ai.result: 确定性情形下，达到ε-次优解所需函数查询次数为O((dL/μ)log(1/ε)+log(1/δ))；随机情形下为O(d log(1/ε)(log(1/ε)+log(1/δ))/ε)。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解零阶优化在高概率下的性能，以及为获得可靠保证所需的额外代价。

idea_spark.idea: 利用集中不等式和鞅差序列分析，将期望复杂度中的对数置信项分离出来，实现仅加性依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 分析依赖于强凸性和光滑性假设，对非光滑或非凸目标可能不成立；随机情形下的噪声假设可能过于严格。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在对抗性机器学习或超参数调优中，设计具有高概率保证的零阶算法，以提升鲁棒性。

en.tldr: This paper establishes high-probability convergence guarantees for random zeroth-order gradient descent in both deterministic and stochastic settings, with explicit query complexities.
en.motivation: Classical zeroth-order methods are well understood in expectation, but little is known about their high-probability behavior, especially for smooth and strongly convex objectives, which is crucial for reliable performance.
en.method: For deterministic L-smooth μ-strongly convex d-dimensional objectives, analyze the classical two-query random zeroth-order method; for stochastic objectives under bounded-noise condition, analyze random zeroth-order stochastic gradient descent.
en.result: Deterministic: O((dL/μ)log(1/ε)+log(1/δ)) queries for ε-suboptimal solution with probability ≥1-δ. Stochastic: O(d log(1/ε)(log(1/ε)+log(1/δ))/ε) queries.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the high-probability performance of zeroth-order optimization and the additional cost for reliable guarantees.

idea_spark.idea: Use concentration inequalities and martingale difference sequences to separate the logarithmic confidence term from the expectation complexity, achieving only additive dependence.
idea_spark.risk: Analysis relies on strong convexity and smoothness; may not hold for non-smooth or non-convex objectives; noise assumption in stochastic case may be restrictive.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires designing zeroth-order algorithms with high-probability guarantees in adversarial machine learning or hyperparameter tuning for improved robustness.

papers.title: Towards Understanding the Expressive Power of GNNs with Global Readout
papers.summary: We study the expressive power of message-passing aggregate-combine-readout graph neural networks (ACR-GNNs). Particularly, we focus on the first-order (FO) properties expressible by this formalism. While a tight logical characterisation remains a difficult open question, we make two contributions towards answering it. First, we show that sum aggregation and readout suffice for GNNs to capture FO properties that cannot be expressed in the logic C2 on both directed and undirected graphs. This strengthens known results by Hauke and Wał{\k e}ga (2026) where aggregation and readout functions are specially crafted for the task. Second, we identify two natural ways of restoring characterisability (with regard to C2) for ACR-GNNs. One option is to limit local aggregation (without imposing restrictions on global readout), whilst the second is to run ACR-GNNs over graphs of bounded degree (but unbounded size). In both cases, the FO properties captured by GNNs are exactly those definable by a formula in graded modal logic with global counting modalities. Our results thus establish an innate lower- and upper-bound in terms of how far (fragments of) C2 can be taken to characterise GNNs, and imply that is indeed the unbounded interaction of aggregation and readout that pushes the logical expressive power of GNNs above C2.

ai.tldr: 研究全局读出图神经网络（ACR-GNN）的一阶逻辑表达能力，证明求和聚合与读出足以捕获C2逻辑无法表达的FO性质，并给出两种恢复C2可表征性的方法。
ai.motivation: 理解GNN的表达能力上限，特别是全局读出机制如何影响其逻辑表达能力。
ai.method: 理论分析：对比ACR-GNN与C2逻辑的FO性质捕获能力；通过限制局部聚合或限制图度数来恢复可表征性。
ai.result: 求和聚合+读出使GNN能表达C2无法表达的FO性质；限制聚合或图度数后，GNN捕获的FO性质恰为带全局计数模态的分级模态逻辑公式。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解GNN表达能力的逻辑基础，指导设计更强大的GNN架构。

idea_spark.idea: 利用全局计数模态设计新的GNN聚合函数，以提升表达能力。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果可能依赖特定假设（如图度数有界），实际应用需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从逻辑学角度重新思考GNN的聚合与读出机制，启发更优的架构设计。

en.tldr: Studies the first-order logical expressive power of ACR-GNNs with global readout, showing sum aggregation and readout suffice to capture FO properties beyond C2 logic, and identifies two ways to restore characterizability by C2.
en.motivation: To understand the upper bound of GNN expressiveness, especially how global readout affects logical expressiveness.
en.method: Theoretical analysis comparing ACR-GNNs with C2 logic; restricting local aggregation or graph degree to recover characterizability.
en.result: Sum aggregation and readout enable GNNs to express FO properties not expressible in C2; under restrictions, captured FO properties are exactly those definable in graded modal logic with global counting modalities.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the logical foundations of GNN expressiveness and guides the design of more powerful GNN architectures.

idea_spark.idea: Design new GNN aggregation functions using global counting modalities to enhance expressiveness.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results may rely on specific assumptions (e.g., bounded degree), requiring validation in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reconsider GNN aggregation and readout mechanisms from a logical perspective, inspiring better architecture design.

papers.title: Finite-sample Borel--Cantelli inequalities under mixing conditions
papers.summary: We prove explicit finite-$N$ lower bounds for $\mathbb P(\bigcup_{k=1}^N A_k)$ when the $σ$-algebras generated by an event sequence satisfy quantitative $\varphi$- or $α$-mixing bounds. The main $\varphi$-mixing estimate is obtained by a residue-class blocking argument and a one-sided approximate-independence inequality; it has a free spacing parameter $L\ge0$, spacing coefficient $1/(L+1)$, and residual terms governed by $\varphi(L+1)$. For $α$-mixing families, we derive an additive-correction analogue using strong-mixing covariance control. A windowed rate corollary and a second-order Bonferroni refinement parallel the corresponding $m$-dependent finite-sample results. The coefficient $1/(L+1)$ is sharp as a universal spacing constant only in the zero-residual sense: the full mixing classes contain $L$-dependent block constructions with $\varphi(L+1)=0$ and $α(L+1)=0$ that asymptotically attain the corresponding bound. This sharpness statement does not assert optimality of the residual penalties.

ai.tldr: 在φ-混合和α-混合条件下，证明了有限样本的Borel-Cantelli下界，并给出了尖锐的间距常数。
ai.motivation: 经典Borel-Cantelli引理通常处理独立或渐近独立事件，但实际序列常具有混合依赖性，需要有限样本的显式下界。
ai.method: 采用残差类分块论证和单边近似独立不等式处理φ-混合；对α-混合使用强混合协方差控制的加性校正。
ai.result: 得到含自由间距参数L的下界，间距系数为1/(L+1)，残差项由混合系数控制；并给出窗口化速率推论和二阶Bonferroni改进。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理混合依赖序列的联合概率下界提供显式工具，可用于统计推断和概率论应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将间距参数L视为可调超参数，在残差与紧度之间权衡，可能优化实际应用中的界。
idea_spark.risk: 残差项可能随混合系数增大而恶化，需谨慎选择L。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合Bonferroni型修正与混合控制，可启发更精细的多重检验校正方法。

en.tldr: Proves finite-sample lower bounds for Borel-Cantelli inequalities under φ- and α-mixing conditions, with a sharp spacing constant.
en.motivation: Classical Borel-Cantelli lemma assumes independence or asymptotic independence, but real sequences often exhibit mixing dependence, requiring explicit finite-sample bounds.
en.method: Uses a residue-class blocking argument and a one-sided approximate-independence inequality for φ-mixing; for α-mixing, an additive-correction via strong-mixing covariance control.
en.result: Obtains lower bounds with a free spacing parameter L, spacing coefficient 1/(L+1), and residual terms governed by mixing coefficients; includes a windowed rate corollary and second-order Bonferroni refinement.
en.help_to_user: Provides explicit tools for lower bounds on joint probabilities under mixing dependence, useful in statistical inference and probability theory.

idea_spark.idea: Treat spacing parameter L as a tunable hyperparameter to trade off residual error and tightness, potentially optimizing bounds in applications.
idea_spark.risk: Residual terms may worsen with larger mixing coefficients, requiring careful selection of L.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining Bonferroni-type corrections with mixing control may inspire more refined multiple testing adjustments.

papers.title: On Global-in-time Solutions of Incompressible MHD Equations with Small Alfvén Numbers
papers.summary: In 1965 Kraichnan pointed out that a sufficiently strong background magnetic field, i.e. the case of small Alfvén number, will reduce the nonlinear interaction and inhibit the formation of strong gradients in the magnetohydrodynamic (abbr. MHD) system with $μ=ν\geqslant 0$, where $μ$ and $ν$ are the coefficients of kinematic viscosity and resistivity resp.. This means that the MHD system with $μ=ν\geqslant 0$ admits global-in-time large perturbation solutions with small Alfvén numbers. The existence of such large perturbation solutions was first mathematically verified in Hölder spaces by Bardos--Sulem--Sulem for the case $μ=ν= 0$ in 1988, and in Sobolev spaces by Cai--Cui--Jiang--Liu for the case $μ=ν> 0$ recently. In this paper, we further found a similar result for the general case ``$μ>0$ and $ν>0$", and provide a rigorous proof by developing a new approach, which includes a key bilinear estimate for dealing with the nonlinear interaction terms. Moreover both additional results for the vanishing behavior of the nonlinear interaction and the small Alfvén number limit of solutions are also established.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了在阿尔芬数很小时，不可压缩磁流体力学方程组存在全局大扰动解，并建立了新的双线性估计来处理非线性相互作用项。
ai.motivation: Kraichnan 指出强背景磁场（小阿尔芬数）会抑制非线性相互作用，但一般粘性情形下全局大扰动解的存在性尚未被严格证明。
ai.method: 发展了一种新方法，包含关键的双线性估计，用于处理非线性相互作用项。
ai.result: 对于 μ>0 且 ν>0 的一般情形，证明了全局大扰动解的存在性，并建立了非线性相互作用的消失行为和小阿尔芬数极限。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解磁流体力学中强磁场对湍流和梯度形成的抑制作用提供了严格的数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用小阿尔芬数参数展开，将原系统分解为线性主导部分和非线性小扰动，从而证明全局存在性。
idea_spark.risk: 估计可能依赖于特定的耗散系数关系（μ=ν），推广到 μ≠ν 时可能失效。

en.tldr: This paper proves the existence of global-in-time large perturbation solutions for incompressible MHD equations with small Alfvén numbers, and develops a new bilinear estimate to handle nonlinear interaction terms.
en.motivation: Kraichnan pointed out that a strong background magnetic field (small Alfvén number) reduces nonlinear interactions, but the existence of global large perturbation solutions for the general viscous case had not been rigorously proved.
en.method: A new approach is developed, including a key bilinear estimate for dealing with the nonlinear interaction terms.
en.result: For the general case μ>0 and ν>0, global large perturbation solutions are proved to exist, and additional results on the vanishing behavior of nonlinear interaction and the small Alfvén number limit are established.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for understanding the suppression of turbulence and gradient formation by strong magnetic fields in magnetohydrodynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Use the small Alfvén number as an expansion parameter to decompose the system into a linear dominant part and a nonlinear small perturbation, thereby proving global existence.
idea_spark.risk: The estimate may rely on the specific relation μ=ν; generalization to μ≠ν might fail.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from Kraichnan's physical intuition, treat the physical parameter (Alfvén number) as a small parameter in mathematical analysis, combining physical insight with rigorous proof.

papers.title: Uniqueness of Blow-ups for the Superconductivity Free Boundary Problem
papers.summary:
We study the free-boundary equation \[   Δu=χ_{\{|
abla u|>0\}} \] near the origin. We prove that, at a singular point of \(\partial\{|
abla u|>0\}\), the quadratic blow-up is unique. As noted in \cite[Notes to Chapter 7]{PSU2012}, little is known about the singular set for this problem. The usual Weiss--Monneau monotonicity argument does not seem to apply directly, because the inactive set is determined by the vanishing of \(
abla u\), rather than by a sign condition on \(u\). The proof follows the quadratic part of the rescalings. Projecting onto the trace-free quadratic harmonics yields a finite-dimensional differential equation for the quadratic coefficient. Together with a Lyapunov identity and estimates on dyadic annuli, this implies convergence of the quadratic coefficient, and hence uniqueness of the blow-up.

ai.tldr: 研究超导自由边界问题在奇异点处二次爆破的唯一性。
ai.motivation: 超导自由边界问题的奇异集性质尚不明确，现有方法（如Weiss-Monneau单调性）因非活性集由梯度消失而非符号条件决定而难以直接应用。
ai.method: 通过重缩放二次部分，投影到无迹二次调和函数得到有限维微分方程，结合Lyapunov恒等式和dyadic环估计证明二次系数收敛。
ai.result: 证明了在奇异点处二次爆破的唯一性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了超导自由边界问题奇异点分析的新工具，可推广至类似自由边界问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用无迹二次调和函数投影将无限维问题降维，再通过单调性证明收敛。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能依赖于特定几何结构（如二次爆破），对更复杂奇异性可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将自由边界问题转化为有限维动力系统，为分析奇异集提供新视角。

en.tldr: We prove uniqueness of quadratic blow-ups at singular points for the superconductivity free boundary problem.
en.motivation: Little is known about the singular set for this problem; standard monotonicity arguments fail because the inactive set is defined by vanishing gradient rather than a sign condition.
en.method: Rescaling the quadratic part, projecting onto trace-free quadratic harmonics yields a finite-dimensional ODE; a Lyapunov identity and dyadic annulus estimates force convergence of the quadratic coefficient.
en.result: Uniqueness of the quadratic blow-up at singular points is established.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new technique for analyzing singularities in free boundary problems where the inactive set is gradient-defined.

idea_spark.idea: Project onto trace-free quadratic harmonics to reduce the infinite-dimensional problem to a finite-dimensional dynamical system, then prove convergence via monotonicity.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on the specific quadratic scaling; more complex singularities may require higher-order harmonics.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing free boundary singularities as finite-dimensional dynamical systems opens new routes for classification.

papers.title: Gradient regularity for viscosity solutions to quasilinear parabolic equations with mixed singular-degenerate structure
papers.summary: We establish regularity results for viscosity solutions to a class of quasilinear parabolic equations exhibiting nonhomogeneous degeneracy or singularity (a double phase regime) of the form \[ u_t - \big(|Du|^{\mathfrak{p}} + \mathfrak{a}(x,t)|Du|^{\mathfrak{q}}\big)Δ_p^{\mathrm N} u = f(x,t) \quad \text{in } Q_1, \] where $-1 < \mathfrak{p} < 0$, $\mathfrak{p} \leq \mathfrak{q}$, and $\mathfrak{a}, f : Q_1 \to \mathbb{R}$ are prescribed functions. Using the Jensen--Ishii method, we prove Lipschitz regularity for appropriately translated solutions. Moreover, combining this approach with intrinsic scaling techniques, we establish interior Hölder continuity estimates for the gradient. Our results extend recent work of Fang and Zhang on the homogeneous case via a different approach.

ai.tldr: 针对一类具有混合奇异-退化结构的拟线性抛物方程，证明了粘性解的Lipschitz正则性和梯度的内Hölder连续性。
ai.motivation: 扩展Fang和Zhang关于齐次情形的结果，处理非齐次双相退化或奇异情形。
ai.method: 结合Jensen–Ishii方法与内在缩放技术。
ai.result: 平移解的Lipschitz正则性以及梯度的内Hölder连续估计。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理混合奇异-退化抛物方程的正则性提供理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将双相退化结构应用于图像处理中的各向异性扩散模型。
idea_spark.risk: 非齐次项和混合指数可能使估计复杂化，需精细的缩放分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从双相正则性结果出发，设计自适应扩散算法以平衡平滑与边缘保持。

en.tldr: We prove Lipschitz regularity for translated viscosity solutions and interior Hölder gradient estimates for a class of quasilinear parabolic equations with mixed singular-degenerate double phase structure.
en.motivation: To extend the homogeneous case results of Fang and Zhang to nonhomogeneous double-phase regimes.
en.method: Combination of the Jensen–Ishii method with intrinsic scaling techniques.
en.result: Lipschitz regularity for appropriately translated solutions and interior Hölder continuity estimates for the gradient.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical regularity tools for quasilinear parabolic equations with mixed singular-degenerate structure.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the double-phase degeneracy to anisotropic diffusion models in image processing.
idea_spark.risk: Nonhomogeneous terms and mixed exponents may complicate estimates, requiring delicate scaling analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: From double-phase regularity results, design adaptive diffusion algorithms balancing smoothing and edge preservation.

papers.title: Bootstrapping with AI/ML-generated labels
papers.summary: AI/ML methods are increasingly used in economics to generate binary variables (or labels) via classification algorithms. When these generated variables are included as covariates in regressions, even small misclassification errors can induce large biases in OLS estimators and invalidate standard inference. We study whether the bootstrap can correct this bias and deliver valid inference. We first show that a seemingly natural fixed-label bootstrap, which generates data using estimated labels but relies on a corrupted version in estimation, is generally invalid unless a strong independence condition between the latent true labels and other covariates holds. We then propose a coupled-label bootstrap that jointly resamples the true and imputed labels, and show it is valid without this condition. Two finite-sample adjustments further improve coverage: a variance correction for uncertainty in estimated misclassification rates and a Hessian rotation for near-singular designs. We illustrate the methods in simulations and apply them to investigate the relationship between wages and remote work status.

ai.tldr: 研究AI/ML生成的二元变量作为回归协变量时，因分类误差导致的OLS估计偏差，并提出耦合标签自助法来纠正偏差并实现有效推断。
ai.motivation: AI/ML方法在经济学中用于生成二元变量，但分类误差会严重偏误OLS估计并破坏标准推断，需要有效的偏差校正方法。
ai.method: 提出耦合标签自助法，联合重抽样真实标签和插补标签，并引入有限样本调整（方差校正和Hessian旋转）以改善覆盖。
ai.result: 耦合标签自助法在无强独立条件下有效，而固定标签自助法仅在强独立条件下有效；有限样本调整进一步提高了覆盖精度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在使用AI/ML生成的标签进行回归分析时，识别并纠正分类误差导致的偏差，获得可靠的统计推断。

idea_spark.idea: 将耦合标签自助法扩展到非线性模型或高维设置，或结合集成学习进一步降低分类误差的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 有限样本调整可能对模型假设敏感，且计算成本较高；实际应用中分类误差率估计的准确性可能影响效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从联合重抽样真实与插补标签的思路出发，可启发设计更鲁棒的半监督推断方法，或用于处理缺失数据与测量误差的联合问题。

en.tldr: Studies bias in OLS estimators when AI/ML-generated binary variables are used as covariates due to classification errors, and proposes a coupled-label bootstrap to correct bias and achieve valid inference.
en.motivation: AI/ML methods are increasingly used in economics to generate binary variables, but classification errors can severely bias OLS estimates and invalidate standard inference, necessitating effective bias correction.
en.method: Proposes a coupled-label bootstrap that jointly resamples true and imputed labels, with finite-sample adjustments (variance correction and Hessian rotation) to improve coverage.
en.result: The coupled-label bootstrap is valid without strong independence conditions, while the fixed-label bootstrap is valid only under such conditions; finite-sample adjustments further improve coverage accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Helps users identify and correct bias from classification errors when using AI/ML-generated labels as covariates in regression, enabling reliable statistical inference.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the coupled-label bootstrap to nonlinear models or high-dimensional settings, or combine with ensemble learning to further reduce the impact of classification errors.
idea_spark.risk: Finite-sample adjustments may be sensitive to model assumptions and computationally expensive; accuracy of estimated misclassification rates in practice may affect performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of jointly resampling true and imputed labels can inspire more robust semi-supervised inference methods or approaches for handling missing data and measurement error jointly.

papers.title: CyberCane: Neuro-Symbolic RAG for Privacy-Preserving Phishing Detection with Formal Ontology Reasoning
papers.summary: Privacy-critical domains require phishing detection systems that satisfy contradictory constraints: near-zero false positives to prevent workflow disruption, transparent explanations for non-expert staff, strict regulatory compliance prohibiting sensitive data exposure to external APIs, and robustness against AI-generated attacks. Existing rule-based systems are brittle to novel campaigns, while LLM-based detectors violate privacy regulations through unredacted data transmission. We introduce CyberCane, a neuro-symbolic framework integrating deterministic symbolic analysis with privacy-preserving retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Our dual-phase pipeline applies lightweight symbolic rules to email metadata, then escalates borderline cases to semantic classification via RAG with automated sensitive data redaction and retrieval from a phishing-only corpus. We further introduce PhishOnt, an OWL ontology enabling verifiable attack classification through formal reasoning chains. Evaluation on DataPhish2025 (12.3k emails; mixed human/LLM) and Nazario/SpamAssassin demonstrates a 78.6-point recall gain over symbolic-only detection on AI-generated threats, with precision exceeding 98% and FPR as low as 0.16%. Healthcare deployment projects a 542x ROI; tunable operating points support diverse risk tolerances, with open-source implementation at https://github.com/sbhakim/Cybercane.

ai.tldr: 提出CyberCane，一种结合符号规则与隐私保护RAG的神经符号框架，用于钓鱼检测，在AI生成攻击上召回率提升78.6点，精度超98%。
ai.motivation: 隐私关键领域需要钓鱼检测系统同时满足极低误报率、透明解释、隐私合规和抗AI攻击，现有规则系统脆弱，LLM方法违反隐私法规。
ai.method: 双阶段流水线：先用轻量符号规则分析邮件元数据，边界案例通过隐私保护RAG（自动脱敏、仅钓鱼语料检索）进行语义分类，并引入PhishOnt本体实现可验证攻击分类。
ai.result: 在DataPhish2025等数据集上，AI生成威胁召回率提升78.6点，精度超98%，误报率低至0.16%，医疗部署预计ROI达542倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全团队在隐私合规前提下高效检测钓鱼邮件，尤其是AI生成的复杂攻击，并提供可解释的推理链。

idea_spark.idea: 将符号规则与RAG结合，通过本体推理增强可解释性，同时用自动脱敏解决隐私问题。
idea_spark.risk: 本体维护成本高，且对新型攻击模式的覆盖可能不足；RAG检索质量依赖语料库。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从隐私法规与AI检测的矛盾出发，用符号系统处理简单案例、RAG处理复杂案例，平衡效率与隐私。

en.motivation: Privacy-critical domains require phishing detection with near-zero false positives, transparent explanations, regulatory compliance, and robustness against AI attacks; rule-based systems are brittle, and LLMs violate privacy.
en.method: Dual-phase pipeline: lightweight symbolic rules on email metadata, then borderline cases escalated to semantic classification via privacy-preserving RAG (auto-redaction, phishing-only corpus), plus PhishOnt ontology for verifiable attack classification.
en.result: On DataPhish2025 and others, recall gain of 78.6 points on AI-generated threats, precision >98%, FPR as low as 0.16%, projected 542x ROI in healthcare.
en.help_to_user: Helps security teams detect phishing emails efficiently under privacy compliance, especially AI-generated attacks, with explainable reasoning chains.

idea_spark.idea: Combine symbolic rules with RAG, enhance explainability via ontology reasoning, and address privacy via auto-redaction.
idea_spark.risk: High ontology maintenance cost, potential coverage gaps for novel attacks; RAG quality depends on corpus.
idea_spark.inspiration: From the conflict between privacy regulations and AI detection, use symbolic system for simple cases and RAG for complex ones to balance efficiency and privacy.

papers.title: PRP, HS and LS Conjugate Gradient Methods for Interval-Valued Multiobjective Optimization Problems
papers.summary: In this article, we develop an efficient algorithm based on three special variants of the nonlinear conjugate gradient method, namely, the Polak--Ribiere--Polyak, Hestenes--Stiefel, and Liu--Story schemes for computing Pareto critical points in unconstrained interval-valued multiobjective optimization problems. The proposed algorithm incorporates a Wolfe line search strategy to determine a suitable range of step size that satisfies the standard Wolfe conditions. For each of the proposed variants of the nonlinear conjugate gradient method, we establish rigorous global convergence results under appropriate assumptions. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods, we conduct numerical experiments on a set of benchmark test problems and present a comprehensive performance profile analysis.

ai.tldr: 本文针对无约束区间值多目标优化问题，提出了基于PRP、HS和LS三种非线性共轭梯度法的算法，用于计算Pareto临界点，并采用Wolfe线搜索确定步长，证明了全局收敛性，数值实验验证了有效性。
ai.motivation: 区间值多目标优化问题在实际中广泛存在，但现有算法效率有限，需要开发更高效的求解方法。
ai.method: 将PRP、HS和LS三种非线性共轭梯度法推广到区间值多目标优化，结合Wolfe线搜索条件，迭代生成下降方向并更新步长。
ai.result: 在适当假设下证明了三种变体的全局收敛性，数值实验表明算法在基准测试问题上表现良好，性能轮廓分析展示了其竞争力。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理区间值多目标优化问题提供了一套理论保证且实用的共轭梯度算法。

idea_spark.idea: 将三种经典共轭梯度法统一框架应用于区间值多目标优化，并严格证明收敛性。
idea_spark.risk: 算法对目标函数的可微性和区间结构有依赖，可能不适用于非光滑或复杂约束问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从单目标共轭梯度法扩展到多目标区间值情形，启发其他梯度类方法（如拟牛顿法）的类似推广。

en.tldr: This paper develops an efficient algorithm based on PRP, HS, and LS nonlinear conjugate gradient methods for computing Pareto critical points in unconstrained interval-valued multiobjective optimization, using Wolfe line search and proving global convergence, with numerical experiments demonstrating effectiveness.
en.motivation: Interval-valued multiobjective optimization problems are common in practice, but existing algorithms are often inefficient, motivating the development of more efficient methods.
en.method: Three nonlinear conjugate gradient variants (PRP, HS, LS) are extended to interval-valued multiobjective optimization, combined with Wolfe line search conditions to iteratively generate descent directions and update step sizes.
en.result: Global convergence is proved under appropriate assumptions for all three variants; numerical experiments on benchmark problems show good performance, and performance profiles confirm competitiveness.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretically sound and practical conjugate gradient algorithms for interval-valued multiobjective optimization problems.

idea_spark.idea: Unify three classical conjugate gradient methods in a single framework for interval-valued multiobjective optimization with rigorous convergence proofs.
idea_spark.risk: The algorithms rely on differentiability and interval structure of objectives, limiting applicability to nonsmooth or heavily constrained problems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending single-objective conjugate gradient methods to multiobjective interval-valued settings inspires similar generalizations of other gradient-based methods (e.g., quasi-Newton).

papers.title: On the Cauchy problem for the multi-dimensional compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system: Global strong solutions with arbitrarily large initial data
papers.summary: Since the pioneering work of Korteweg (1901) and the subsequent refinement of capillary fluid models by Dunn and Serrin (1985), the global existence of strong solutions to the multi-dimensional compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg (NSK) system with arbitrarily large initial data has stood as a formidable open problem in fluid mechanics. This challenge was recently addressed by [Gu-Huang-Meng-Zhou, arXiv:2603.11762], who established the global existence of strong solutions for arbitrarily large initial data on the periodic domain $\mathbb{T}^N$ ($N=2,3$), provided that the viscosity coefficients satisfy a BD-type algebraic relation ($μ(ρ) = νρ^α, λ(ρ) = 2ν(α-1)ρ^α$) and the Korteweg stress tensor complies with a generalized Bohm identity ($κ(ρ) = \varepsilon^2 α^2 ρ^{2α-3}$). However, the existence of global strong solutions for the Cauchy problem under these conditions has remained an open question. In this paper, we resolve this problem by proving the global existence of strong solutions for the Cauchy problem ($\mathbb{R}^N$, $N=2,3$) with arbitrarily large initial data and non-vacuum far-field density. By employing a refined truncation analysis combined with an original modified Nash-Moser type iteration scheme, we overcome the difficulties arising from the lack of integrability for the density in the whole space. This result extends the large-data theory of compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg equations from bounded torus $\mathbb{T}^N$ to unbounded whole space $\mathbb{R}^N$, thus applicable to more general physical settings.

papers.title: Generalizable CT-Free PET Attenuation and Scatter Correction for Pediatric Patients
papers.summary: Computed tomography (CT)-based attenuation and scatter correction improves quantitative PET but adds radiation exposure that is particularly undesirable in pediatric imaging. Existing CT-free methods are commonly trained in homogeneous settings and often degrade under scanner or radiotracer shifts, which limits their clinical utility. We propose the Generalizable PET Correction Network (GPCN), a dual-domain network for domain-robust CT-free PET attenuation and scatter correction. GPCN combines a multi-band contextual refinement module, which models pediatric anatomical variability through wavelet-based multiscale decomposition and long-range spatial context modeling, with a frequency-aware spectral decoupling module, which performs coordinate-conditioned amplitude/phase refinement in the Fourier domain. By synergizing multi-band spatial contextual modeling with asymmetric frequency-spectrum decoupling, the network explicitly separates invariant topological structures from domain-specific noise, thereby achieving precise quantitative recovery of both anatomical organs and focal lesions. This design aims to separate anatomy-dominant structures from domain-sensitive spectral residuals and to improve robustness across heterogeneous imaging conditions. We train and evaluate the method on 1085 pediatric whole-body PET scans acquired with two scanners and five radiotracers. In both joint training and zero-shot cross-domain evaluation, GPCN outperforms representative baselines and maintains stable quantitative accuracy on unseen scanner-tracer combinations. The method is further supported by ablation, region-wise quantitative analysis, and downstream segmentation experiments. In our cohort, the CT component of the conventional protocol corresponded to an average effective dose of 10.8 mSv, indicating the potential clinical value of reliable CT-free correction for pediatric PET.

ai.tldr: 提出通用PET校正网络(GPCN)，实现无CT的儿科PET衰减与散射校正，在跨扫描仪和示踪剂场景下保持稳定性能。
ai.motivation: CT衰减校正增加辐射暴露，对儿科患者尤其不利；现有无CT方法在异构条件下泛化能力差。
ai.method: GPCN包含多频带上下文精炼模块和频率感知谱解耦模块，通过小波分解和傅里叶域坐标条件幅相精炼分离不变结构与域特定噪声。
ai.result: 在1085例儿科全身PET扫描（2种扫描仪、5种示踪剂）上，GPCN在联合训练和零样本跨域评估中优于基线，保持稳定定量精度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可靠的无CT校正方法，可减少儿科PET辐射剂量，同时保持图像质量。

idea_spark.idea: 利用傅里叶域幅相分离与多频带空间建模，显式分离解剖结构与域噪声。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖特定小波基和傅里叶变换，可能对极端域偏移敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从频域角度处理域泛化问题，启发其他跨域医学图像分析任务。

en.tldr: Proposes Generalizable PET Correction Network (GPCN) for CT-free pediatric PET attenuation and scatter correction, maintaining stable performance across scanner and tracer shifts.
en.motivation: CT-based correction adds radiation exposure undesirable in pediatrics; existing CT-free methods degrade under heterogeneous imaging conditions.
en.method: GPCN combines a multi-band contextual refinement module and a frequency-aware spectral decoupling module, using wavelet decomposition and Fourier-domain coordinate-conditioned amplitude/phase refinement to separate invariant structures from domain-specific noise.
en.result: On 1085 pediatric whole-body PET scans (2 scanners, 5 tracers), GPCN outperforms baselines in joint training and zero-shot cross-domain evaluation, maintaining stable quantitative accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reliable CT-free correction method that reduces radiation dose in pediatric PET while preserving image quality.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage Fourier-domain amplitude/phase separation and multi-band spatial modeling to explicitly disentangle anatomical structures from domain noise.
idea_spark.risk: Reliance on specific wavelet bases and Fourier transforms may be sensitive to extreme domain shifts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Addressing domain generalization from a frequency perspective inspires other cross-domain medical image analysis tasks.

papers.title: Very weak solutions of the heat equation with anisotropically singular time-dependent diffusivity
papers.summary: We investigate the heat equation with a time-dependent, anisotropic, and potentially singular diffusivity tensor. Since weak (in the Sobolev sense) or distributional solutions may not exist in this setting, we employ the framework of very weak solutions to establish the existence and uniqueness of solutions to the heat equation with singular, anisotropic, time-dependent diffusivity.

ai.motivation: 标准弱解或分布解在奇异各向异性扩散张量下可能不存在，需要更广义的解概念。
ai.method: 采用非常弱解框架，建立存在性和唯一性。
ai.result: 证明了在奇异各向异性时间依赖扩散率下热方程非常弱解的存在唯一性。

en.method: Employs the framework of very weak solutions to prove existence and uniqueness.
en.result: Proves existence and uniqueness of very weak solutions for the heat equation with singular anisotropic time-dependent diffusivity.

papers.title: OAMVOS:2nd Report for 5th PVUW MOSE Track
papers.summary: SAM-based dense trackers provide strong short-term mask propagation but remain fragile under long occlusion, fast motion, viewpoint change, and distractors. The problem is especially severe for small objects, where a few incorrect memory updates can dominate later predictions. This report presents an occlusion- and reappearance-aware extension of DAM4SAM that improves memory control rather than changing the backbone. The method augments the original SAM3 tracker with four ingredients: a reliability-aware tracking state machine, branch-based recovery, delayed DRM promotion, and a selective policy for native SAM3 memory selection. During stable tracking, the model follows the original single-path propagation process. Once confidence drops, the tracker enters an ambiguous or recovery mode, maintains a small set of candidate branches, and commits memory only after a branch is reconfirmed. For small-object disappearance and reappearance, native memory selection is temporarily bypassed so older anchors remain accessible. In addition, the first conditioning frame is explicitly preserved, and the conditioning-memory budget is moderately enlarged to improve long-gap recovery. The resulting design keeps DAM4SAM efficient in easy cases while improving robustness in sequences dominated by occlusion and reappearance.

ai.tldr: 提出一种遮挡与重现感知的DAM4SAM扩展，通过改进记忆控制提升SAM跟踪器在长遮挡、快速运动等困难场景下的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: SAM密集跟踪器在短时掩码传播上表现良好，但在长遮挡、快速运动、视角变化和干扰物下脆弱，尤其对小物体，少量错误记忆更新会主导后续预测。
ai.method: 在SAM3跟踪器基础上增加四个组件：可靠性感知跟踪状态机、分支恢复、延迟DRM提升、选择性原生SAM3记忆策略。稳定时单路径传播；置信度下降时进入模糊或恢复模式，维护候选分支，分支确认后才提交记忆；小物体消失重现时临时绕过原生记忆选择，保留旧锚点；显式保留首帧条件，适度扩大条件记忆预算。
ai.result: 设计在简单情况下保持DAM4SAM的高效性，同时在以遮挡和重现为主的序列中提升鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过改进记忆控制而非更换骨干网络来增强SAM跟踪器在复杂场景下的性能。

idea_spark.idea: 结合可靠性评估和分支恢复机制，在不确定时维护多个假设，延迟记忆提交，可减少错误累积。
idea_spark.risk: 分支维护和延迟提交可能增加计算开销，且对快速变化场景的响应延迟可能影响实时性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从跟踪状态机与分支恢复的思路出发，可探索更通用的不确定性感知记忆管理框架。

en.motivation: SAM-based dense trackers are fragile under long occlusion, fast motion, viewpoint change, and distractors, especially for small objects where few incorrect memory updates dominate later predictions.

papers.title: SemML 2.0: Synthesizing Controllers for LTL
papers.summary: Synthesizing a reactive system from specifications given in linear temporal logic (LTL) is a classical problem, finding its applications in safety-critical systems design. These systems are typically represented using either Mealy machines or AIGER circuits. We present the second version of SemML, which outperforms all state-of-the-art tools for finding either solution. Aside from implementing the classical automata-theoretic approach, our tool utilizes partial exploration and machine-learning guidance for obtaining solutions efficiently, and numerous heuristics and improvements of classic algorithms for extracting small representations of these solutions. We evaluate our tool against the existing state-of-the-art tools (in particular Strix, LtlSynt, and the previous version of SemML) on the dataset of the synthesis competition SYNTCOMP. We show that we solve significantly more instances and do so much faster than other tools, while maintaining state-of-the-art solution quality.

ai.tldr: SemML 2.0 是一个用于线性时序逻辑（LTL）规格的反应式系统综合工具，通过部分探索和机器学习引导，在 SYNTCOMP 基准上显著优于现有工具。
ai.motivation: 从 LTL 规格自动综合反应式系统是安全关键系统设计中的经典问题，现有工具在效率和可解实例数量上仍有提升空间。
ai.method: 在经典自动机理论方法基础上，引入部分探索和机器学习引导策略，并采用多种启发式算法和经典算法改进来提取紧凑的解表示。
ai.result: 在 SYNTCOMP 数据集上，SemML 2.0 比 Strix、LtlSynt 及先前版本解决了更多实例，且求解速度更快，同时保持领先的解质量。
ai.help_to_user: 如果你需要从 LTL 规格自动生成反应式系统控制器，SemML 2.0 提供了当前最先进的综合性能。

idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴强化学习中的探索-利用平衡思想来优化综合过程中的搜索方向。

en.tldr: SemML 2.0 is a tool for synthesizing reactive systems from LTL specifications, outperforming state-of-the-art tools on the SYNTCOMP benchmark via partial exploration and machine-learning guidance.
en.motivation: Synthesizing reactive systems from LTL specifications is a classical problem in safety-critical system design, where existing tools still have room for improvement in efficiency and number of solvable instances.
en.method: Building on the classical automata-theoretic approach, it incorporates partial exploration and machine-learning guidance, along with numerous heuristics and improvements of classic algorithms to extract compact solution representations.

papers.title: Layer Embedding Deep Fusion Graph Neural Network
papers.summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated impressive performance in learning representations from graph-structured data. However, their message-passing mechanism inherently relies on the assumption of label consistency among connected nodes, limiting their applicability to low-homophily settings. Moreover, since message passing operates as a hierarchical diffusion process, GNNs face challenges in capturing long-range dependencies. As network depth increases, the structural noise along heterophilic edges tends to be amplified, resulting in over-smoothing. This issue becomes especially prominent in highly heterophilic graphs, where the propagation of inconsistent semantics across the topology continually exacerbates misaggregation. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework named Layer Embedding Deep Fusion Graph Neural Network (LEDF-GNN). Specifically, we design a Layer Embedding Deep Fusion (LEDF) operator that nonlinearly fuses multi-layer embeddings to capture inter-layer dependencies and effectively alleviate deep propagation degradation. Meanwhile, to mitigate structural heterophily, LEDF-GNN employs a Dual-Topology Parallel Strategy (DTPS) that simultaneously leverages the original and reconstructed topologies, allowing for adaptive structure-semantics co-optimization under diverse homophily conditions. Extensive semi-supervised classification experiments on the citation and image benchmarks demonstrate that, under both homophilic and heterophilic settings, LEDF-GNN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating its effectiveness and generalization capability across diverse graph types.

ai.tldr: 提出LEDF-GNN，通过层嵌入深度融合和双拓扑并行策略，解决图神经网络在异配图上的过平滑和长程依赖问题。
ai.motivation: 传统GNN依赖同配假设，在异配图中消息传递放大结构噪声导致过平滑，且难以捕获长程依赖。
ai.method: 设计LEDF算子非线性融合多层嵌入以缓解深层退化；采用DTPS同时利用原始和重构拓扑实现自适应结构-语义协同优化。
ai.result: 在引文和图像基准的半监督分类实验中，LEDF-GNN在同配和异配设置下均优于现有基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过融合多层嵌入和双拓扑策略提升GNN在异配图上的性能。
