en.tldr: Proposes LEDF-GNN, which uses layer embedding deep fusion and a dual-topology parallel strategy to address over-smoothing and long-range dependencies in heterophilic graphs.
en.motivation: Traditional GNNs rely on homophily assumption; in heterophilic graphs, message passing amplifies structural noise leading to over-smoothing and difficulty capturing long-range dependencies.
en.method: Designs LEDF operator to nonlinearly fuse multi-layer embeddings to alleviate deep degradation; employs DTPS to leverage both original and reconstructed topologies for adaptive structure-semantics co-optimization.
en.result: Semi-supervised classification experiments on citation and image benchmarks show LEDF-GNN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines under both homophilic and heterophilic settings.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how fusing multi-layer embeddings and dual-topology strategies can improve GNN performance on heterophilic graphs.

idea_spark.risk: Dual-topology strategy may increase computational cost, and quality of reconstructed topology affects final performance.

papers.title: Sharp pathwise nonuniqueness for additive SDEs
papers.summary: We construct a family of velocity fields demonstrating the sharpness of the classical Zvonkin--Veretennikov--Davie strong well-posedness by noise regime. We consider stochastic differential equations driven by Brownian noise with drift $u$ and show that for any $α<0$, there exists a velocity field $u \in L^\infty_t C^α_x$ that admits a unique weak solution but does not satisfy pathwise uniqueness (and hence has no strong solutions). This contrasts with the case $α\geq 0$, for which the existence of a unique strong solution is guaranteed. The velocity field construction is random, and the proof essentially uses central limit theorem scaling through the Berry--Esseen theorem. We also give natural extensions to non-Brownian driving noises, including nonuniqueness for arbitrary driving noises with certain Hölder regularities and an analogous sharpness of the strong well-posedness by noise regime for fractional Brownian motions.

ai.tldr: 构造速度场证明加性随机微分方程在噪声驱动下路径唯一性失效的临界性。
ai.motivation: 经典Zvonkin–Veretennikov–Davie理论表明噪声可改善强适定性，但临界正则性边界尚不明确。
ai.method: 利用Berry–Esseen定理的中心极限定理缩放构造随机速度场，分析Hölder指数α<0时的弱解与路径唯一性。
ai.result: 存在L^∞_t C^α_x（α<0）速度场使方程有唯一弱解但无路径唯一性，与α≥0时强解存在形成对比。
ai.help_to_user: 明确噪声改善适定性的临界正则性阈值，指导SDE理论分析与数值方法设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用随机速度场的尺度不变性构造反例，可能启发非高斯噪声下路径唯一性的新判据。
idea_spark.risk: 构造依赖特定噪声统计特性，推广至一般噪声时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 中心极限定理的缩放行为可视为噪声“平滑”效应的定量刻画，类似思想或可用于随机偏微分方程。

en.tldr: Constructs velocity fields proving sharpness of pathwise nonuniqueness for additive SDEs driven by noise.
en.motivation: Classical Zvonkin–Veretennikov–Davie theory shows noise improves strong well-posedness, but the critical regularity boundary was unclear.
en.method: Uses Berry–Esseen theorem and central limit theorem scaling to build random velocity fields; analyzes weak solutions and pathwise uniqueness for Hölder exponent α<0.
en.result: Existence of velocity fields in L^∞_t C^α_x (α<0) yielding unique weak solutions but failing pathwise uniqueness, contrasting with α≥0 where strong solutions exist.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the critical regularity threshold for noise-induced well-posedness, guiding SDE theory and numerical methods.

idea_spark.idea: Scale invariance of random velocity fields may inspire new criteria for pathwise uniqueness under non-Gaussian noise.
idea_spark.risk: Construction relies on specific noise statistics; generalization to arbitrary noises may fail.
idea_spark.inspiration: Central limit theorem scaling quantifies noise's smoothing effect, a concept potentially transferable to stochastic PDEs.

papers.title: Local regularity for anisotropic magnetic operators with general codimension singularities
papers.summary: We study local regularity properties of solutions to stationary anisotropic magnetic Schrödinger equations in $\mathbb{R}^d$, $d \ge 2$, arising from singular magnetic potentials concentrated along manifolds of general codimension $2 \le n \le d$. The magnetic interaction is modeled through a covariant gradient of the form \[ \nabla_m u = (iM\nabla + A)u, \] where $M^T M$ is a uniformly elliptic matrix encoding anisotropy and $A$ is a magnetic potential with critical Hardy-type scaling along the $n$-codimensional singular set $Σ_0$; that is, $A\sim \mathrm{dist}(\cdot,Σ_0)^{-1}$. We establish local Hölder $C^{0,α}$ and Schauder $C^{1,α}$ estimates for weak solutions via a blow-up analysis adapted to the magnetic structure. The regularity is deeply influenced by the combined effect of anisotropy and the singular magnetic potential, which determines the spectrum of the limiting spherical Laplace-Beltrami operator arising in the blow-up at the singular set. Our model is motivated by the study of magnetic potentials generated by shrinking solenoids onto an axis $Σ_0$, in the three-dimensional setting $d=3$, $n=2$, leading to Aharonov-Bohm-type (AB) models. In this framework, we show that the geometry of the solenoidal loops plays a crucial role: in particular, any deviation from planar cross-sections orthogonal to $Σ_0$ induces a twofold effect. On the one hand, it breaks the ideal AB configuration, in the sense that the magnetic field outside the solenoid is no longer vanishing. On the other hand, it yields an unexpected regularizing mechanism on the wave functions, through a positive shift in the eigenvalues of the asymptotic spectral problem. This purely three-dimensional effect is consistent with our $C^{1,α}$ regularity.

ai.tldr: 研究各向异性磁Schrödinger方程在一般余维奇异集上的局部正则性，建立了C^{0,α}和C^{1,α}估计，并揭示了三维螺线管几何偏离理想AB构型时的正则化效应。
ai.motivation: 理解各向异性与奇异磁势共同作用下解的局部正则性，特别是三维螺线管收缩至轴时产生的Aharonov-Bohm型模型。
ai.method: 采用适应磁结构的爆破分析，将问题约化为极限球面Laplace-Beltrami算子的谱问题。
ai.result: 建立了局部Hölder和Schauder估计，并发现三维螺线管截面偏离正交平面时，磁势不再消失且特征值正移，从而产生正则化效应。
ai.help_to_user: 为各向异性磁势奇异PDE的正则性理论提供分析框架，尤其适用于低维奇异集上的磁相互作用问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用螺线管几何偏离引起的特征值正移，设计人工磁势以调控波函数的正则性。
idea_spark.risk: 三维效应可能不直接推广到更高维或不同几何构型，需验证谱偏移的普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理螺线管收缩模型出发，将几何偏差转化为数学上的正则化机制，启发利用几何扰动改善PDE解的正则性。

zh.tldr: 研究各向异性磁Schrödinger方程在一般余维奇异集上的局部正则性，建立了C^{0,α}和C^{1,α}估计，并揭示了三维螺线管几何偏离理想AB构型时的正则化效应。
zh.motivation: 理解各向异性与奇异磁势共同作用下解的局部正则性，特别是三维螺线管收缩至轴时产生的Aharonov-Bohm型模型。
zh.method: 采用适应磁结构的爆破分析，将问题约化为极限球面Laplace-Beltrami算子的谱问题。
zh.result: 建立了局部Hölder和Schauder估计，并发现三维螺线管截面偏离正交平面时，磁势不再消失且特征值正移，从而产生正则化效应。
zh.help_to_user: 为各向异性磁势奇异PDE的正则性理论提供分析框架，尤其适用于低维奇异集上的磁相互作用问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用螺线管几何偏离引起的特征值正移，设计人工磁势以调控波函数的正则性。
idea_spark.risk: 三维效应可能不直接推广到更高维或不同几何构型，需验证谱偏移的普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理螺线管收缩模型出发，将几何偏差转化为数学上的正则化机制，启发利用几何扰动改善PDE解的正则性。

en.tldr: We study local regularity for anisotropic magnetic Schrödinger equations with singular potentials on general codimension sets, establishing C^{0,α} and C^{1,α} estimates, and reveal a regularizing effect when 3D solenoid cross-sections deviate from orthogonality.
en.motivation: To understand the combined influence of anisotropy and singular magnetic potentials on local regularity, especially for Aharonov-Bohm-type models arising from shrinking solenoids onto an axis.
en.method: A blow-up analysis adapted to the magnetic structure reduces the problem to the spectrum of a limiting spherical Laplace-Beltrami operator.
en.result: Local Hölder and Schauder estimates are established; in 3D, deviation from planar cross-sections yields a positive spectral shift and a regularizing effect on wave functions.
en.help_to_user: Provides an analytical framework for regularity of anisotropic PDEs with singular magnetic potentials, particularly applicable to low-codimension singular sets.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit the positive spectral shift from geometric deviation to design artificial magnetic potentials that enhance regularity of solutions.
idea_spark.risk: The 3D effect may not generalize to higher dimensions or different geometries; universality of the spectral shift needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from a physical solenoid model, geometric deviation is translated into a mathematical regularizing mechanism, inspiring the use of geometric perturbations to improve PDE regularity.

papers.title: VitaminP: cross-modal learning enables whole-cell segmentation from routine histology
papers.summary: Accurate whole-cell and nuclear segmentation is essential for precision pathology and spatial omics, yet routine hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) staining provides limited cytoplasmic contrast, restricting analyses to nuclei. Multiplex immunofluorescence (mIF) facilitates precise whole-cell delineation but remains constrained by cost and accessibility. We introduce VitaminP, a cross-modal learning framework enabling whole cell segmentation from H&E images. By learning from paired H&E-mIF data, VitaminP transfers molecular boundary information from mIF to overcome cytoplasmic contrast in H&E, establishing cross-modal supervision as a general strategy for recovering missing biological structure. We train VitaminP on 14 public datasets covering 34 cancer types and over 7 million instances, integrating publicly available labels with extensive annotations generated in this study, forming one of the largest resources for segmentation. VitaminP outperforms four state-of-the-art methods and generalizes to unseen datasets, including an in-house dataset spanning 24 rare cancer types. We further developed VitaminPScope, an open-source platform providing an interface for scalable inference and enabling broad adoption.

ai.tldr: 提出VitaminP框架，通过跨模态学习从常规H&E染色实现全细胞分割，克服细胞质对比度不足的问题。
ai.motivation: 常规H&E染色缺乏细胞质对比度，只能进行核分割；多重免疫荧光（mIF）可精确分割全细胞但成本高、可及性差。
ai.method: 利用配对的H&E-mIF数据，通过跨模态监督将mIF的分子边界信息迁移到H&E图像，训练14个公开数据集（34种癌症类型、超700万实例）。
ai.result: VitaminP优于四种最先进方法，并泛化到未见数据集（包括24种罕见癌症的内部数据集）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助病理学家和研究人员从常规H&E染色中直接获得全细胞分割结果，无需昂贵的mIF实验。

idea_spark.idea: 利用配对多模态数据，将一种模态的丰富信息（如mIF的细胞边界）迁移到另一种更易获取的模态（如H&E）。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量配对数据，若配对不精确或模态差异过大，迁移效果可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将分子边界信息视为可迁移的“结构先验”，启发其他医学图像中缺失信息的恢复方法。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量配对数据，若配对不精确或模态差异过大，迁移效果可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将分子边界信息视为可迁移的“结构先验”，启发其他医学图像中缺失信息的恢复方法。

en.tldr: VitaminP enables whole-cell segmentation from routine H&E histology via cross-modal learning, overcoming limited cytoplasmic contrast.
en.motivation: Routine H&E staining lacks cytoplasmic contrast, restricting analysis to nuclei; multiplex immunofluorescence (mIF) enables precise whole-cell delineation but is costly and less accessible.
en.method: Learns from paired H&E-mIF data to transfer molecular boundary information from mIF to H&E, trained on 14 public datasets covering 34 cancer types and over 7 million instances.
en.result: VitaminP outperforms four state-of-the-art methods and generalizes to unseen datasets, including an in-house dataset of 24 rare cancer types.
en.help_to_user: Enables whole-cell segmentation directly from routine H&E images, eliminating the need for expensive mIF experiments.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage paired multi-modal data to transfer rich information (e.g., cell boundaries from mIF) to a more accessible modality (e.g., H&E).
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality paired data; inaccurate pairing or large modality gap may degrade transfer performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treat molecular boundary information as a transferable 'structural prior', inspiring methods to recover missing information in other medical images.

papers.title: Scalable First-Order Interior Point Trust Region Algorithms for Linearly Constrained Optimization
papers.summary: Computing approximate Karush--Kuhn--Tucker (KKT) points for constrained nonconvex programs is a fundamental problem in mathematical programming. Interior-point trust-region (IPTR) methods are particularly attractive for such problems because they maintain strictly feasible iterates throughout the iterative process and converge to a first-order and second-order KKT solution. Their scalability, however, is limited by the repeated computation of trust-region search directions. In this paper, we propose an approximate first-order IPTR framework that addresses this bottleneck by replacing exact trust-region subproblem solves with an approximate projector maintained through low-rank updates. The resulting method preserves feasibility and the global convergence guarantees of standard IPTR schemes while substantially reducing the per-iteration cost. We further extend the framework to obtain approximate second-order KKT points using only first-order information by integrating a gradient-based negative-curvature routine, thus avoiding explicit Hessian computations. We conduct numerical experiments to demonstrate the scalability of our approximate first-order IPTR framework in large-scale settings, where it achieves up to a $2.48\times$ speedup over the existing first-order IPTR algorithm.

ai.tldr: 提出一种可扩展的一阶内点信赖域算法，通过低秩更新近似投影子问题求解，大幅降低每次迭代成本，并利用梯度负曲率例程避免显式Hessian计算，在大规模线性约束非凸优化中取得2.48倍加速。
ai.motivation: 标准内点信赖域方法因反复求解精确信赖域子问题而难以扩展，需要降低每步计算开销同时保持收敛保证。
ai.method: 用低秩更新维护的近似投影器替代精确子问题求解，并集成基于梯度的负曲率例程以仅用一阶信息获得近似二阶KKT点。
ai.result: 在保持可行性和全局收敛性的前提下，每步成本显著降低，大规模实验中比现有的一阶内点信赖域算法快2.48倍。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理大规模线性约束非凸优化问题提供高效且收敛有保证的一阶算法，适合工程与科学计算中的实际应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将低秩更新与负曲率例程结合，在仅用一阶信息的情况下逼近二阶最优性，可能启发设计更通用的无Hessian二阶方法。
idea_spark.risk: 近似投影的精度可能影响收敛速度或导致次优解，需要仔细控制低秩更新的秩与更新频率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从线性代数中的低秩近似（如随机SVD）获得灵感，将精确子问题求解替换为可维护的近似，平衡计算与精度。

zh.help_to_user: 为处理大规模线性约束非凸优化问题提供高效且收敛有保证的一阶算法，适合工程与科学计算中的实际应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将低秩更新与负曲率例程结合，在仅用一阶信息的情况下逼近二阶最优性，可能启发设计更通用的无Hessian二阶方法。
idea_spark.risk: 近似投影的精度可能影响收敛速度或导致次优解，需要仔细控制低秩更新的秩与更新频率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从线性代数中的低秩近似（如随机SVD）获得灵感，将精确子问题求解替换为可维护的近似，平衡计算与精度。

en.tldr: Proposes a scalable first-order interior-point trust-region algorithm that replaces exact subproblem solves with low-rank updated approximate projectors, achieving up to 2.48x speedup on large-scale linearly constrained nonconvex optimization while preserving feasibility and global convergence.
en.motivation: Standard interior-point trust-region methods are not scalable due to repeated exact trust-region subproblem solves; per-iteration cost must be reduced without sacrificing convergence guarantees.
en.method: Replaces exact trust-region subproblem solves with an approximate projector maintained via low-rank updates, and integrates a gradient-based negative-curvature routine to obtain approximate second-order KKT points using only first-order information.
en.result: Significantly reduces per-iteration cost while preserving feasibility and global convergence; achieves up to 2.48x speedup over existing first-order IPTR algorithm in large-scale experiments.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and provably convergent first-order algorithm for large-scale linearly constrained nonconvex optimization, suitable for practical engineering and scientific computing.

idea_spark.idea: Combining low-rank updates with a negative-curvature routine to approximate second-order optimality using only first-order information may inspire general Hessian-free second-order methods.
idea_spark.risk: Approximation accuracy may affect convergence speed or lead to suboptimal solutions; careful control of the rank and update frequency is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by low-rank approximations in linear algebra (e.g., randomized SVD), replacing exact subproblem solves with maintainable approximations balances computation and accuracy.

papers.title: MotionHiFlow: Text-to-motion via hierarchical flow matching
papers.summary: Text-to-motion generation aims to generate 3D human motions that are tightly aligned with the input text while remaining physically plausible and rich in fine-grained detail. Although recent approaches can produce complex and natural movements, they usually operate at only one temporal scale, which limits both semantic alignment and temporal coherence. Inspired by the fact that complex motions are conceptualized hierarchically rather than at a single temporal scale in the human cognitive system, we propose \textit{MotionHiFlow}, a hierarchical flow matching framework to generate motion progressively by constructing flow path from low to high temporal scales. The flows at lower scales capture high-level semantics and coarse motion structures, while flows at higher scales refine temporal details. To link the flows across scales, we introduce a novel cross-scale transition process, ensuring continuity and preserving noise consistency. Furthermore, by integrating a Text-Motion Diffusion Transformer and a topology-aware Motion VAE, MotionHiFlow explicitly models structural dependencies among joints via joint-aware positional encoding and skeletal topology, enabling precise semantic alignment alongside fine-grained motion details. Extensive experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, with ablation studies confirming the effectiveness of the hierarchical design and key components. Code is available at https://github.com/ai-lh/MotionHiFlow.

ai.tldr: 提出MotionHiFlow，一种分层流匹配框架，通过从低到高时间尺度逐步生成运动，实现文本到3D人体运动的高质量生成。
ai.motivation: 现有方法通常只在单一时间尺度上操作，限制了语义对齐和时间连贯性；受人类认知系统分层处理复杂运动的启发，设计分层流匹配框架。
ai.method: 构建从低到高时间尺度的流路径，低尺度捕获高层语义和粗运动结构，高尺度细化时间细节；引入跨尺度过渡过程保证连续性和噪声一致性；集成文本-运动扩散变压器和拓扑感知运动VAE，通过关节感知位置编码和骨骼拓扑显式建模关节结构依赖。
ai.result: 在HumanML3D和KIT-ML基准上达到最先进性能，消融实验验证了分层设计和关键组件的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种生成与文本紧密对齐、物理合理且细节丰富的3D人体运动的新方法，代码已开源。

idea_spark.idea: 将分层时间尺度思想与流匹配结合，通过跨尺度过渡保持噪声一致性，可能启发多尺度生成模型的设计。
idea_spark.risk: 分层设计可能增加计算复杂度，跨尺度过渡的稳定性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 人类认知系统的分层处理机制可启发AI模型在时间序列生成中采用多尺度策略。

zh.tldr: 提出MotionHiFlow，一种分层流匹配框架，通过从低到高时间尺度逐步生成运动，实现文本到3D人体运动的高质量生成。
zh.motivation: 现有方法通常只在单一时间尺度上操作，限制了语义对齐和时间连贯性；受人类认知系统分层处理复杂运动的启发，设计分层流匹配框架。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种生成与文本紧密对齐、物理合理且细节丰富的3D人体运动的新方法，代码已开源。

idea_spark.idea: 将分层时间尺度思想与流匹配结合，通过跨尺度过渡保持噪声一致性，可能启发多尺度生成模型的设计。
idea_spark.risk: 分层设计可能增加计算复杂度，跨尺度过渡的稳定性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 人类认知系统的分层处理机制可启发AI模型在时间序列生成中采用多尺度策略。

en.tldr: Proposes MotionHiFlow, a hierarchical flow matching framework that progressively generates motion from low to high temporal scales for text-to-3D human motion generation.
en.motivation: Existing methods operate at a single temporal scale, limiting semantic alignment and temporal coherence; inspired by human cognitive system's hierarchical processing of complex motions.
en.method: Constructs flow paths from low to high temporal scales, where lower scales capture high-level semantics and coarse motion structures, and higher scales refine temporal details; introduces cross-scale transition for continuity and noise consistency; integrates Text-Motion Diffusion Transformer and topology-aware Motion VAE with joint-aware positional encoding and skeletal topology.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on HumanML3D and KIT-ML benchmarks; ablation studies confirm effectiveness of hierarchical design and key components.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new method for generating physically plausible, text-aligned 3D human motions with fine-grained details; code is open-source.

idea_spark.idea: Combining hierarchical temporal scales with flow matching and cross-scale transition for noise consistency may inspire multi-scale generative model designs.
idea_spark.risk: Hierarchical design may increase computational complexity; stability of cross-scale transition needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Human cognitive system's hierarchical processing can inspire AI models to adopt multi-scale strategies in temporal sequence generation.

papers.title: Multispectral airborne laser scanning dataset for tree species classification: MS-ALS-SPECIES
papers.summary: The shift from stand-level to individual-tree-level forest assessments supports improved biodiversity mapping, particularly in boreal ecosystems where tree species like aspen (Populus tremula L.) play a keystone role. While airborne laser scanning (ALS) is the standard for such inventories, a major limitation is the small number of publicly available ALS datasets containing high-quality, field-validated reference data. Furthermore, open multispectral ALS datasets with high-quality field reference data are completely lacking despite the potential of multispectral ALS data for tree species classification. This paper presents and details an open multispectral ALS dataset used in a recent international benchmarking study of machine learning and deep learning methods for tree species classification by Taher et al. (2026). The dataset comprises 6326 segment-level point clouds of individual trees representing nine species in Southern Finland. The point cloud data has been acquired using two multispectral laser scanning systems each operating at three laser wavelengths: a helicopter-borne system (HeliALS) with a point density exceeding 1000 points/m$^2$ and an Optech Titan system with approximately 35 points/m$^2$. We provide a detailed description of field data collection techniques developed in the study to facilitate the collection of high-quality ground truth data in an efficient and scalable manner. Additionally, our article presents new analyses on species classification using multispectral data building upon the initial findings of Taher et al. (2026). Furthermore, we study the relation between classification accuracy and tree height to highlight the versatility of the open dataset and to demonstrate the advantage of the point transformer model for small trees and minority species.

ai.tldr: 本文介绍了一个公开的多光谱机载激光扫描数据集，用于芬兰南部九种树种的个体树分类，包含6326个点云样本，并提供了新的分类分析。
ai.motivation: 现有公开的多光谱ALS数据集缺乏高质量实地验证数据，限制了树种分类研究。
ai.method: 使用两种多光谱激光扫描系统（HeliALS和Optech Titan）采集点云，结合高效实地数据收集技术，并采用点变换器模型进行分类。
ai.result: 数据集支持九种树种的分类，点变换器模型在小树和少数树种上表现更优，分类精度与树高相关。
ai.help_to_user: 该数据集和基准测试结果可直接用于开发和验证树种分类算法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该数据集探索多光谱点云中光谱与几何特征的融合，提升少数树种的分类性能。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集仅覆盖芬兰南部，可能不适用于其他地理区域的树种。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将点变换器与多光谱特征结合，用于城市树木或农业作物的分类。

idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将点变换器与多光谱特征结合，用于城市树木或农业作物的分类。

en.tldr: This paper presents an open multispectral airborne laser scanning dataset for individual tree species classification of nine species in Southern Finland, comprising 6326 point clouds, along with new classification analyses.
en.motivation: Publicly available multispectral ALS datasets with high-quality field reference data are lacking, limiting tree species classification research.
en.method: Point clouds were acquired using two multispectral laser scanning systems (HeliALS and Optech Titan) with efficient field data collection, and classification was performed using a point transformer model.
en.result: The dataset supports classification of nine species; the point transformer model performs better on small trees and minority species, and classification accuracy correlates with tree height.
en.help_to_user: This dataset and benchmark results can be directly used to develop and validate tree species classification algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Explore fusion of spectral and geometric features in multispectral point clouds to improve classification of minority species using this dataset.
idea_spark.risk: The dataset covers only Southern Finland, which may limit applicability to other geographic regions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying point transformer with multispectral features to urban tree or agricultural crop classification.

papers.title: Breaking Degradation Coupling: A Structural Entropy Guided Decoupled Framework and Benchmark for Infrared Enhancement
papers.summary: Thermal infrared image enhancement aims to restore high-quality images from complex compound degradations. Existing all-in-one approaches typically employ a single shared backbone to handle diverse degradations, which causes gradient interference and parameter competition. To address this, we propose a Structural Entropy-Guided Decoupled (SEGD) Framework. Unlike unified modeling paradigms, SEGD decomposes compound degradations into independent sub-processes and models them in a divide-and-conquer manner through Degradation-Specific Residual Modules (DRMs). Each DRM focuses on residual estimation for a specific degradation, enabling task decoupling while remaining jointly trainable, which mitigates parameter contention. A Degradation-Aware Evidential Network further estimates degradation type and intensity, providing priors that adaptively regulate DRM restoration strength. To handle compound cases, DRMs are composed in varying orders to form multiple restoration paths, from which the most informative features are aggregated under a structural-entropy criterion, yielding decoder-ready representations with structural fidelity and degradation awareness. Integrating divide-and-conquer restoration, evidential perception, and entropy-guided adaptation, SEGD achieves fine-grained and interpretable enhancement. We also construct a nighttime TIR benchmark for evaluation under real low-light conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that SEGD surpasses state-of-the-art methods while achieving higher efficiency with fewer parameters.

papers.title: A Note on the Resolvent Algebra and Functional Integral Approach to the van Hove Model
papers.summary: This paper is a collection of the author's computational notes on the van Hove model and contains no essentially new results. We discuss, from both the operator-algebraic perspective via the Weyl algebra and the resolvent algebra and the functional integral approach, the removal of infrared and ultraviolet cutoffs and the existence of the ground state and $β$-KMS states in the case of a point source. In the infinite-volume system at finite temperature, Bose--Einstein condensation can arise.

ai.tldr: 本文是作者关于van Hove模型的计算笔记，从算子代数和泛函积分角度讨论了红外和紫外截断的去除、点源基态和β-KMS态的存在性，以及有限温度无限体积系统中的玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚。
ai.motivation: 整理和记录van Hove模型在算子代数与泛函积分框架下的计算细节，为后续研究提供参考。
ai.method: 采用Weyl代数和预解代数进行算子代数分析，同时使用泛函积分方法处理截断去除和态的存在性问题。
ai.result: 在点源情形下，红外和紫外截断可被去除，基态和β-KMS态存在；无限体积有限温度系统中可能出现玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解van Hove模型在算子代数和泛函积分方法下的数学结构，特别是截断去除和凝聚现象的条件。

idea_spark.idea: 将预解代数与泛函积分结合，可能为处理非微扰效应（如凝聚）提供新途径。
idea_spark.risk: 预解代数在复杂相互作用模型中的适用性有限，且泛函积分路径测度的严格构造可能困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法应用于自旋玻色子模型或极化子问题，探索截断去除与相变的关系。

en.tldr: This paper is a collection of computational notes on the van Hove model, discussing the removal of infrared and ultraviolet cutoffs, existence of ground state and β-KMS states for a point source, and Bose-Einstein condensation in the infinite-volume finite-temperature system, from both operator-algebraic and functional integral perspectives.
en.motivation: To compile and record computational details of the van Hove model within operator-algebraic and functional integral frameworks for future reference.
en.method: Operator-algebraic analysis using Weyl algebra and resolvent algebra, combined with functional integral methods to address cutoff removal and state existence.
en.result: For a point source, infrared and ultraviolet cutoffs can be removed, ground state and β-KMS states exist; Bose-Einstein condensation may occur in the infinite-volume finite-temperature system.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the mathematical structure of the van Hove model via operator algebras and functional integrals, especially conditions for cutoff removal and condensation.

idea_spark.idea: Combining resolvent algebra with functional integrals may offer new ways to handle non-perturbative effects like condensation.
idea_spark.risk: Resolvent algebra may have limited applicability in complex interaction models, and rigorous construction of functional integral path measures can be challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to spin-boson models or polaron problems to explore the relation between cutoff removal and phase transitions.

papers.title: Regularization of Divergent Power Sums via Fractional Extension of Differential Generators
papers.summary: We reconsider the problem of regularizing the divergent series $\sum_{n=1}^{\infty}n^α$ for $\operatorname{Re}α>-1$, and offer a regularization prescription that yields the Riemann zeta regularization as a special case. The development of the regularization is framed as a two-step problem. The first step is prescribing a regularization of the divergent sum $\sum_{n=1}^{\infty}n^m$ for every non-negative integer $m$; and the second step is the extension of the sum for non-integer $α$. The extension is obtained under the consistency condition that the regularized sum for integer $m$ emerges continuously from the sum for non-integer $α$. The scheme is specified by a differential generator $L=L(\mathrm{d}/\mathrm{d}t)$ through which a generalized spectral function (GSF), $K_L(t)$, is constructed. Under the condition that the GSF has a holomorphic complex extension $K_L(z)$ with $z=0$ as a pole, the case for integer $m$ takes the regularized value $\sum_{n=1}^{\infty} n^m = (2πi)^{-1}\oint_C L^m K_L(z) z^{-1}\mathrm{d}z$, where $C$ is a closed contour enclosing only the pole of $K_L(z)$ at the origin. On the other hand, under the consistency condition, the case for non-integer $α$ takes the value $\sum_{n=1}^{\infty}n^α=(2πi)^{-1}\int_{\tilde{C}} L^α K_L(z) z^{-1}\mathrm{d}z$, where $L^α$ is the fractional extension of $L^m$ and $\tilde{C}$ is an appropriate deformation of the contour $C$. Here, we obtain the regularization corresponding to the generator $L=h(t) \mathrm{d}/\mathrm{d}t$, where $h(t)$ has the analytic extension $h(z)$ such that $1/h(z)$ is an entire function. We find that the regularized sum is equal to the Riemann zeta regularized value plus terms determined by the generator $L$.

ai.tldr: 提出一种通过微分生成元的分数阶扩展来正则化发散幂级数的方法，将黎曼ζ正则化作为特例包含在内。
ai.motivation: 重新审视发散级数∑n^α的正则化问题，希望得到一种统一的、满足连续一致性条件的正则化方案。
ai.method: 将问题分为两步：先正则化整数幂级数，再通过分数阶扩展和围道积分推广到非整数α，并利用广义谱函数K_L(t)及其全纯延拓。
ai.result: 正则化结果等于黎曼ζ正则化值加上由生成元L决定的附加项。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解发散级数正则化的新框架，特别是如何通过微分生成元实现分数阶扩展。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将生成元L替换为其他算子（如拉普拉斯算子），探索不同正则化方案。
idea_spark.risk: 分数阶扩展的解析性要求可能限制生成元的选择，且附加项的物理意义需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从微分生成元的谱函数出发，启发我们思考发散级数与算子谱理论之间的深层联系。

en.tldr: Proposes a regularization of divergent power sums via fractional extension of differential generators, recovering Riemann zeta regularization as a special case.
en.motivation: To reconsider the regularization of the divergent series ∑n^α and obtain a unified scheme satisfying a continuity condition.
en.method: Two-step approach: first regularize integer power sums, then extend to non-integer α via fractional extension and contour integration, using a generalized spectral function K_L(t) and its holomorphic extension.
en.result: The regularized sum equals the Riemann zeta regularized value plus terms determined by the generator L.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into a new regularization framework for divergent series, especially via fractional extension of differential generators.

idea_spark.idea: Try replacing the generator L with other operators (e.g., Laplacian) to explore different regularization schemes.
idea_spark.risk: Analyticity requirements for fractional extension may restrict generator choices; physical meaning of extra terms needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The spectral function approach inspires deeper connections between divergent series and operator spectral theory.

papers.title: Non-unitary extension of Grover's search algorithm
papers.summary: We have developed a non-unitary extension of Grover's search algorithm by changing the hidden geometry of Hilbert space carried by diffusion operator. Our algorithm finds the solution for search problem by performing a unique bigger rotation rather than small rotations in order polynomial times in the size $N$ of search space. We analyze the complexity of implementing the non-unitary operation and we observed that the price paid by performing this rotation is due the normalization. In Kraus operator approach we need $O(N)$ repetition of the algorithm to have a chance of measuring a solution in a post-selection, this is no better than the classical solution. However, the quantum singular value transform in addition with block encoding and Chebyshev polynomial approximation, we got complexity $O(\sqrt{N})$ and reach the Grover's bound with an extra resource of one single qubit, compared with the standard Grover's algorithm.

ai.tldr: 通过改变扩散算子隐藏的希尔伯特空间几何，提出了Grover搜索算法的非酉扩展，实现了单次大旋转而非多次小旋转，并分析了实现复杂度。
ai.motivation: 标准Grover算法需要多项式次小旋转，本文旨在通过非酉操作实现单次大旋转，以简化搜索过程。
ai.method: 改变扩散算子隐藏的希尔伯特空间几何，采用Kraus算子方法、量子奇异值变换结合块编码和切比雪夫多项式逼近。
ai.result: Kraus算子方法需要O(N)次重复，不优于经典解；量子奇异值变换方法达到O(√N)复杂度，达到Grover界限，仅多消耗一个量子比特。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种非酉量子搜索的新思路，展示了非酉操作在量子算法中的潜力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非酉操作实现单次大旋转，可能简化其他需要多次迭代的量子算法。
idea_spark.risk: 非酉操作的后选择可能引入额外开销，实际实现中需权衡资源。
idea_spark.inspiration: 改变希尔伯特空间几何以加速搜索，启发对量子算法几何结构的重新思考。

en.tldr: A non-unitary extension of Grover's search algorithm is developed by altering the hidden geometry of Hilbert space via the diffusion operator, achieving a single larger rotation instead of multiple small rotations, with complexity analyzed.
en.motivation: Standard Grover's algorithm requires polynomial small rotations; this work aims to achieve a single large rotation via non-unitary operations to simplify the search process.
en.method: Altering the hidden geometry of Hilbert space carried by the diffusion operator, using Kraus operator approach, quantum singular value transform with block encoding and Chebyshev polynomial approximation.
en.result: Kraus operator approach requires O(N) repetitions, no better than classical; quantum singular value transform achieves O(√N) complexity, reaching Grover's bound with an extra single qubit resource.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new non-unitary quantum search approach, demonstrating the potential of non-unitary operations in quantum algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Using non-unitary operations to achieve a single large rotation may simplify other quantum algorithms that require multiple iterations.
idea_spark.risk: Post-selection in non-unitary operations may introduce additional overhead, requiring careful resource trade-offs in practical implementation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Altering Hilbert space geometry to accelerate search inspires rethinking the geometric structure of quantum algorithms.

papers.title: Impurity localization, and collision properties of symbiotic dark-bright solitons in superfluid-impurity system
papers.summary: We investigate the dynamics of a binary mixture of Bose-Einstein condensates in the impurity limit -- where one component is dilute enough to be treated like an impurity -- and confined to two dimensions. Using the mean-field coupled Gross-Pitaevskii equations, we find that the binary mixture supports the formation of stable symbiotic dark-bright solitons when the inter- and intra-component interactions are repulsive. We further study the interaction between solitons and observe that the solitons undergo merging and repulsion depending on the relative phase between the bright component of the composite structure.

ai.tldr: 研究了二维受限超流体-杂质系统中共生暗-亮孤子的形成与碰撞行为。
ai.motivation: 探索杂质极限下二元玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体中孤子的稳定性与相互作用机制。
ai.method: 采用平均场耦合Gross-Pitaevskii方程进行数值模拟。
ai.result: 发现当组分间和组分内相互作用均为排斥时，系统支持稳定的共生暗-亮孤子；孤子间相互作用依赖于亮分量的相对相位，可发生合并或排斥。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解超流体-杂质系统中的非线性激发和孤子动力学提供了理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用相对相位控制孤子碰撞，可能用于设计量子信息处理中的孤子开关或逻辑门。
idea_spark.risk: 二维系统中量子涨落可能破坏平均场描述的准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将杂质视为可控缺陷，探索孤子与杂质相互作用的量子模拟。

en.tldr: We investigate the formation and collision dynamics of symbiotic dark-bright solitons in a two-dimensional superfluid-impurity system.
en.motivation: To explore the stability and interaction mechanisms of solitons in binary Bose-Einstein condensates in the impurity limit.
en.method: We use the mean-field coupled Gross-Pitaevskii equations for numerical simulations.
en.result: Stable symbiotic dark-bright solitons form when both inter- and intra-component interactions are repulsive; soliton interactions depend on the relative phase of the bright component, leading to merging or repulsion.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical basis for understanding nonlinear excitations and soliton dynamics in superfluid-impurity systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using relative phase to control soliton collisions may enable soliton-based switches or logic gates for quantum information processing.
idea_spark.risk: Quantum fluctuations in two dimensions may challenge the accuracy of the mean-field description.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating impurities as controllable defects to explore quantum simulations of soliton-impurity interactions.

papers.title: Quantitative Hölder Regularity, Concentration, and Spectral Applications for Lyapunov Exponents of Random $GL(2,\mathbb{R})$ Cocycles, with Extensions to $GL(d,\mathbb{R})$
papers.summary: This paper develops a quantitative regularity theory for the Lyapunov exponents of random products of matrices in $GL(2,\mathbb{R})$, with extensions to $GL(d,\mathbb{R})$ for all $d \geq 2$. At every compactly supported measure $ν$ with simple Lyapunov spectrum, we give an explicit closed-form Hölder exponent $β_*(ν, θ)$ and constant in the modulus of continuity of $λ_\pm$ in the Wasserstein-plus-Hausdorff metric, depending only on the eccentricity of $\mathrm{supp}\,ν$, the Lyapunov gap, and the Hölder index $θ$. At every $ν\in \mathcal{M}_c(GL(2,\mathbb{R}))$ we identify the log-Hölder exponent of Tall and Viana as $κ_*(ν, θ) = θ/(2+θ)$ under a natural mixing hypothesis, and $θ/(8(1+θ))$ in the perpetuity regime. The same spectral-gap method yields a large deviation principle with explicit rate function, Hoeffding-Azuma concentration inequalities, an extension to Markov-chain driven cocycles with closed-form exponent, and a quantitative log-Hölder modulus of continuity for the integrated density of states of one-dimensional random Schrödinger operators with absolutely continuous disorder. The Hölder theory extends to $GL(d,\mathbb{R})$ for the top exponent under spectral simplicity, and to the partial sums $Λ_k = λ_1 + \cdots + λ_k$ under strong $k$-irreducibility, yielding Hölder continuity of each individual sub-top exponent. A method-optimality proposition shows that $β_*$ is the best exponent obtainable from the linear balance of axioms (A1)-(A3) of the spectral-gap method; strict improvement requires either modifying these axioms or adopting a different proof strategy. A lower-bound proposition adapted from Duarte, Klein, and Santos rules out uniform Hölder continuity across $\mathcal{M}_c(GL(2,\mathbb{R}))$.

ai.tldr: 本文为随机矩阵乘积的Lyapunov指数建立了定量Hölder正则性理论，给出了显式闭式指数和常数，并推广到高维和Markov链驱动情形。
ai.motivation: 现有Lyapunov指数正则性结果多为定性或非最优，缺乏显式定量估计。
ai.method: 基于谱间隙方法，结合Wasserstein-plus-Hausdorff度量、大偏差原理和浓度不等式。
ai.result: 获得了GL(2,R)中Lyapunov指数的显式Hölder指数和常数，推广到GL(d,R)及子指数，并应用于随机Schrödinger算子的态密度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了Lyapunov指数正则性的精确量化工具，可用于随机动力系统和无序系统的稳定性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用显式Hölder指数优化随机矩阵乘积的数值模拟误差界。
idea_spark.risk: 显式指数可能依赖于具体参数，通用性受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将定量正则性理论应用于量子混沌或随机矩阵理论中的谱统计。

en.tldr: This paper develops a quantitative Hölder regularity theory for Lyapunov exponents of random matrix products, providing explicit closed-form exponents and constants, with extensions to higher dimensions and Markov-driven cocycles.
en.motivation: Existing regularity results for Lyapunov exponents are often qualitative or suboptimal, lacking explicit quantitative estimates.
en.method: Based on the spectral gap method, combined with Wasserstein-plus-Hausdorff metric, large deviation principle, and concentration inequalities.
en.result: Explicit Hölder exponents and constants for Lyapunov exponents in GL(2,R), extended to GL(d,R) and sub-exponents, with applications to the density of states of random Schrödinger operators.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise quantitative tools for regularity of Lyapunov exponents, useful for stability analysis in random dynamical systems and disordered systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use explicit Hölder exponents to optimize error bounds in numerical simulations of random matrix products.
idea_spark.risk: Explicit exponents may depend on specific parameters, limiting generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply quantitative regularity theory to spectral statistics in quantum chaos or random matrix theory.

papers.title: Mean Waiting Times in Discrete-Time Priority Queues with Geometrically Distributed Idle Periods
papers.summary: This paper considers the mean waiting times in discrete-time preemptive-resume and nonpreemptive priority single-server queues fed by K independent batch Markovian arrival streams with geometrically distributed idle periods. While being active, the k-th (k = 1, 2, ..., K) arrival stream feeds at least one customer to the queue, where the number of arriving customers depends on the state of the underlying Markov chain. Service times of class $k$ customers are independent and identically distributed according to a general distribution. For these queues, we derive explicit formulae for the mean waiting times of customers in each class.

ai.tldr: 本文推导了具有几何分布空闲期的离散时间优先级队列中各类顾客的平均等待时间显式公式。
ai.motivation: 离散时间优先级队列在通信网络和计算机系统中广泛应用，但现有研究对空闲期几何分布且到达流为批量马尔可夫到达过程的情况缺乏平均等待时间的显式结果。
ai.method: 考虑K个独立批量马尔可夫到达流，服务时间服从一般分布，分别针对抢占-恢复和非抢占两种优先级规则，利用排队论和概率生成函数推导平均等待时间公式。
ai.result: 得到了各类顾客平均等待时间的显式表达式，适用于抢占和非抢占两种优先级调度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解离散时间优先级队列在突发到达和空闲期影响下的性能，为系统设计提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将空闲期分布推广为更一般的相位型分布，或引入服务时间优先级相关的动态调度策略。
idea_spark.risk: 更复杂的空闲期分布可能导致解析解难以获得，需依赖数值方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可结合机器学习预测到达模式，动态调整优先级以优化平均等待时间。

en.tldr: This paper derives explicit formulas for mean waiting times in discrete-time priority queues with geometrically distributed idle periods and batch Markovian arrival streams.
en.motivation: Discrete-time priority queues are widely used in communication networks and computer systems, but explicit mean waiting time results are lacking for the case with geometrically distributed idle periods and batch Markovian arrival streams.
en.method: Considering K independent batch Markovian arrival streams and general service time distributions, the paper derives mean waiting time formulas for preemptive-resume and nonpreemptive priority disciplines using queueing theory and probability generating functions.
en.result: Explicit expressions for mean waiting times of each customer class are obtained for both preemptive and nonpreemptive priority scheduling.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the performance of discrete-time priority queues under bursty arrivals and idle periods, providing theoretical basis for system design.

idea_spark.idea: Consider generalizing the idle period distribution to phase-type distributions or introducing dynamic priority scheduling based on service times.
idea_spark.risk: More complex idle period distributions may render analytical solutions intractable, requiring numerical methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine machine learning to predict arrival patterns and dynamically adjust priorities to optimize mean waiting times.

papers.title: GenAssets: Generating in-the-wild 3D Assets in Latent Space
papers.summary: High-quality 3D assets for traffic participants are critical for multi-sensor simulation, which is essential for the safe end-to-end development of autonomy. Building assets from in-the-wild data is key for diversity and realism, but existing neural-rendering based reconstruction methods are slow and generate assets that render well only from viewpoints close to the original observations, limiting their usefulness in simulation. Recent diffusion-based generative models build complete and diverse assets, but perform poorly on in-the-wild driving scenes, where observed actors are captured under sparse and limited fields of view, and are partially occluded. In this work, we propose a 3D latent diffusion model that learns on in-the-wild LiDAR and camera data captured by a sensor platform and generates high-quality 3D assets with complete geometry and appearance. Key to our method is a "reconstruct-then-generate" approach that first leverages occlusion-aware neural rendering trained over multiple scenes to build a high-quality latent space for objects, and then trains a diffusion model that operates on the latent space. We show our method outperforms existing reconstruction and generation based methods, unlocking diverse and scalable content creation for simulation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种3D潜在扩散模型，从野外驾驶场景的LiDAR和相机数据中生成高质量、完整几何与外观的3D交通参与者资产。
ai.motivation: 现有方法要么重建慢且视角受限，要么生成模型在稀疏、部分遮挡的野外驾驶场景中表现差。
ai.method: 采用“先重建后生成”策略：先用遮挡感知神经渲染跨场景构建高质量物体潜在空间，再在该空间上训练扩散模型。
ai.result: 在生成完整几何与外观方面优于现有重建和生成方法，为仿真提供多样可扩展的内容。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从稀疏、部分遮挡的野外数据中快速生成逼真的3D交通参与者资产，用于自动驾驶仿真。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将遮挡感知神经渲染与扩散模型结合，用于从多视角稀疏图像生成完整3D物体。
idea_spark.risk: 潜在空间质量依赖重建阶段，若重建不准确可能限制生成多样性；扩散模型训练计算成本高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经渲染与扩散模型在图像生成中的成功启发，将其扩展到3D资产生成，并针对野外数据设计遮挡处理。

en.tldr: Proposes a 3D latent diffusion model that generates high-quality 3D assets with complete geometry and appearance from in-the-wild LiDAR and camera data of driving scenes.
en.motivation: Existing methods either reconstruct slowly with limited viewpoints or generate poorly in sparse, partially occluded in-the-wild driving scenes.
en.method: Uses a 'reconstruct-then-generate' approach: first builds a high-quality latent space for objects via occlusion-aware neural rendering across scenes, then trains a diffusion model on that latent space.
en.result: Outperforms existing reconstruction and generation methods, enabling diverse and scalable content creation for simulation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users quickly generate realistic 3D traffic participant assets from sparse, partially occluded in-the-wild data for autonomous driving simulation.

idea_spark.idea: Try combining occlusion-aware neural rendering with diffusion models to generate complete 3D objects from sparse multi-view images.
idea_spark.risk: Quality of latent space depends on reconstruction stage; inaccurate reconstruction may limit generation diversity; diffusion model training is computationally expensive.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of neural rendering and diffusion models in image generation, extended to 3D asset generation with occlusion handling for in-the-wild data.

papers.title: Bridging Restoration and Generation Manifolds in One-Step Diffusion for Real-World Super-Resolution
papers.summary: Pretrained diffusion models have revolutionized real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR) but suffer from computational bottlenecks due to iterative sampling. Recent single-step distillation accelerates inference but faces a stark perception-distortion trade-off due to rigid timestep initialization, distributional trajectory mismatches, and fragile stochastic modulation. To address this, we present Adaptive Inversion and Degradation-aware Sampling for Real-ISR (IDaS-SR), a one-step framework bridging the deterministic restoration and stochastic generation manifolds. At its core, the Manifold Inversion Noise Estimator (MINE) resolves these initialization and trajectory mismatches by predicting a severity-aware timestep and inversion noise, precisely anchoring low-quality latents onto the diffusion trajectory. Furthermore, to mitigate fragile stochastic modulation, we propose CHARIOT, a continuous generative steering mechanism. By rescheduling trajectories and interpolating noise, it enables explicit navigation of the perception-distortion boundary without compromising structural priors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that IDaS-SR outperforms state-of-the-art methods, seamlessly transitioning from a rigorous structural restorer to a sophisticated texture hallucinator in a single inference step.

ai.tldr: 提出IDaS-SR框架，通过单步扩散桥接恢复与生成流形，实现真实世界超分辨率。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散模型超分辨率方法因迭代采样计算瓶颈，且单步蒸馏面临感知-失真权衡问题。
ai.method: 设计MINE估计退化感知时间步和反转噪声，结合CHARIOT连续生成引导机制，在单步内导航感知-失真边界。
ai.result: 在单步推理中超越现有方法，从结构恢复平滑过渡到纹理生成。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效的单步超分辨率方法，平衡感知质量与结构保真度。

idea_spark.idea: 将CHARIOT的连续引导机制用于可控图像生成，如风格迁移或属性编辑。
idea_spark.risk: 单步方法可能在高退化场景下丢失细节，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 流形桥接思想启发自扩散模型中的确定性反转与随机生成路径的融合。

zh.motivation: 现有扩散模型超分辨率方法因迭代采样计算瓶颈，且单步蒸馏面临感知-失真权衡问题。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种高效的单步超分辨率方法，平衡感知质量与结构保真度。

idea_spark.inspiration: 流形桥接思想启发自扩散模型中的确定性反转与随机生成路径的融合。

en.tldr: IDaS-SR bridges restoration and generation manifolds in one-step diffusion for real-world super-resolution.
en.motivation: Existing diffusion-based super-resolution suffers from iterative sampling bottlenecks and perception-distortion trade-off in single-step distillation.
en.method: MINE predicts degradation-aware timestep and inversion noise, while CHARIOT enables continuous generative steering to navigate the perception-distortion boundary.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art methods in a single inference step, transitioning from structural restoration to texture hallucination.
en.help_to_user: Offers an efficient one-step super-resolution method balancing perceptual quality and structural fidelity.

idea_spark.idea: CHARIOT's continuous steering mechanism could be applied to controllable image generation, e.g., style transfer or attribute editing.
idea_spark.risk: Single-step approach may lose details under severe degradation; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Manifold bridging is inspired by combining deterministic inversion and stochastic generation paths in diffusion models.

papers.title: Large deviation principles for pattern-avoiding permutations, and limit shapes for constrained Mallows permutations
papers.summary: We study Mallows random permutations conditioned to avoid a given pattern $α$ of length~$3$. When the bias parameter is of the form $e^{β/n}$, we prove that these permutations converge to a non-trivial explicit deterministic permuton that depends on the pattern $α$ and on the parameter $β$. Along the way, we provide parametrizations for $α$-avoiding permutons, and establish a large deviation principle for uniform $α$-avoiding permutations. As a byproduct of the proof, we also obtain asymptotic estimates of two versions of $q$-Catalan numbers in the regime $q=e^{β/n}$.

ai.tldr: 研究了在避免特定3-长度模式α的条件下，Mallows随机排列的渐近行为，证明了当偏差参数为e^{β/n}时，这些排列收敛到一个显式的确定性permuton，并建立了大偏差原理。
ai.motivation: 理解模式避免排列在非均匀权重下的极限结构，填补了模式避免排列与随机排列极限理论之间的空白。
ai.method: 利用permuton参数化、大偏差原理以及q-Catalan数的渐近估计。
ai.result: 得到了依赖于模式α和参数β的显式极限形状，并给出了两种q-Catalan数在q=e^{β/n}时的渐近估计。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了模式避免排列在指数权重下的精确极限行为，可用于统计物理和组合概率中的相关建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将模式避免条件与Mallows模型结合，利用大偏差原理推导极限形状，并借助q-Catalan数获得精确渐近。
idea_spark.risk: 结果依赖于特定参数形式e^{β/n}，可能对更一般的偏差参数不直接适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计物理中受限随机结构的极限理论出发，启发将类似方法用于其他组合约束下的随机对象。

zh.tldr: 研究了在避免特定3-长度模式α的条件下，Mallows随机排列的渐近行为，证明了当偏差参数为e^{β/n}时，这些排列收敛到一个显式的确定性permuton，并建立了大偏差原理。
zh.motivation: 理解模式避免排列在非均匀权重下的极限结构，填补了模式避免排列与随机排列极限理论之间的空白。

zh.result: 得到了依赖于模式α和参数β的显式极限形状，并给出了两种q-Catalan数在q=e^{β/n}时的渐近估计。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了模式避免排列在指数权重下的精确极限行为，可用于统计物理和组合概率中的相关建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将模式避免条件与Mallows模型结合，利用大偏差原理推导极限形状，并借助q-Catalan数获得精确渐近。
idea_spark.risk: 结果依赖于特定参数形式e^{β/n}，可能对更一般的偏差参数不直接适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计物理中受限随机结构的极限理论出发，启发将类似方法用于其他组合约束下的随机对象。

en.tldr: We study Mallows random permutations conditioned to avoid a given pattern α of length 3, proving convergence to an explicit deterministic permuton when the bias parameter is e^{β/n}, and establishing a large deviation principle.
en.motivation: To understand the limiting structure of pattern-avoiding permutations under non-uniform weights, bridging pattern avoidance and random permutation limit theory.
en.method: Using permuton parametrization, large deviation principles, and asymptotic estimates of q-Catalan numbers.
en.result: Explicit limit shapes depending on α and β, plus asymptotic estimates for two versions of q-Catalan numbers in the regime q=e^{β/n}.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise limiting behavior of pattern-avoiding permutations under exponential weights, useful for modeling in statistical physics and combinatorial probability.

idea_spark.idea: Combine pattern-avoidance constraints with the Mallows model, derive limit shapes via large deviation principles, and exploit q-Catalan numbers for exact asymptotics.
idea_spark.risk: Results rely on the specific parameter form e^{β/n} and may not directly apply to more general bias parameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by limit theories of constrained random structures in statistical physics, suggesting similar methods for other combinatorially constrained random objects.

papers.title: Wireless Mobile Charging for Emergency Electric Vehicle Routing: A Mixed-Integer and Metaheuristic Framework for In-Motion Energy Transfer
papers.summary: As electric vehicles (EVs) become central to decarbonization efforts, the need for uninterrupted power supply in time-critical logistics, particularly in medical transportation, poses unique challenges for power systems integration. Conventional fixed or mobile charging infrastructure requires vehicle downtime, which makes them unsuitable for nonstop operations such as organ delivery. This work introduces the Wireless Mobile Charging Electric Vehicle Routing Problem, a novel framework in which mobile charging trucks wirelessly transfer energy to moving EVs via inductive coupling, eliminating the need for stationary charging stops. We formulate a mixed-integer programming model that co-optimizes routing and in-motion energy transfer between heterogeneous vehicle fleets under temporal and spatial alignment constraints. To address computational complexity, we develop a hybrid Bitmask Dynamic Programming and Large Neighborhood Search algorithm, tailored to arc-level charging decisions and dual-fleet synchronization. Experiments using real-world hospital logistics data from Singapore demonstrate significant runtime improvements and higher-quality solutions compared with commercial solvers. This study advances computational power system modeling by incorporating dynamic, motion-based energy delivery that is both time- and space-dependent. The results provide actionable insights into planning mobile energy infrastructure, enhancing demand-side flexibility, strengthening resilience in emergency logistics, and integrating wireless charging into urban power systems to support flexible and zero-carbon electrified mobility.

ai.tldr: 提出无线移动充电电动汽车路径问题，通过感应耦合在行驶中为电动汽车充电，无需停车，并设计了混合整数规划与元启发式算法求解。
ai.motivation: 传统充电方式需要车辆停靠，不适用于器官运输等不间断紧急物流，亟需一种运动中能量补给方案。
ai.method: 建立混合整数规划模型，联合优化路径与运动中能量传输；开发混合位掩码动态规划与大邻域搜索算法处理双车队同步与弧级充电决策。
ai.result: 基于新加坡真实医院物流数据的实验表明，所提算法在运行时间和解质量上均优于商业求解器。
ai.help_to_user: 为规划移动充电基础设施、增强紧急物流韧性、集成无线充电到城市电力系统提供可操作见解。

en.tldr: Proposes the Wireless Mobile Charging Electric Vehicle Routing Problem, enabling in-motion energy transfer via inductive coupling, and develops a hybrid mixed-integer and metaheuristic framework.
en.motivation: Conventional charging requires vehicle stops, unsuitable for nonstop emergency logistics like organ delivery; a dynamic energy delivery method is needed.
en.method: Formulates a mixed-integer programming model co-optimizing routing and in-motion energy transfer; develops a hybrid Bitmask Dynamic Programming and Large Neighborhood Search algorithm for dual-fleet synchronization.
en.result: Experiments on real-world hospital logistics data from Singapore show significant runtime improvements and higher-quality solutions compared to commercial solvers.
en.help_to_user: Provides actionable insights for planning mobile energy infrastructure, enhancing resilience in emergency logistics, and integrating wireless charging into urban power systems.

idea_spark.idea: Joint optimization of wireless charging and routing could further incorporate dynamic electricity prices or renewable energy sources.
idea_spark.risk: Inductive coupling efficiency depends on distance and speed; real-world deployment must account for energy losses and vehicle retrofitting costs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing from demand-side flexibility in power systems, treat mobile charging trucks as dispatchable mobile energy storage units.

papers.title: Secure estimator design for Lur'e-type systems with nonuniformly and synchronously sampled measurements under attacks [extended version]
papers.summary: Motivated by the need for real-time health monitoring of power distribution grids, we propose a secure state estimator design for continuous time Lur'e type systems with non-uniformly and synchronously sampled outputs which have potentially been maliciously corrupted. The secure state estimator provides state estimates with accuracy independent of the sensor attack, when less than half of the sensors are under attack and when all inter-sample times are upper bounded. We show convergence of the state estimation error under an impulsive system framework and provide an upper bound on the estimation error that is independent of the attack signals. The stability conditions are formulated as linear matrix inequalities, which can be used to design the observer parameters. We demonstrate the capabilities of the proposed secure state estimator on a low-voltage power distribution grid.

ai.tldr: 针对受攻击的Lur'e型系统，提出一种安全状态估计器，利用非均匀同步采样输出，在少于一半传感器受攻击时保证估计精度。
ai.motivation: 电力配电网实时健康监测需要抵御传感器攻击的安全状态估计方法。
ai.method: 基于脉冲系统框架设计安全状态估计器，稳定性条件转化为线性矩阵不等式。
ai.result: 估计误差与攻击信号无关，且当采样间隔有上界时误差收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可证明安全的估计器设计方法，适用于配电网等关键基础设施。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非均匀采样和脉冲系统分析，突破传统均匀采样假设，更贴合实际通信约束。
idea_spark.risk: 要求攻击传感器少于一半，实际中攻击者可能协同破坏更多传感器。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合事件触发采样与安全估计，减少通信负载同时保持安全性。

en.help_to_user: Provides a provably secure estimator design method applicable to critical infrastructure like power grids.

papers.title: Triple-Phase Sequential Fusion Network for Hepatobiliary Phase Liver MRI Synthesis
papers.summary: Gadoxetate disodium-enhanced MRI is essential for the detection and characterization of hepatocellular carcinoma. However, acquisition of the hepatobiliary phase (HBP) requires a prolonged post-contrast delay, which reduces workflow efficiency and increases the risk of motion artifacts. In this study, we propose a Triple-Phase Sequential Fusion Network (TriPF-Net) to synthesize HBP images by leveraging the sequential information from pre-HBP sequences: while T1-weighted imaging serves as the indispensable baseline, the model adaptively integrates arterial-phase (AP) and venous-phase (VP) features when available. By modeling the tissue-specific contrast uptake and excretion dynamics across these three phases, TriPF-Net ensures robust HBP synthesis even under the stochastic absence of one or both dynamic contrast-enhanced sequences. The framework comprises an Enhanced Region-Guided Encoder and a Dynamic Feature Unification Module, optimized with a Region-Guided Sequential Fusion Loss to maintain physiological consistency. In addition, clinical variables, including age, sex, total bilirubin, and albumin, are incorporated to enhance physiological consistency. Compared with conventional methods, TriPF-Net achieved superior performance on datasets from two centers. On the internal dataset, the model achieved an MAE of 10.65, a PSNR of 23.27, and an SSIM of 0.76. On the external validation dataset, the corresponding values were 12.41, 23.11, and 0.78, respectively. This flexible solution enhances clinical workflow and lesion depiction, potentially eliminating the need for delayed HBP acquisition in HCC imaging.

ai.motivation: 肝胆期MRI需长时间延迟，影响效率且易产生运动伪影，亟需合成方法。
ai.method: 三阶段顺序融合网络，含增强区域引导编码器和动态特征统一模块，并融入临床变量。
ai.result: 在两个中心数据集上优于传统方法，内部MAE 10.65，PSNR 23.27，SSIM 0.76。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用多期增强MRI时序信息合成肝胆期图像。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用缺失模态下的鲁棒合成，适用于实际临床数据不完整场景。

en.method: Triple-phase sequential fusion network with enhanced region-guided encoder and dynamic feature unification module, incorporating clinical variables.
en.result: Outperforms conventional methods on two-center datasets; internal MAE 10.65, PSNR 23.27, SSIM 0.76.

papers.title: AdaMamba: Adaptive Frequency-Gated Mamba for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
papers.summary: Accurate long-term time series forecasting (LTSF) requires the capture of complex long-range dependencies and dynamic periodic patterns. Recent advances in frequency-domain analysis offer a global perspective for uncovering temporal characteristics. However, real-world time series often exhibit pronounced cross-domain heterogeneity where variables that appear synchronized in the time domain can differ substantially in the frequency domain. Existing frequency-based LTSF methods often rely on implicit assumptions of cross-domain homogeneity, which limits their ability to adapt to such intricate variability. To effectively integrate frequency-domain analysis with temporal dependency learning, we propose AdaMamba, a novel framework that endogenizes adaptive and context-aware frequency analysis within the Mamba state-space update process. Specifically, AdaMamba introduces an interactive patch encoding module to capture inter-variable interaction dynamics. Then, we develop an adaptive frequency-gated state-space module that generates input-dependent frequency bases, and generalizes the conventional temporal forgetting gate into a unified time-frequency forgetting gate. This allows dynamic calibration of state transitions based on learned frequency-domain importance, while preserving Mamba's capability in modeling long-range dependencies. Extensive experiments on seven public LTSF benchmarks and two domain-specific datasets demonstrate that AdaMamba consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in forecasting accu racy while maintaining competitive computational efficiency. The code of AdaMamba is available at https://github.com/XDjiang25/AdaMamba.

ai.tldr: 提出AdaMamba框架，将自适应频率分析内化到Mamba状态空间更新中，用于长期时间序列预测。
ai.motivation: 现有频率域方法隐含假设跨域同质性，难以适应真实时间序列中时域同步但频域异质的复杂变化。
ai.method: 设计交互式补丁编码模块捕获变量间动态，开发自适应频率门控状态空间模块生成输入依赖的频率基，并将传统遗忘门推广为时频联合遗忘门。
ai.result: 在7个公开基准和2个领域数据集上，预测精度一致超越现有方法，同时保持竞争性计算效率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过自适应频率门控增强Mamba模型对长期时间序列中复杂周期和依赖的建模能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将频率域自适应分析与状态空间模型结合，通过动态频率基和时频遗忘门提升对异质时间模式的捕捉。
idea_spark.risk: 频率基的生成可能增加计算开销，且对噪声敏感；跨域异质性假设的泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受频率域分析全局视角启发，将频率重要性动态融入状态更新，突破传统同质性假设限制。

en.tldr: Proposes AdaMamba, a framework that endogenizes adaptive frequency analysis into Mamba state-space updates for long-term time series forecasting.
en.motivation: Existing frequency-domain methods implicitly assume cross-domain homogeneity, limiting their ability to adapt to real-world time series where variables synchronized in time may differ in frequency.
en.method: Introduces an interactive patch encoding module to capture inter-variable dynamics, and an adaptive frequency-gated state-space module that generates input-dependent frequency bases and generalizes the forgetting gate to a time-frequency one.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art methods on seven public benchmarks and two domain-specific datasets in forecasting accuracy while maintaining competitive efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how adaptive frequency gating enhances Mamba's ability to model complex periodic patterns and long-range dependencies in time series.

idea_spark.idea: Combining frequency-domain adaptive analysis with state-space models via dynamic frequency bases and a time-frequency forgetting gate to capture heterogeneous temporal patterns.
idea_spark.risk: Generating frequency bases may increase computational cost and sensitivity to noise; generalizability of cross-domain heterogeneity assumptions needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the global perspective of frequency-domain analysis, dynamically incorporating frequency importance into state updates to overcome homogeneity assumptions.

papers.title: CT-Guided Spatially-varying Regularization for Voxel-Wise Deformable Whole-Body PET Registration
papers.summary: Whole-body Positron Emission Tomography (PET) registration is essential for multi-parametric tumor characterization and assessment of metastatic disease progression. In deep learning-based deformable registration, the dense displacement field (DDF) regularizer is crucial for stabilizing optimization and preventing unrealistic deformations in large 3D volumes. A key challenge in whole-body deformable registration is anatomical heterogeneity, rigid structures (e.g., bones) should undergo stronger regularization, whereas soft tissues require more flexible deformation and weaker constraints. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective CT-guided spatially-varying regularization strategy for whole-body cross-tracer deformable PET registration. The key idea is to use the paired CT volume from the PET/CT acquisition to construct a voxel-wise regularization map for the DDF, replacing the conventional single global regularization weight. This yields anatomy-adaptive regularization strength across rigid and soft tissues. The proposed method is evaluated on a real clinical cross-tracer PET/CT dataset of 296 patients involving 18F-PSMA and 18F-FDG, showing that the proposed method achieves statistically significant improvements over weakly-supervised registration baseline in both whole-body registration performance and organ-wise alignment.

ai.tldr: 提出一种CT引导的空间变化正则化策略，用于全身PET可变形配准，根据解剖结构自适应调整正则化强度。
ai.motivation: 全身PET配准中解剖异质性大，刚性结构（如骨骼）需强正则化，软组织需弱正则化，而传统单一全局权重无法适应。
ai.method: 利用PET/CT中的CT图像构建体素级正则化图，替代全局正则化权重，实现解剖自适应正则化。
ai.result: 在296例患者的临床交叉示踪剂PET/CT数据集上，该方法在全身配准和器官对齐上均显著优于弱监督基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用CT信息改进PET配准中的正则化，提升多示踪剂全身配准精度。

idea_spark.idea: 可进一步将正则化图与器官分割结合，实现器官级别的自适应正则化。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量CT图像，若CT质量差或缺失可能影响效果；计算开销增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用同一扫描中的结构图像（CT）指导功能图像（PET）配准，启发跨模态信息融合新思路。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量CT图像，若CT质量差或缺失可能影响效果；计算开销增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用同一扫描中的结构图像（CT）指导功能图像（PET）配准，启发跨模态信息融合新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a CT-guided spatially-varying regularization strategy for whole-body PET deformable registration, adapting regularization strength based on anatomy.
en.motivation: Anatomical heterogeneity in whole-body PET registration requires different regularization for rigid (e.g., bones) and soft tissues, but a single global weight is insufficient.
en.method: Constructs a voxel-wise regularization map from the paired CT volume to replace the global regularization weight, enabling anatomy-adaptive regularization.
en.result: On a clinical cross-tracer PET/CT dataset of 296 patients, the method significantly improves whole-body registration and organ-wise alignment over a weakly-supervised baseline.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage CT information to improve regularization in PET registration, enhancing multi-tracer whole-body alignment.

idea_spark.idea: Further combine the regularization map with organ segmentation for organ-level adaptive regularization.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality CT; poor CT quality or absence may degrade performance; increased computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using structural images (CT) from the same scan to guide functional image (PET) registration inspires new cross-modal information fusion approaches.

papers.title: Deformed and undeformed localized wave solutions for the two-component (2+1)-dimensional Fokas-Lenells equation
papers.summary: In this paper, we focus on the two-component (2+1)-dimensional Fokas-Lenells equation, which models the propagation of ultrashort optical pulses in nonlinear media with multi-mode interactions and multi-dimensional effects. Firstly, we construct the determinant form of the generalized Darboux transformation (DT). Secondly, we obtain deformed solitons, deformed positons on the zero background and deformed breathers, deformed Y-shaped breathers on the nonzero backgrounds by DT method. Finally, the undeformed solutions including higher-order rogue wave solutions and breather-rogue wave solutions are derived by generalized DT. This work enriches the solution family associated with the equation, but also illustrates the efficiency of DT method in multi-dimensional and multi-component systems.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了两分量(2+1)维Fokas-Lenells方程，通过广义达布变换构造了变形孤子、变形正子、变形呼吸子和Y形呼吸子，以及未变形的高阶怪波和呼吸-怪波解。
ai.motivation: 探索多分量、多维非线性系统中局域波解的多样性，丰富Fokas-Lenells方程的解族。
ai.method: 利用广义达布变换的行列式形式，在零背景和非零背景下分别构造变形解和未变形解。
ai.result: 获得了变形孤子、变形正子、变形呼吸子、Y形呼吸子以及高阶怪波和呼吸-怪波解。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解多维非线性光学脉冲传播提供了新的解析解和达布变换的应用范例。

idea_spark.idea: 将变形与未变形解的分类方法应用于其他物理系统，如Bose-Einstein凝聚体或水波动力学。
idea_spark.risk: 高维系统中解的稳定性及实验可观测性可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 变形解与未变形解的对比可能揭示非线性系统中背景对局域波结构的影响机制。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了两分量(2+1)维Fokas-Lenells方程，通过广义达布变换构造了变形孤子、变形正子、变形呼吸子和Y形呼吸子，以及未变形的高阶怪波和呼吸-怪波解。
zh.motivation: 探索多分量、多维非线性系统中局域波解的多样性，丰富Fokas-Lenells方程的解族。
zh.method: 利用广义达布变换的行列式形式，在零背景和非零背景下分别构造变形解和未变形解。
zh.result: 获得了变形孤子、变形正子、变形呼吸子、Y形呼吸子以及高阶怪波和呼吸-怪波解。
zh.help_to_user: 为理解多维非线性光学脉冲传播提供了新的解析解和达布变换的应用范例。

idea_spark.idea: 将变形与未变形解的分类方法应用于其他物理系统，如Bose-Einstein凝聚体或水波动力学。
idea_spark.risk: 高维系统中解的稳定性及实验可观测性可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 变形解与未变形解的对比可能揭示非线性系统中背景对局域波结构的影响机制。

en.tldr: This paper studies the two-component (2+1)-dimensional Fokas-Lenells equation, constructing deformed solitons, positons, breathers, Y-shaped breathers, and undeformed higher-order rogue waves and breather-rogue waves via the generalized Darboux transformation.
en.motivation: To explore the diversity of localized wave solutions in multi-component, multi-dimensional nonlinear systems and enrich the solution family of the Fokas-Lenells equation.
en.method: Using the determinant form of the generalized Darboux transformation, deformed solutions are obtained on zero and nonzero backgrounds, while undeformed solutions are derived via the generalized DT.
en.result: Deformed solitons, deformed positons, deformed breathers, deformed Y-shaped breathers, as well as higher-order rogue waves and breather-rogue waves are obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides new analytical solutions and a demonstration of the Darboux transformation method for understanding multi-dimensional nonlinear optical pulse propagation.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the classification of deformed versus undeformed solutions to other physical systems, such as Bose-Einstein condensates or water wave dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: Stability and experimental observability of solutions in higher dimensions may be limited.
idea_spark.inspiration: Comparison between deformed and undeformed solutions may reveal the influence of background on localized wave structures in nonlinear systems.

papers.title: Isospectral Steering
papers.summary: We study the controllability of the differential Lyapunov equation under isospectral rotation of a linear gradient field. Specifically, control is effected by a symmetric time-varying gain-matrix constrained to have fixed eigenvalues; that is, by exclusively modulating the eigen-vectors of the state matrix and not its eigenvalues. Motivation for this problem stems from a certain type of control objectives (minimum shear/attention) aimed to reduce anisotropic deformation when ensembles are steered by a common law--optimality necessitates constancy of eigenvalues. In the paper we introduce and motivate this type of isospectral steering, and describe the reachable set of covariances for any specified terminal time and eigenvalues of the gain matrix. The theory we develop is intimately linked to multilinear algebra as well as to positive linear algebra and the Birkoff-von Neumann theorem for doubly stochastic matrices.

ai.tldr: 研究在线性梯度场的等谱旋转下，微分Lyapunov方程的可控性，控制通过固定特征值的对称时变增益矩阵实现。
ai.motivation: 减少各向异性变形的最优控制需要增益矩阵特征值恒定，从而引出等谱转向问题。
ai.method: 利用多重线性代数、正线性代数以及Birkhoff-von Neumann定理，分析任意终端时间和特征值下协方差的可达集。
ai.result: 完整描述了等谱转向下协方差的可达集。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要最小剪切/注意力的控制目标提供了理论框架，适用于受共同律引导的系综。

idea_spark.idea: 将等谱转向与深度强化学习结合，自动搜索最优特征值轨迹。
idea_spark.risk: 多重线性代数复杂度高，实际实现可能面临计算瓶颈。
idea_spark.inspiration: Birkhoff-von Neumann定理在双随机矩阵中的应用启发我们探索更广泛的矩阵族约束。

idea_spark.inspiration: Birkhoff-von Neumann定理在双随机矩阵中的应用启发我们探索更广泛的矩阵族约束。

en.tldr: We study controllability of the differential Lyapunov equation under isospectral rotation of a linear gradient field, using a symmetric time-varying gain matrix with fixed eigenvalues.
en.motivation: Optimal control to reduce anisotropic deformation requires constant eigenvalues of the gain matrix, motivating isospectral steering.
en.method: We employ multilinear algebra, positive linear algebra, and the Birkhoff-von Neumann theorem to characterize the reachable set of covariances for any terminal time and eigenvalues.
en.result: The reachable set of covariances under isospectral steering is fully described.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for control objectives requiring minimum shear/attention in ensemble steering.

idea_spark.idea: Combine isospectral steering with deep reinforcement learning to automatically search for optimal eigenvalue trajectories.
idea_spark.risk: High complexity of multilinear algebra may lead to computational bottlenecks in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: The Birkhoff-von Neumann theorem for doubly stochastic matrices inspires exploration of broader matrix family constraints.

papers.title: LatentBurst: A Fast and Efficient Multi Frame Super-Resolution for Hexadeca-Bayer Pattern CIS images
papers.summary: This paper introduces a novel multi frame super-resolution network (MFSR) for burst hexadeca Bayer pattern Contact Image Sensor (CIS) images, which includes demosaicing, denoising, multi-frame fusion, and super-resolution. Designing a high-quality reconstruction network poses several challenges as follows: 1) Unlike the Bayer color filter array (CFA) pattern, it is hard to interpolate hexadeca-Bayer pattern since the pixel distance between the same color groups increases; 2) Due to large object motion and camera movements, the final fusion result usually suffers the misalignment resulting a blurry image or ghosting artifacts; 3) The proposed network should be fast and efficient enough to operate in real-time on mobile devices. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel network, called LatentBurst, which contains: 1) a pyramid align and fusion approach in latent feature to deal with large motion scenario; 2) an efficient UNet-based structure which can run efficiently on mobile device; 3) fine-tuned optical flow estimation and two-step knowledge distillation to reduce domain-gap more effectively. Experimental results in various scenarios demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method compared with other state-of-the-art methods.

ai.tldr: 提出一种针对十六拜耳模式CIS图像的多帧超分辨率网络LatentBurst，集成去马赛克、去噪、多帧融合与超分，在移动设备上实现实时高质量重建。
ai.motivation: 十六拜耳CFA模式像素间距大导致插值困难，大运动场景下多帧融合易产生错位模糊或鬼影，且需满足移动端实时性要求。
ai.method: 采用潜在特征中的金字塔对齐与融合处理大运动，基于高效UNet结构，结合微调光流估计和两步知识蒸馏缩小域差距。
ai.result: 在多种场景下相比现有方法取得更优的重建质量与效率。
ai.help_to_user: 为移动端CIS图像提供快速、高质量的超分辨率方案，适用于手机摄影、监控等实时场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将两步知识蒸馏与微调光流结合，可进一步探索无监督域适应下的超分辨率。
idea_spark.risk: 对极端大运动或复杂纹理场景的鲁棒性可能不足，蒸馏过程可能丢失细节。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴UNet高效结构与潜在空间对齐，启发设计轻量级多帧融合网络用于边缘设备。

idea_spark.idea: 将两步知识蒸馏与微调光流结合，可进一步探索无监督域适应下的超分辨率。
idea_spark.risk: 对极端大运动或复杂纹理场景的鲁棒性可能不足，蒸馏过程可能丢失细节。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴UNet高效结构与潜在空间对齐，启发设计轻量级多帧融合网络用于边缘设备。

en.tldr: Proposes LatentBurst, a multi-frame super-resolution network for hexadeca-Bayer CIS images, integrating demosaicing, denoising, multi-frame fusion, and super-resolution, achieving real-time high-quality reconstruction on mobile devices.
en.motivation: Hexadeca-Bayer CFA pattern increases pixel distance making interpolation difficult; large motion causes misalignment and ghosting in multi-frame fusion; the network must be fast and efficient for mobile deployment.
en.method: Employs pyramid alignment and fusion in latent space for large motion, an efficient UNet-based structure, and fine-tuned optical flow with two-step knowledge distillation to reduce domain gap.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art methods in various scenarios in both reconstruction quality and efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides fast, high-quality super-resolution for mobile CIS images, suitable for real-time applications like smartphone photography and surveillance.

idea_spark.idea: Combining two-step knowledge distillation with fine-tuned optical flow could be extended to unsupervised domain adaptation for super-resolution.
idea_spark.risk: May struggle with extreme large motion or complex textures; distillation might lose fine details.
idea_spark.inspiration: The efficient UNet structure and latent space alignment inspire lightweight multi-frame fusion networks for edge devices.

papers.title: A Geometric Witness Framework for Signed Multivariate Tail-Dependence Compatibility: Asymptotic Structure and Finite-Threshold Synthesis
papers.summary: We study multivariate tail-dependence compatibility for complete and partial signed tail families, treating lower-tail, upper-tail, and mixed configurations in one geometric witness representation indexed by active coordinate sets and sign patterns. For a complete signed tail family, witness generator weights w = (w_{I,sigma}) give a linear incidence parametrization and are recovered by explicit triangular inversion. Excluding the geometric scale p0, the complete case uses 3^d - 1 generator weights, matching the number of complete signed tail coefficients; for partial specifications, only selected target coefficients need be prescribed. At a fixed threshold p0 in (0, 1/2), the inversion identifies the normalized noncentral ternary cell masses of any realizing copula. Hence finite-threshold compatibility is characterized by nonnegative recovered generator weights, singleton normalization, and the residual central-mass constraint.   This yields a complete Moebius-type synthesis within the witness framework. If the recovered increments are nonnegative and singleton normalization holds, then S(w) = sum(w) determines the admissible finite-scale range, and every admissible p0 gives an exact witness realization. In the canonical ray geometry, such a realization preserves the same complete signed tail family throughout 0 < p <= p0. Thus the primary object is the complete signed tail family lambda: it is realized at every admissible finite scale and can be carried along families of witness copulas with p0 decreasing to 0.   Partial, noisy, or inconsistent specifications are treated through linear-feasibility and weighted-l1 recovery problems in the same parametrization. The representation separates the p0-free incidence/Moebius layer from finite-threshold realization and provides tools for realization, simulation, calibration, completion, repair, and scenario design.

ai.tldr: 提出一种几何见证框架，用活跃坐标集和符号模式索引，统一刻画完整和部分符号尾族的多元尾相依兼容性，并给出有限阈值合成与恢复方法。
ai.motivation: 现有多元尾相依兼容性研究多限于单侧或对称情形，缺乏统一处理完整/部分符号尾族（含下尾、上尾和混合配置）的几何框架。
ai.method: 引入见证生成器权重 w=(w_{I,σ}) 的线性关联参数化，通过显式三角反演恢复权重；利用非负性、单点归一化和中心质量约束刻画有限阈值兼容性；对部分、含噪或不一致情形采用线性可行性和加权 l1 恢复。
ai.result: 完整符号尾族需 3^d-1 个生成器权重，与完整符号尾系数数目匹配；反演得到实现 copula 的非中心三元胞质量；兼容性由非负恢复权重、单点归一化和残余中心质量约束表征；每个可容许阈值 p0 给出精确见证实现。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一套工具用于实现、模拟、校准、补全、修复和场景设计，可处理部分、含噪或不一致的尾依赖规范。

idea_spark.idea: 将见证生成器权重视为隐变量，结合贝叶斯推断或变分方法，从观测数据中学习完整符号尾族。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下 3^d 个权重的计算和存储可能成为瓶颈，需开发稀疏或近似算法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴图模型中的 clique 分解或张量分解思想，降低权重空间的维度。
