en.tldr: Proposes leveraging semantic connections among multi-source information (bug reports, commit messages, code changes) via multi-head attention to improve vulnerability identification and classification.
en.motivation: Vulnerabilities in third-party open-source libraries are often implicitly reported and patched without notifying downstream software, and existing methods overlook rich semantic links across information sources.
en.method: Trains an AI model to integrate multiple sources (vulnerability descriptions, commit messages, code changes) using multi-head attention to extract high-level semantics for vulnerability identification and type classification.
en.result: Achieves 0.941 F1-score for vulnerability identification and 0.610 F1-score for type classification, outperforming state-of-the-art by 5.4%.
en.help_to_user: Helps security researchers automatically identify vulnerabilities and their types in open-source libraries, reducing dependency risks.

idea_spark.idea: Enhance semantic connections with knowledge graphs or introduce temporal analysis for vulnerability evolution.
idea_spark.risk: Data quality varies across sources, noise may degrade performance; relies on public data, not applicable to private libraries.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage multimodal learning (text + code) for security analysis, similar approaches can be applied to vulnerability prediction or patch verification.

papers.title: Homology-based Morphometry of Brain Atrophy: Methods and Applications
papers.summary: Understanding the structure of the brain, and how it changes with time and disease, is a core goal of structural neuroimaging. Contemporary approaches to structural brain analysis are dominated by voxel-wise, mass-univariate methods such as voxel-based morphometry (VBM). However, these techniques require images to be normalized to a standard template, which can obscure subject-specific geometric features. Normalization to a common stereotactic space can also be problematic when comparing groups with substantial brain pathology, lesions, or other anatomical abnormalities.   Here, we introduce two complementary pipelines based on persistent homology (PH), a tool from topological data analysis, to quantify multiscale geometric features of structural T1-weighted MRI scans. Pipeline 1 quantifies regional thinning by applying the Euclidean distance transform to tissue masks in a slice-wise manner. Pipeline 2 uses \(α\)-filtrations to measure structural similarity between pairs of scans, capturing sulcal widening and ventricular enlargement.   Synthetic experiments with controlled induced lesions showed that Pipeline 1 is best suited to between-subject analyses, whereas Pipeline 2 is better suited to within-subject designs. Applied to real-world data from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI), Pipeline 1 separated Alzheimer's disease (AD) from cognitively normal (CN) participants using single-modality T1-weighted MRI without nonlinear registration (ROC-AUC = 0.895), with peak effects localized to medial temporal regions. Pipeline 2 captured disease-related longitudinal change, with follow-up scans remaining closest to their own baselines and AD subjects showing greater short-interval change than CN subjects. Together, these pipelines provide interpretable topological biomarkers for cross-sectional group comparisons and longitudinal tracking.

ai.tldr: 提出两种基于持续同调的脑萎缩形态测量流程，无需非线性配准即可实现横断面分类与纵向追踪。
ai.motivation: 传统体素形态测量法依赖标准模板配准，会掩盖个体几何特征，且对病理脑组比较困难。
ai.method: 流程1：对组织掩膜逐层进行欧几里得距离变换以量化区域变薄；流程2：使用α过滤测量扫描对间的结构相似性，捕捉沟增宽与脑室扩大。
ai.result: 流程1在ADNI数据上以单模态T1-MRI区分AD与认知正常者（AUC=0.895），峰值效应位于内侧颞叶；流程2捕获疾病相关纵向变化，AD患者短期变化大于正常者。
ai.help_to_user: 提供可解释的拓扑生物标志物，用于横断面分组比较和纵向追踪，无需非线性配准。

idea_spark.idea: 将流程1与流程2结合，构建统一框架同时输出区域萎缩和全局结构变化，并利用拓扑特征指导深度学习模型。
idea_spark.risk: α过滤的计算复杂度较高，可能限制大规模数据集的应用；对扫描参数差异敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 拓扑数据分析在医学影像中的潜力，特别是无需配准即可捕捉疾病特异性几何变形。

idea_spark.inspiration: 拓扑数据分析在医学影像中的潜力，特别是无需配准即可捕捉疾病特异性几何变形。

en.tldr: Two persistent homology-based pipelines for brain atrophy morphometry are introduced, enabling cross-sectional classification and longitudinal tracking without nonlinear registration.
en.motivation: Traditional voxel-based morphometry relies on normalization to a standard template, which obscures subject-specific geometric features and is problematic for pathological brains.
en.method: Pipeline 1 applies Euclidean distance transform to tissue masks slice-wise to quantify regional thinning; Pipeline 2 uses α-filtrations to measure structural similarity between scan pairs, capturing sulcal widening and ventricular enlargement.
en.result: On ADNI data, Pipeline 1 separated AD from cognitively normal participants with single-modality T1-MRI (AUC=0.895), with peak effects in medial temporal regions; Pipeline 2 captured disease-related longitudinal change, with AD subjects showing greater short-interval change.
en.help_to_user: Provides interpretable topological biomarkers for cross-sectional group comparisons and longitudinal tracking without requiring nonlinear registration.

idea_spark.idea: Combine both pipelines into a unified framework that outputs both regional atrophy and global structural changes, and use topological features to guide deep learning models.
idea_spark.risk: Computational cost of α-filtrations may limit scalability to large datasets; sensitivity to scan parameter differences.
idea_spark.inspiration: Potential of topological data analysis in medical imaging, especially for capturing disease-specific geometric deformations without registration.

papers.title: An Analysis of the Coordination Gap between Joint and Modular Learning for Job Shop Scheduling with Transportation Resources
papers.summary: Efficient job-shop scheduling with transportation resources is critical for high-performance manufacturing. With the rise of "decentralized factories", multi-agent reinforcement learning has emerged as a promising approach for the combined scheduling of production and transportation tasks. Prior work has largely focused on developing novel cooperative architectures while overlooking the question of when joint training is necessary. Joint training denotes the simultaneous training of job and automatic guided vehicle scheduling agents, whereas modular training involves independently training each agent followed by post-hoc integration. In this study, we systematically investigate the conditions under which joint training is essential for optimal performance in the job-shop scheduling problem with transportation resources. Through a rigorous sensitivity analysis of resource scarcity and temporal dominance, we quantify the coordination gap -- the performance difference between these two training modalities. In our evaluation, the joint training can produce superior performance compared to the best-performing combinations of dispatching rules and modular training. However, the coordination gap advantage diminishes in bottleneck environments, particularly under severe transport and processing constraints. These findings indicate that modular training represents a viable alternative in environments where a single scheduling task dominates. Overall, our work provides practical guidance for selecting between training modalities based on environmental conditions, enabling decision-makers to optimize reinforcement learning-based scheduling performance.

ai.tldr: 研究了在带运输资源的作业车间调度中，联合训练与模块化训练之间的协调差距，发现联合训练在非瓶颈环境下表现更优，而模块化训练在瓶颈环境下是可行的替代方案。
ai.motivation: 现有研究多关注合作架构设计，但忽略了何时需要联合训练的问题，缺乏对两种训练模式适用条件的系统分析。
ai.method: 通过资源稀缺性和时间主导性的敏感性分析，量化了联合训练与模块化训练之间的性能差异（协调差距）。
ai.result: 联合训练在多数情况下优于模块化训练和调度规则组合，但在运输和处理约束严重的瓶颈环境中优势减弱。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助决策者根据环境条件选择联合训练或模块化训练，优化基于强化学习的调度性能。

idea_spark.idea: 探索动态切换训练模式的方法，根据实时资源状态在联合与模块化训练之间自适应选择。
idea_spark.risk: 动态切换可能引入额外的计算开销和训练不稳定性，需要谨慎设计切换策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受瓶颈环境下模块化训练仍有效的启发，可研究在部分可观测环境中利用模块化训练降低通信成本。

zh.tldr: 研究了在带运输资源的作业车间调度中，联合训练与模块化训练之间的协调差距，发现联合训练在非瓶颈环境下表现更优，而模块化训练在瓶颈环境下是可行的替代方案。

zh.result: 联合训练在多数情况下优于模块化训练和调度规则组合，但在运输和处理约束严重的瓶颈环境中优势减弱。

idea_spark.idea: 探索动态切换训练模式的方法，根据实时资源状态在联合与模块化训练之间自适应选择。
idea_spark.risk: 动态切换可能引入额外的计算开销和训练不稳定性，需要谨慎设计切换策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受瓶颈环境下模块化训练仍有效的启发，可研究在部分可观测环境中利用模块化训练降低通信成本。

en.tldr: Investigates the coordination gap between joint and modular training for job shop scheduling with transportation resources, finding joint training superior in non-bottleneck settings but modular training viable under severe constraints.
en.motivation: Prior work overlooks when joint training is necessary; this study systematically analyzes conditions for optimal training modality selection.
en.method: Sensitivity analysis of resource scarcity and temporal dominance to quantify the performance difference (coordination gap) between joint and modular training.
en.result: Joint training outperforms modular training and dispatching rules in most cases, but the advantage diminishes in bottleneck environments with severe transport and processing constraints.
en.help_to_user: Provides practical guidance for selecting between joint and modular training based on environmental conditions to optimize reinforcement learning-based scheduling.

idea_spark.idea: Explore adaptive training modality switching based on real-time resource state to dynamically choose between joint and modular training.
idea_spark.risk: Dynamic switching may introduce computational overhead and training instability, requiring careful strategy design.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by modular training's viability under bottlenecks, investigate using modular training to reduce communication costs in partially observable settings.

papers.title: Weakly Supervised Multicenter Nancy Index Scoring in Ulcerative Colitis Using Foundation Models
papers.summary: Histologic assessment of ulcerative colitis (UC) activity is an important endpoint in clinical trials and routine care, but manual grading with indices such as the Nancy histological index (NHI) is time-consuming and prone to observer variability. While computational pathology methods can automate scoring, many approaches depend on dense region-level annotations, which are costly to obtain, particularly in heterogeneous, multicenter cohorts.   We propose a weakly supervised multiple instance learning (MIL) approach for whole-slide images that learns from case- and slide-level NHI labels, leveraging foundation models. Our method targets clinically relevant endpoints, including neutrophilic activity and derived Nancy-low/high groupings, enabling full five-grade NHI prediction.   On a multicenter dataset of H&E-stained colon biopsies from three hospitals (2019-2025), we evaluate multiple foundation model encoders and aggregation strategies. We find that foundation model choice and resolution substantially affect performance, with Virchow2 providing the most consistent gains, and that a simple ensembling rule improves five-grade NHI prediction compared to a hierarchical gating baseline.   Overall, our results demonstrate that weakly supervised MIL with modern foundation-model representations can provide robust, interpretable UC histology activity assessment in realistic multicenter settings.

ai.tldr: 提出一种弱监督多实例学习方法，利用基础模型对溃疡性结肠炎全切片图像进行Nancy组织学指数评分，在多个心数据集上验证了鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 手动Nancy组织学指数评分耗时且观察者变异大，现有计算方法依赖昂贵的密集区域标注，尤其在多中心队列中难以推广。
ai.method: 采用弱监督多实例学习框架，从病例和切片级别的NHI标签学习，结合基础模型编码器和聚合策略，实现五级NHI预测。
ai.result: 基础模型选择和分辨率显著影响性能，Virchow2表现最佳；简单集成规则优于层次门控基线，在三个医院的数据集上取得鲁棒结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助病理学家和临床研究者自动化UC组织学活动评估，减少手动评分负担，提高多中心研究的一致性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将基础模型与注意力机制结合，自动识别最具判别性的组织区域，提升评分可解释性。
idea_spark.risk: 基础模型对图像分辨率和染色差异敏感，可能在不同中心数据上泛化不足；弱监督标签噪声可能影响高粒度评分。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受自然语言处理中弱监督文本分类启发，将切片视为文档，组织区域视为句子，利用预训练视觉模型提取特征。

en.tldr: Proposes a weakly supervised multiple instance learning method using foundation models for Nancy histological index scoring in ulcerative colitis whole-slide images, demonstrating robustness on a multicenter dataset.
en.motivation: Manual Nancy histological index scoring is time-consuming and prone to observer variability, and existing computational methods rely on expensive dense region annotations, especially challenging in multicenter cohorts.
en.method: Employs weakly supervised multiple instance learning from case- and slide-level NHI labels, leveraging foundation model encoders and aggregation strategies for full five-grade NHI prediction.
en.result: Foundation model choice and resolution significantly affect performance, with Virchow2 showing consistent gains; a simple ensembling rule outperforms hierarchical gating baseline on data from three hospitals.
en.help_to_user: Assists pathologists and clinical researchers in automating UC histologic activity assessment, reducing manual scoring burden and improving consistency across multicenter studies.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining foundation models with attention mechanisms to automatically identify the most discriminative tissue regions, enhancing interpretability of scores.
idea_spark.risk: Foundation models are sensitive to image resolution and staining variations, potentially limiting generalization across centers; weak label noise may affect fine-grained scoring.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by weakly supervised text classification in NLP, treating slides as documents and tissue regions as sentences, using pretrained vision models for feature extraction.

papers.title: Point-MF: One-step Point Cloud Generation from a Single Image via Mean Flows
papers.summary: Single-image point cloud reconstruction must infer complete 3D geometry, including occluded parts, from a single RGB image. While diffusion-based reconstructors achieve high accuracy, they typically require many denoising iterations, resulting in slow and expensive inference. We propose Point-MF, a Mean-Flow-based framework for low-NFE single-image point cloud reconstruction that couples a Mean-Flow-compatible architecture with an auxiliary loss. Specifically, Point-MF operates directly in point-cloud space to learn the mean velocity field and enables one-step reconstruction with a single network function evaluation (1-NFE), without relying on VAE-based latent representations. To make Mean Flow effective under large interval jumps, Point-MF employs a Diffusion Transformer tailored to the Mean-Flow setting, conditioned on frozen DINOv3 image features via a lightweight token adapter and equipped with explicit interval/time conditioning. Moreover, we introduce Denoised Space Anchor, a set-distance auxiliary loss on the denoised-space estimate $x_θ$ induced by the predicted velocity field, to stabilize large-step generation and reduce outliers and density artifacts. On ShapeNet-R2N2 and Pix3D, Point-MF strikes a strong balance between reconstruction quality and inference speed compared to multi-step diffusion baselines and competitive feedforward models, while generating high-quality point clouds with millisecond-level latency.

ai.tldr: 提出Point-MF，基于均值流实现单步单图像点云重建，仅需一次网络评估，兼顾高质量与毫秒级延迟。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散重建器精度高但需多次去噪迭代，推理慢且成本高。
ai.method: 在点云空间直接学习均值速度场，结合适配均值流的扩散Transformer（条件为冻结DINOv3特征）和去噪空间锚点辅助损失。
ai.result: 在ShapeNet-R2N2和Pix3D上，与多步扩散和前馈模型相比，在重建质量和推理速度间取得强平衡，生成高质量点云且延迟为毫秒级。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种极低计算开销的单步点云生成方案，适合实时或资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将去噪空间锚点损失的思想用于其他生成模型（如GAN、VAE）以稳定大步长生成。
idea_spark.risk: 均值流在大间隔跳跃时可能不稳定，需精心设计条件编码和损失函数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用冻结的预训练视觉特征（如DINOv3）作为条件，可减少训练成本并提升泛化性。

zh.tldr: 提出Point-MF，基于均值流实现单步单图像点云重建，仅需一次网络评估，兼顾高质量与毫秒级延迟。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用冻结的预训练视觉特征（如DINOv3）作为条件，可减少训练成本并提升泛化性。

en.tldr: Proposes Point-MF, a mean-flow-based framework for one-step single-image point cloud reconstruction with only one network function evaluation, achieving high quality and millisecond latency.
en.motivation: Existing diffusion-based reconstructors require many denoising iterations, leading to slow and expensive inference.
en.method: Learns the mean velocity field directly in point-cloud space, using a Diffusion Transformer tailored for mean flow (conditioned on frozen DINOv3 features) and a Denoised Space Anchor auxiliary loss.
en.result: On ShapeNet-R2N2 and Pix3D, Point-MF strikes a strong balance between reconstruction quality and inference speed compared to multi-step diffusion baselines and feedforward models, generating high-quality point clouds with millisecond latency.
en.help_to_user: Provides a low-computation one-step point cloud generation solution suitable for real-time or resource-constrained applications.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the Denoised Space Anchor loss idea to other generative models (e.g., GANs, VAEs) to stabilize large-step generation.
idea_spark.risk: Mean flow may be unstable under large interval jumps, requiring careful design of conditioning encoding and loss functions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using frozen pretrained visual features (e.g., DINOv3) as conditioning can reduce training cost and improve generalization.

papers.title: Pref-CTRL: Preference Driven LLM Alignment using Representation Editing
papers.summary: Test-time alignment methods offer a promising alternative to fine-tuning by steering the outputs of large language models (LLMs) at inference time with lightweight interventions on their internal representations. Recently, a prominent and effective approach, RE-Control (Kong et al., 2024), has proposed leveraging an external value function trained over the LLM's hidden states to guide generation via gradient-based editing. While effective, this method overlooks a key characteristic of alignment tasks, i.e. that they are typically formulated as learning from human preferences between candidate responses. To address this, in this paper we propose a novel preference-based training framework, Pref-CTRL, that uses a multi-objective value function to better reflect the structure of preference data. Our approach has outperformed RE-Control on two benchmark datasets and showed greater generalization on out-of-domain datasets. Our source code is available at https://github.com/UTS-nlPUG/pref-ctrl.

ai.tldr: 提出Pref-CTRL框架，通过多目标价值函数进行表示编辑，在测试时对齐LLM，优于RE-Control。
ai.motivation: 现有测试时对齐方法（如RE-Control）忽略了偏好数据的结构特性，即对齐任务通常基于候选回复间的人类偏好。
ai.method: 设计基于偏好的训练框架Pref-CTRL，使用多目标价值函数编辑LLM内部表示，在推理时引导生成。
ai.result: 在两个基准数据集上超越RE-Control，并在域外数据集上展现更好的泛化能力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需微调即可在推理时对齐LLM的高效方法，适合资源受限或快速迭代场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将表示编辑与在线人类反馈结合，实现动态对齐。
idea_spark.risk: 多目标优化可能增加计算开销，且偏好数据质量直接影响对齐效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受强化学习从人类反馈（RLHF）启发，但将训练阶段的价值函数迁移至推理时干预。

zh.motivation: 现有测试时对齐方法（如RE-Control）忽略了偏好数据的结构特性，即对齐任务通常基于候选回复间的人类偏好。

idea_spark.risk: 多目标优化可能增加计算开销，且偏好数据质量直接影响对齐效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受强化学习从人类反馈（RLHF）启发，但将训练阶段的价值函数迁移至推理时干预。

en.tldr: Proposes Pref-CTRL, a preference-based training framework using multi-objective value function for representation editing to align LLMs at test time, outperforming RE-Control.
en.motivation: Existing test-time alignment methods like RE-Control overlook the preference data structure, where alignment tasks are typically formulated from human preferences between candidate responses.
en.method: Designs Pref-CTRL with a multi-objective value function to edit LLM internal representations during inference, guided by preference data.
en.result: Outperforms RE-Control on two benchmarks and shows better generalization on out-of-domain datasets.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient test-time alignment method without fine-tuning, suitable for resource-constrained or rapid iteration scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining representation editing with online human feedback for dynamic alignment.
idea_spark.risk: Multi-objective optimization may increase computational cost, and preference data quality directly impacts alignment effectiveness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by RLHF but shifts the value function from training to inference-time intervention.

papers.title: ESIA: An Energy-Based Spatiotemporal Interaction-Aware Framework for Pedestrian Intention Prediction
papers.summary: Recent advances in autonomous driving have motivated research on pedestrian intention prediction, which aims to infer future crossing decisions and actions by modeling temporal dynamics, social interactions, and environmental context. However, existing studies remain constrained by oversimplified multi-agent interaction patterns, opaque reasoning logic, and a lack of global consistency in behavioral predictions, which compromise both robustness and interpretability. In this work, we propose ESIA (Energy-based Spatiotemporal Interaction-Aware framework), a novel Conditional Random Field (CRF)-based paradigm. We cast the intention prediction task as a structured prediction problem over a unified graph-based representation, treating pedestrians and the environment as spatiotemporal nodes. To characterize their distinct roles, we assign unary potentials to nodes to capture individual intentions, and pairwise potentials to edges to encode social and environmental interactions. These potentials are integrated into a unified global energy function to ensure scene-level consistency across behavioral predictions. To further constrain inference without ground-truth supervision, we introduce structural consistency terms to penalize logical contradictions. This optimization is efficiently solved via a novel Unary-Seeded Simulated Annealing (U-SSA) algorithm, which leverages high-confidence unary priors to rapidly converge to a high-quality solution. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that ESIA achieves state-of-the-art performance with improved interpretability over existing methods.

ai.tldr: 提出ESIA框架，将行人意图预测建模为基于条件随机场的结构化预测问题，通过能量函数和模拟退火优化实现全局一致性与可解释性。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在多智能体交互建模、推理逻辑透明性和预测全局一致性方面存在不足，影响鲁棒性和可解释性。
ai.method: 构建统一图表示，行人与环境作为时空节点，分配一元势（个体意图）和成对势（社交/环境交互），集成全局能量函数；引入结构一致性项约束推理，采用一元种子模拟退火算法高效优化。
ai.result: 在标准基准上达到最先进性能，并提升可解释性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用能量模型和结构化预测提升行人意图预测的准确性与可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将环境上下文作为显式节点纳入图模型，并通过结构一致性项约束逻辑矛盾，可增强预测的物理合理性。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟退火优化可能对初始种子敏感，需谨慎设计一元先验的置信度阈值。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受CRF在图像分割中成功应用的启发，将类似的结构化建模思路引入时序行为预测。

idea_spark.risk: 模拟退火优化可能对初始种子敏感，需谨慎设计一元先验的置信度阈值。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受CRF在图像分割中成功应用的启发，将类似的结构化建模思路引入时序行为预测。

en.tldr: Proposes ESIA, a CRF-based framework that casts pedestrian intention prediction as structured prediction with a global energy function and unary-seeded simulated annealing for consistency and interpretability.
en.motivation: Existing methods suffer from oversimplified interaction patterns, opaque reasoning, and lack of global consistency, compromising robustness and interpretability.
en.method: Constructs a unified graph with pedestrians and environment as spatiotemporal nodes; assigns unary potentials (individual intentions) and pairwise potentials (social/environmental interactions) integrated into a global energy function; introduces structural consistency terms and optimizes via Unary-Seeded Simulated Annealing.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks with improved interpretability.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into using energy-based models and structured prediction for accurate and interpretable pedestrian intention prediction.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly modeling environmental context as nodes and penalizing logical contradictions via structural consistency terms enhances physical plausibility of predictions.
idea_spark.risk: Simulated annealing optimization may be sensitive to initial seeds; careful design of confidence thresholds for unary priors is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of CRFs in image segmentation, applying similar structured modeling to temporal behavior prediction.

papers.title: Graph-augmented Segmentation of Complex Shapes in Laser Powder bed Fusion for Enhanced In Situ Inspection
papers.summary: The technological maturity of in situ inspection and monitoring methods in additive manufacturing is steadily increasing, enabling more efficient and practical qualification procedures. In this context, image segmentation of powder bed images in Laser Powder Bed Fusion (L-PBF) has been investigated by various authors, leveraging both edge detection and machine learning approaches to identify deviations from nominal geometry. Despite these developments, several challenges remain, including the sensitivity of segmentation performance to industrial illumination conditions and layer-to-layer variability in pixel intensity patterns. The study addresses these limitations by proposing a graph-augmented segmentation approach. The underlying principle consists of preserving the geometrical information at a global level rather than at pixel-wise level, modeling dependencies and relational information among spatial regions with a Graph Neural Network bottleneck embedded into a U-Net architecture. This allows enhancing the consistency and accuracy of the geometry reconstruction in the presence of spatial and layer-wise photometric variability systematically faced in real data. The method is evaluated against benchmark techniques for the in situ reconstruction of lattice structures produced by L-PBF, demonstrating its potential as a scalable solution for robust in situ inspection and geometric verification in industrial environments.

ai.tldr: 提出一种图增强分割方法，通过图神经网络瓶颈嵌入U-Net架构，在激光粉末床熔融增材制造中实现复杂形状的鲁棒原位检测。
ai.motivation: 现有图像分割方法对工业光照条件和层间像素强度变化敏感，导致几何重建不一致。
ai.method: 在U-Net中嵌入图神经网络瓶颈，保留全局几何信息并建模空间区域间的依赖关系。
ai.result: 在晶格结构原位重建中优于基准技术，展示了可扩展的鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用图神经网络提升工业环境下图像分割的几何一致性。

idea_spark.idea: 将图神经网络与U-Net结合，以区域关系代替像素级处理，应对光照和层间变化。
idea_spark.risk: 图构建和计算开销可能影响实时性，需优化图规模。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受图神经网络在关系建模中的成功启发，将其用于空间区域依赖建模。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受图神经网络在关系建模中的成功启发，将其用于空间区域依赖建模。

en.tldr: Proposes a graph-augmented segmentation method that embeds a Graph Neural Network bottleneck into a U-Net architecture for robust in situ inspection of complex shapes in laser powder bed fusion.
en.motivation: Existing segmentation methods are sensitive to industrial illumination conditions and layer-to-layer pixel intensity variations, leading to inconsistent geometry reconstruction.
en.method: Embeds a Graph Neural Network bottleneck into a U-Net to preserve global geometric information and model dependencies among spatial regions.
en.result: Outperforms benchmark techniques for in situ reconstruction of lattice structures, demonstrating scalable robustness.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how graph neural networks can improve geometric consistency in industrial image segmentation.

idea_spark.idea: Combine GNN with U-Net to process region relations instead of pixels, handling illumination and layer variations.
idea_spark.risk: Graph construction and computational overhead may hinder real-time performance; graph size needs optimization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of GNNs in relational modeling, applied to spatial region dependency modeling.

papers.title: Point Cloud Registration for Fusion between SPECT MPI and CTA Images
papers.summary: Clinical fusion of Single Photon Emission Computed Tomography Myocardial Perfusion Imaging (SPECT MPI) and Computed Tomography Angiography (CTA) remains limited by cross-modality misregistration and reliance on manual landmarks, which can hinder accurate ischemia localization and lesion-level functional assessment. To address this issue, we propose a registration and fusion framework for SPECT MPI and CTA that integrates functional and structural information for comprehensive cardiac evaluation. The proposed pipeline performs U-Net-based segmentation on both modalities. On SPECT MPI, only the left ventricle (LV) is extracted, and anatomical landmarks are automatically derived from characteristic LV structures. On CTA, both ventricles are segmented, and their spatial relationship is used to automatically define landmarks at the interventricular septal junction. Scale-space consistency preprocessing and landmark-driven coarse registration are applied to mitigate initial misalignment. Based on this initialization, multiple fine registration methods are evaluated on LV epicardial surface point clouds, including ICP, SICP, CPD, CluReg, FFD, and BCPD-plus-plus. The resulting transformations are then propagated to voxel-level resampling for high-precision SPECT-CTA fusion. In a retrospective cohort of 60 patients, the proposed framework preserved sub-millimeter coronary detail from CTA while accurately overlaying quantitative SPECT perfusion. Among the evaluated methods, BCPD-plus-plus achieved the highest accuracy with a mean point cloud distance of 1.7 mm. By combining robust initialization, comparative fine registration, and voxel-level fusion, the proposed approach provides a practical solution for myocardial ischemia localization and functional evaluation of coronary lesions, while remaining independent of any specific fine registration algorithm.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合功能与结构信息的SPECT MPI与CTA配准融合框架，实现高精度心肌缺血定位。
ai.motivation: SPECT MPI与CTA的临床融合受限于跨模态配准误差和手动标记依赖，影响缺血定位准确性。
ai.method: 使用U-Net分割左心室和双心室，自动提取解剖标志，经尺度空间预处理和粗配准后，评估多种精细配准方法（如BCPD-plus-plus），最后进行体素级重采样融合。
ai.result: 在60例患者中，BCPD-plus-plus平均点云距离1.7 mm，保留CTA亚毫米冠脉细节并准确叠加SPECT灌注。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种自动、高精度的SPECT MPI与CTA融合方案，辅助心肌缺血和冠脉病变的功能评估。

idea_spark.idea: 利用点云配准和体素级融合，结合自动解剖标志，实现无需手动干预的跨模态图像对齐。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量分割结果，分割误差可能影响配准精度；不同扫描仪或协议下鲁棒性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将功能影像（SPECT）与结构影像（CTA）的配准问题转化为点云配准问题，并系统比较多种算法，启发类似多模态融合研究。

en.tldr: Proposes a registration and fusion framework for SPECT MPI and CTA integrating functional and structural information for accurate myocardial ischemia localization.
en.motivation: Clinical fusion of SPECT MPI and CTA is limited by cross-modality misregistration and reliance on manual landmarks, hindering accurate ischemia localization.
en.method: U-Net segmentation extracts left ventricle (SPECT) and both ventricles (CTA); automatic landmarks are derived; scale-space preprocessing and coarse registration are applied; multiple fine registration methods (e.g., BCPD-plus-plus) are evaluated on LV epicardial point clouds; transformations are propagated to voxel-level resampling.
en.result: In 60 patients, BCPD-plus-plus achieved the highest accuracy with mean point cloud distance of 1.7 mm, preserving sub-millimeter coronary detail while overlaying quantitative SPECT perfusion.
en.help_to_user: Provides an automatic, high-precision SPECT MPI and CTA fusion solution to aid functional assessment of myocardial ischemia and coronary lesions.

idea_spark.idea: Leverages point cloud registration and voxel-level fusion with automatic anatomical landmarks for manual-free cross-modal alignment.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality segmentation; segmentation errors may affect registration accuracy; robustness across different scanners or protocols needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Formulates functional-structural image fusion as a point cloud registration problem and systematically compares algorithms, inspiring similar multi-modal fusion studies.

papers.title: AgentRVOS for MeViS-Text Track of 5th PVUW Challenge: 3rd Method
papers.summary: This report describes a Ref-VOS pipeline centered on Sa2VA and organized with explicit agent roles. The key idea is that Sa2VA should provide the first dense semantic hypothesis, while an agent loop decides whether that hypothesis should be accepted, revised, or refined. The pipeline starts with a target-presence judgment stage. If the referred object does not exist in the video, the system directly outputs zero masks. Otherwise, Sa2VA receives the video and referring prompt and produces a coarse mask trajectory over the full video. This trajectory is treated as a semantic prior rather than a final answer. A planner agent decomposes the query, temporal partition agents identify informative blocks, scout agents search for anchor frames, and refinement agents convert reliable Sa2VA masks into boxes and points for SAM3 propagation. A critic scores candidate trajectories, a reflection controller repairs weak hypotheses, and a collaboration controller reconciles multiple agent branches. The result is a Ref-VOS system in which Sa2VA is responsible for dense grounded understanding, while the agent layer handles presence verification, temporal search, confidence-aware revision, and final mask refinement.

ai.tldr: 提出一个基于Sa2VA和显式智能体角色的Ref-VOS流水线，在MeViS-Text赛道中排名第三。
ai.motivation: 现有Ref-VOS方法依赖单一模型直接输出最终掩码，缺乏对目标存在性、时间搜索和置信度感知修正的显式处理。
ai.method: 流水线包含目标存在性判断、Sa2VA生成粗掩码轨迹、规划智能体分解查询、时间分区智能体识别信息块、侦察智能体搜索锚帧、精炼智能体将可靠掩码转为SAM3传播的框和点、评论家评分候选轨迹、反思控制器修复弱假设、协作控制器协调多智能体分支。
ai.result: 在MeViS-Text验证集上达到较高分割精度，获得挑战赛第三名。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了如何通过智能体架构将基础分割模型（Sa2VA）与显式推理步骤结合，提升视频对象分割的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将Sa2VA作为语义先验，通过多智能体循环进行假设验证与精炼，避免单一模型过拟合。
idea_spark.risk: 智能体数量增加可能引入额外计算开销和协调复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多智能体系统启发，将复杂视觉任务分解为可验证的子步骤，类似软件工程中的微服务架构。

idea_spark.risk: 智能体数量增加可能引入额外计算开销和协调复杂度。

en.tldr: Proposes a Ref-VOS pipeline centered on Sa2VA with explicit agent roles, achieving 3rd place in the MeViS-Text track.
en.motivation: Existing Ref-VOS methods rely on a single model to directly output final masks, lacking explicit handling of target presence, temporal search, and confidence-aware revision.
en.method: The pipeline includes target-presence judgment, Sa2VA generating coarse mask trajectories, a planner agent decomposing the query, temporal partition agents identifying informative blocks, scout agents searching for anchor frames, refinement agents converting reliable masks into boxes and points for SAM3 propagation, a critic scoring candidate trajectories, a reflection controller repairing weak hypotheses, and a collaboration controller reconciling multiple agent branches.
en.result: Achieves high segmentation accuracy on the MeViS-Text validation set, ranking 3rd in the challenge.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates how to combine a base segmentation model (Sa2VA) with explicit reasoning steps via an agent architecture to improve robustness in video object segmentation.

idea_spark.idea: Use Sa2VA as a semantic prior and refine it through a multi-agent loop for hypothesis verification and refinement, avoiding overfitting of a single model.
idea_spark.risk: Increasing the number of agents may introduce additional computational overhead and coordination complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multi-agent systems, decomposing complex vision tasks into verifiable sub-steps, similar to microservice architecture in software engineering.

papers.title: MAE-Based Self-Supervised Pretraining for Data-Efficient Medical Image Segmentation Using nnFormer
papers.summary: Transformer architectures, including nnFormer,have demonstrated promising results in volumetric medical image segmentation by being able to capture long-range spatial interactions. Although they have high performance, these models need large quantities of labeled training data and are also likely to overfit and become training unstable. This is a serious practical problem because it is not only time-consuming but also expensive to obtain medical images that are annotated by experts. Moreover, fully supervised traditional training pipelines do not take advantage of the available large amounts of unlabeled medical imaging data that can be easily obtained in the clinics. We have solved these drawbacks by advancing the efficiency of the nnFormer with a self-supervised pretraining framework, which is based on the Masked Autoencoders (MAE). In this method, the model is pretrained on unlabeled volumetric medical images to reconstruct randomly masked parts of the input. This allows the encoder to learn meaningful anatomical and structural representations . The encoder is then further fine-tuned on a labeled dataset on the downstream segmentation task. Conducted Experiment shows that the offered method leads to a higher segmentation performance on the count of Dice score, a quicker convergence rate on the course of the fine-tuning procedure, and a superior generalization on the basis of limited labeled data . These findings validate that self-supervised learning combined with transformer-based segmentation models is an appropriate approach to the problem of data shortage in medical image analysis.

ai.tldr: 提出基于掩码自编码器的自监督预训练方法，提升nnFormer在医学图像分割中的数据效率。
ai.motivation: Transformer分割模型需要大量标注数据，获取成本高，且易过拟合，而大量未标注医学图像未被利用。
ai.method: 在未标注体素医学图像上预训练nnFormer编码器，通过重建随机掩码区域学习解剖结构表示，再在下游分割任务上微调。
ai.result: 在有限标注数据下，Dice分数更高、收敛更快、泛化更好。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用自监督预训练减少医学图像分割对标注数据的依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将掩码自编码器与多模态医学图像（如MRI+CT）结合，学习跨模态特征。
idea_spark.risk: 预训练计算成本较高，且掩码策略可能丢失关键解剖细节。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受自然语言处理中掩码语言模型启发，将类似思路用于3D医学图像理解。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受自然语言处理中掩码语言模型启发，将类似思路用于3D医学图像理解。

en.tldr: Proposes a MAE-based self-supervised pretraining method to improve data efficiency of nnFormer for medical image segmentation.
en.motivation: Transformer segmentation models require large labeled datasets, which are costly to obtain, and often overfit; abundant unlabeled medical images remain underutilized.
en.method: Pretrain the nnFormer encoder on unlabeled volumetric medical images by reconstructing randomly masked patches, then fine-tune on labeled data for segmentation.
en.result: Achieves higher Dice scores, faster convergence, and better generalization with limited labeled data.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how self-supervised pretraining reduces the need for labeled data in medical image segmentation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining masked autoencoders with multi-modal medical images (e.g., MRI+CT) to learn cross-modal features.
idea_spark.risk: Pretraining incurs high computational cost, and masking strategies may lose critical anatomical details.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by masked language models in NLP, applying a similar idea to 3D medical image understanding.

papers.title: VDLF-Net: Variational Feature Fusion for Adaptive and Few-Shot Visual Learning
papers.summary: This paper introduces VDLF-Net, which attaches a compact VAE to a multi-scale CNN backbone. Latent vectors and softmax-gate support the backbone feature maps, while $\ell_2$-normalized embeddings from the gated maps contribute toward supervised classification or episodic few-shot prediction. Under standard CIFAR-100 and Mini-ImageNet protocols, VDLF-Net demonstrates an improved performance over ResNet-50 Enhanced, VGG-16, Prototypical Networks, and Matching Networks. Extensive ablations show that removing the fine-resolution scale has the greatest impact on VDLF-Net's performance. At the same time, KL and reconstruction at the chosen $α$ pose a minor performance reduction, demonstrating that performance gains over classical episodic baselines mainly originate from the full VDLF-Net architecture and training strategy.

ai.tldr: 提出VDLF-Net，将紧凑VAE附加到多尺度CNN骨干上，通过潜在向量和softmax门控增强特征图，在CIFAR-100和Mini-ImageNet上优于多种基线。
ai.motivation: 现有少样本学习方法在特征融合和适应性上存在不足，需要更有效的变分特征融合机制。
ai.method: 在CNN骨干后插入紧凑VAE，生成潜在向量；通过softmax门控加权特征图，并利用ℓ2归一化嵌入进行分类或小样本预测。
ai.result: 在标准协议下性能优于ResNet-50 Enhanced、VGG-16、原型网络和匹配网络；消融实验表明细分辨率尺度最关键，KL和重建损失影响较小。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种结合变分自编码器和门控机制的少样本学习框架，可用于图像分类任务。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将VAE替换为其他生成模型（如扩散模型）以进一步提升特征表示能力。
idea_spark.risk: VAE的KL项可能限制特征多样性，需谨慎平衡重建与分类损失。
idea_spark.inspiration: 多尺度门控机制启发设计更细粒度的特征选择策略。

idea_spark.inspiration: 多尺度门控机制启发设计更细粒度的特征选择策略。

en.tldr: Proposes VDLF-Net, attaching a compact VAE to a multi-scale CNN backbone, enhancing feature maps via latent vectors and softmax gating, outperforming several baselines on CIFAR-100 and Mini-ImageNet.
en.motivation: Existing few-shot learning methods lack effective feature fusion and adaptability, necessitating a variational feature fusion mechanism.
en.method: Inserts a compact VAE after the CNN backbone to generate latent vectors; uses softmax gating to weight feature maps and ℓ2-normalized embeddings for classification or few-shot prediction.
en.result: Outperforms ResNet-50 Enhanced, VGG-16, Prototypical Networks, and Matching Networks under standard protocols; ablation shows fine-resolution scale is most critical, while KL and reconstruction losses have minor impact.
en.help_to_user: Provides a few-shot learning framework combining variational autoencoder and gating mechanism, applicable to image classification tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore replacing VAE with other generative models (e.g., diffusion models) to further enhance feature representation.
idea_spark.risk: KL term in VAE may limit feature diversity; careful balance between reconstruction and classification loss is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Multi-scale gating mechanism inspires designing finer-grained feature selection strategies.

papers.title: Breaking the Resource Wall: Geometry-Guided Sequence Modeling for Efficient Semantic Segmentation
papers.summary: High-performance semantic segmentation has achieved significant progress in recent years, often driven by increasingly large backbones and higher computational budgets. While effective, such approaches introduce substantial computational overhead and limit accessibility under constrained hardware settings. In this paper, we propose DGM-Net (Directional Geometric Mamba Network), an efficient architecture that improves modeling capability through structural design rather than increasing model capacity. We introduce Directional Geometric Mamba (G-Mamba), a linear-complexity O(N) operator as an alternative to conventional context modeling modules such as ASPP and PPM. To further enhance structural awareness in state space model (SSM)-based modeling, we design the DGM-Module, which extracts centripetal flow fields and topological skeletons to guide the scanning process and improve boundary preservation. Without relying on large-scale pretraining or heavy backbone scaling, DGM-Net achieves 80.8% mIoU within 28k iterations, 82.3% mIoU on Cityscapes test set, and 45.24% mIoU on ADE20K. In addition, the model maintains stable performance under constrained hardware settings (e.g., batch size of 2 on 8GB VRAM), highlighting its efficiency and practicality. These results demonstrate that incorporating geometric guidance into SSM-based architectures provides an effective and resource-efficient direction for semantic segmentation.

ai.tldr: 提出DGM-Net，通过几何引导的序列建模实现高效语义分割，无需大规模预训练或重型骨干网络。
ai.motivation: 现有高性能语义分割依赖大型骨干网络和高计算预算，资源受限硬件下难以部署。
ai.method: 设计线性复杂度O(N)的Directional Geometric Mamba算子替代ASPP/PPM，并引入DGM-Module提取向心流场和拓扑骨架引导扫描过程，增强边界保持。
ai.result: Cityscapes测试集82.3% mIoU，ADE20K 45.24% mIoU，8GB显存下batch size 2稳定运行。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种资源高效的分割方案，适合低算力设备或快速迭代场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将拓扑骨架与向心流场作为先验知识注入序列建模，替代传统注意力机制。
idea_spark.risk: 几何先验的提取可能引入额外计算，且对非规则目标（如复杂拓扑）的泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从流体力学和拓扑学中借鉴结构引导思想，启发设计更高效的序列模型。

zh.tldr: 提出DGM-Net，通过几何引导的序列建模实现高效语义分割，无需大规模预训练或重型骨干网络。
zh.motivation: 现有高性能语义分割依赖大型骨干网络和高计算预算，资源受限硬件下难以部署。

zh.result: Cityscapes测试集82.3% mIoU，ADE20K 45.24% mIoU，8GB显存下batch size 2稳定运行。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种资源高效的分割方案，适合低算力设备或快速迭代场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将拓扑骨架与向心流场作为先验知识注入序列建模，替代传统注意力机制。
idea_spark.risk: 几何先验的提取可能引入额外计算，且对非规则目标（如复杂拓扑）的泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从流体力学和拓扑学中借鉴结构引导思想，启发设计更高效的序列模型。

en.tldr: Proposes DGM-Net, an efficient semantic segmentation architecture using geometry-guided sequence modeling without large-scale pretraining or heavy backbones.
en.motivation: High-performance segmentation relies on large backbones and high compute budgets, limiting deployment on resource-constrained hardware.
en.method: Introduces Directional Geometric Mamba (G-Mamba), a linear-complexity O(N) operator replacing ASPP/PPM, and DGM-Module that extracts centripetal flow fields and topological skeletons to guide scanning and improve boundary preservation.
en.result: 82.3% mIoU on Cityscapes test, 45.24% mIoU on ADE20K, stable with batch size 2 on 8GB VRAM.
en.help_to_user: Offers a resource-efficient segmentation solution suitable for low-compute devices or rapid iteration.

idea_spark.idea: Inject topological skeletons and centripetal flow fields as priors into sequence modeling, replacing traditional attention.
idea_spark.risk: Extracting geometric priors may add overhead; generalization to irregular objects (e.g., complex topology) needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrows structural guidance from fluid dynamics and topology, inspiring more efficient sequence model design.

papers.title: $Z^2$-Sampling: Zero-Cost Zigzag Trajectories for Semantic Alignment in Diffusion Models
papers.summary: Diffusion models have achieved unprecedented success in text-aligned generation, largely driven by Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG). However, standard CFG operates strictly on instantaneous gradients, omitting the intrinsic curvature of the data manifold. Recent methods like Zigzag-sampling (Z-Sampling) explicitly traverse multi-step forward-backward trajectories to probe this curvature, significantly improving semantic alignment. Yet, these explicit traversals triple the Neural Function Evaluation (NFE) cost and introduce unconstrained truncation errors from off-manifold evaluations, causing cumulative drift from the true marginal distribution. In this paper, we theoretically demonstrate that the explicit zigzag sequence is topologically reducible. We propose Implicit Z-Sampling, rigorously proving that intermediate states can be algebraically annihilated via operator dualities, physically eliminating off-manifold approximation errors. To push sampling efficiency to its theoretical lower bound, we introduce $Z^2$-Sampling (Zero-cost Zigzag Sampling). Exploiting the Probability Flow ODE's temporal coherence, $Z^2$-Sampling couples implicit algebraic collapse with a dynamically cached Temporal Semantic Surrogate. This restores the standard 2-NFE baseline without sacrificing semantic exploration. We formally prove via Backward Error Analysis that this discrete collapse inherently synthesizes a directional derivative curvature penalty. Finally, extensive evaluations demonstrate that $Z^2$-Sampling structurally shatters the performance-efficiency Pareto frontier. We validate its universal applicability across diverse architectures (U-Nets, DiTs) and modalities (image/video), establishing seamless orthogonality with advanced alignment frameworks (AYS, Diffusion-DPO).

ai.tldr: 提出Z²-Sampling，通过隐式代数坍缩和动态缓存语义代理，在不增加NFE成本的前提下消除显式锯齿轨迹的截断误差，打破性能-效率帕累托前沿。
ai.motivation: 现有Z-Sampling虽能改善语义对齐，但三倍NFE开销和离流形截断误差导致累积漂移，亟需零成本且无误差的替代方案。
ai.method: 理论证明显式锯齿序列可拓扑约简，利用算子对偶性代数消去中间状态；结合概率流ODE时间相干性，引入动态缓存的时序语义代理实现隐式坍缩。
ai.result: 恢复标准2-NFE基线，通过后向误差分析证明离散坍缩自然合成方向导数曲率惩罚，在U-Net/DiT架构及图像/视频模态上均超越现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需额外计算即可提升扩散模型语义对齐精度的采样策略，适用于文本到图像/视频生成任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将动态缓存机制与算子对偶性结合，设计通用“零成本曲率探测”框架，用于任意ODE/SDE采样过程。

papers.title: RowHammer Vulnerability Counter (RVC): Redefining RowHammer Detection with Victim-Centric Tracking
papers.summary: The Rowhammer vulnerability poses an increasing challenge with newer generations of DRAM and aggressive technology scaling. Existing mitigation techniques, such as Graphene, Twice, and Hydra, primarily rely on tracking activation counts for each row and issuing refreshes when a row reaches a predefined tracking threshold. However, these methods have inherent limitations, including inefficiencies in identifying rows genuinely at risk of bit flips.   In this paper, we propose a novel framework called Rowhammer Vulnerability Count (RVC), which shifts the focus from activation count tracking to evaluating a row's actual vulnerability to bit flips. By selectively issuing refreshes only to rows on the verge of experiencing bit flips, RVC drastically reduces unnecessary refresh operations. We also demonstrate that prior works have incorrectly set tracking thresholds, leading to security flaws.   Our evaluation shows that RVC achieves 95 - 99.99% improvement in mitigation induced refreshes when compared to Graphene, with no additional space overhead. Furthermore, RVC improves energy efficiency and reduces average LLC latency by up to 76.91%, making it a highly efficient and scalable solution for addressing Rowhammer in modern DRAM systems. These findings establish RVC as a superior approach for preventing Rowhammer, outperforming existing methods in both accuracy and efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于受害者行跟踪的Rowhammer检测框架RVC，通过评估行实际比特翻转风险来减少不必要的刷新操作。
ai.motivation: 现有Rowhammer缓解方法（如Graphene、Twice、Hydra）依赖激活计数跟踪，无法准确识别真正有比特翻转风险的行，导致效率低且存在安全漏洞。
ai.method: RVC将焦点从激活计数转移到行的实际脆弱性评估，仅对即将发生比特翻转的行选择性发出刷新。
ai.result: 与Graphene相比，RVC减少95-99.99%的缓解诱导刷新，无额外空间开销，平均LLC延迟降低76.91%，能效提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何更高效地防御Rowhammer攻击，减少不必要的刷新开销。

idea_spark.idea: 利用机器学习预测行的比特翻转风险，进一步优化刷新决策。
idea_spark.risk: 脆弱性评估模型可能被攻击者绕过，需考虑对抗鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从安全漏洞的根本原因出发设计防御，而非仅依赖统计阈值。

en.tldr: Proposes a Rowhammer detection framework RVC based on victim-row tracking, reducing unnecessary refreshes by evaluating actual bit flip risk.
en.motivation: Existing Rowhammer mitigations (e.g., Graphene, Twice, Hydra) rely on activation count tracking, failing to accurately identify rows truly at risk of bit flips, leading to inefficiency and security flaws.
en.method: RVC shifts focus from activation counts to actual vulnerability assessment of rows, selectively issuing refreshes only to rows on the verge of bit flips.
en.result: Compared to Graphene, RVC reduces mitigation-induced refreshes by 95-99.99% with no additional space overhead, reduces average LLC latency by up to 76.91%, and improves energy efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to defend against Rowhammer attacks more efficiently with reduced refresh overhead.

idea_spark.idea: Use machine learning to predict bit flip risk of rows to further optimize refresh decisions.
idea_spark.risk: Vulnerability assessment model may be bypassed by attackers; adversarial robustness needs consideration.
idea_spark.inspiration: Design defenses based on root cause of security vulnerabilities rather than relying solely on statistical thresholds.

papers.title: Causal Discovery as Dialectical Aggregation: A Quantitative Argumentation Framework
papers.summary: Constraint-based causal discovery is brittle in finite-sample regimes because erroneous conditional-independence (CI) decisions can cascade into substantial structural errors. We propose Quantitative Argumentation for Causal Discovery (QACD), a semantics-driven framework that represents CI outcomes as graded, defeasible arguments rather than irreversible constraints. QACD maps statistical test outcomes to argument strengths and aggregates conflicting evidence through connectivity-mediated witness propagation, producing a fixed-point acceptability labeling over candidate adjacencies. Experiments on standard benchmark Bayesian networks suggest that QACD improves structural coherence and interventional reliability in several noisy or inconsistent CI regimes, while remaining competitive with classical constraint-based, hybrid, and prior argumentation-based baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于定量论证的因果发现框架，将条件独立性检验结果视为可废止的论证，通过连通性中介的证人传播聚合冲突证据，在有限样本下提升结构一致性。
ai.motivation: 传统基于约束的因果发现在有限样本下因条件独立性检验错误级联而脆弱。
ai.method: 将统计检验结果映射为论证强度，通过连通性中介的证人传播进行冲突证据聚合，得到候选邻接的固定点可接受性标记。
ai.result: 在标准贝叶斯网络基准上，QACD在噪声或不一致的CI场景下改善了结构一致性和干预可靠性，与经典基线相当。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用论证推理增强因果发现的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从哲学辩证法中借鉴冲突证据的聚合思想，启发更鲁棒的因果推断方法。

en.motivation: Constraint-based causal discovery is brittle in finite samples due to cascading errors from erroneous CI decisions.
en.method: Maps statistical test outcomes to argument strengths and aggregates conflicting evidence through connectivity-mediated witness propagation, yielding a fixed-point acceptability labeling over candidate adjacencies.
en.result: On standard Bayesian network benchmarks, QACD improves structural coherence and interventional reliability in noisy or inconsistent CI regimes, competitive with classical baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how argumentation reasoning can enhance robustness in causal discovery.

idea_spark.risk: Convergence and computational efficiency of witness propagation may become bottlenecks on large graphs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from dialectical philosophy to aggregate conflicting evidence, inspiring more robust causal inference methods.

papers.title: Empirical Ablation and Ensemble Optimization of a Convolutional Neural Network for CIFAR-10 Classification
papers.summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) remain a central approach in image classification, but their performance depends strongly on architectural and training choices. This paper presents an empirical ablation-based study of CNN optimization for the CIFAR-10 benchmark. The study evaluates 17 progressive modifications involving training duration, learning-rate scheduling, dropout configuration, pooling strategy, network depth, filter arrangement, and dense-layer design. The goal is to identify which changes improve generalization and which increase complexity without improving performance. The baseline model achieved 79.5\% test accuracy. Extending training duration improved performance steadily, whereas several structural redesigns reduced accuracy despite greater architectural variation. Based on the strongest individual configurations, a weighted ensemble was constructed, achieving 86.38\% accuracy in the reduced-data setting and 89.23\% when trained using the full CIFAR-10 dataset. These results suggest that performance gains in CNN-based classification depend less on indiscriminate increases in depth or parameter count than on careful empirical selection of training and architectural modifications. The study therefore highlights the practical value of ablation-oriented optimization and ensemble learning for small-image classification.

ai.tldr: 通过17种渐进式修改的消融实验和加权集成，将CIFAR-10分类准确率从79.5%提升至89.23%。
ai.motivation: 探究CNN架构与训练选择对图像分类性能的影响，识别真正有效的改进。
ai.method: 对17种修改（训练时长、学习率调度、dropout、池化、深度、滤波器、全连接层）进行消融实验，并构建加权集成模型。
ai.result: 延长训练稳定提升性能，部分结构改动反而降低准确率；集成模型在缩减数据和全数据上分别达86.38%和89.23%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供CNN调优的实证指南，强调消融实验和集成学习的实用价值。

idea_spark.idea: 将消融实验与贝叶斯优化结合，自动搜索最佳修改组合。
idea_spark.risk: 消融实验可能忽略架构间的非线性交互，导致次优组合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于集成学习，可探索不同训练策略（如不同学习率调度）的模型集成。

en.tldr: Through ablation experiments on 17 progressive modifications and weighted ensemble, CIFAR-10 classification accuracy improved from 79.5% to 89.23%.
en.motivation: To investigate the impact of CNN architecture and training choices on image classification performance and identify truly effective improvements.
en.method: Ablation study on 17 modifications (training duration, learning-rate scheduling, dropout, pooling, depth, filter arrangement, dense-layer design) and construction of a weighted ensemble.
en.result: Extending training duration steadily improved performance; some structural changes reduced accuracy. The ensemble achieved 86.38% on reduced data and 89.23% on full CIFAR-10.
en.help_to_user: Provides empirical guidance for CNN tuning, highlighting the practical value of ablation optimization and ensemble learning.

idea_spark.idea: Combine ablation experiments with Bayesian optimization to automatically search for the best combination of modifications.
idea_spark.risk: Ablation experiments may overlook nonlinear interactions between modifications, leading to suboptimal combinations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by ensemble learning, explore model ensembles trained with different strategies (e.g., different learning-rate schedules).

papers.title: A Hierarchical Ensemble Inference Pipeline for Robust White Blood Cell Classification Under Domain Shifts
papers.summary: Automated white blood cell (WBC) classification is essential for scalable leukaemia screening. However, real-world deployment is challenged by domain shifts caused by staining protocols, scanner characteristics, and inter-laboratory variability, which often degrade model performance. The White Blood Cell Classification Challenge (WBCBench) at ISBI 2026 aims to advance robust WBC recognition, with a focus on accurately identifying blast cells and other clinically critical rare subtypes. We propose a memory-augmented, hierarchical ensemble pipeline for WBC classification under domain shifts, leveraging a feature bank and a DinoBloom backbone fine-tuned with LoRA. Our three-stage inference hierarchy combines k-nearest neighbors (kNN) retrieval at each level, reducing over-reliance on any single decision. Evaluated on the WBCBench dataset, our method ranks within the top ten by macro F1-score in the final testing phase.

ai.tldr: 提出一种记忆增强的分层集成推理流水线，用于在域偏移下稳健分类白细胞，在ISBI 2026 WBCBench挑战赛中取得前十成绩。
ai.motivation: 真实部署中染色协议、扫描仪和实验室差异导致的域偏移会降低白细胞分类性能，亟需鲁棒方法。
ai.method: 采用DinoBloom骨干网络和LoRA微调，构建特征库，通过三级分层集成推理，每级使用k近邻检索，减少对单次决策的依赖。
ai.result: 在WBCBench数据集上，最终测试阶段宏F1分数排名前十。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种应对医学图像域偏移的实用分类框架，可参考其分层集成和记忆增强设计。

idea_spark.risk: 特征库维护和检索效率可能成为大规模部署瓶颈。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受少样本学习和检索增强生成启发，将外部记忆引入分类流水线。

en.tldr: Proposes a memory-augmented hierarchical ensemble pipeline for robust white blood cell classification under domain shifts, achieving top-ten macro F1-score in the ISBI 2026 WBCBench challenge.
en.motivation: Domain shifts from staining protocols, scanners, and inter-laboratory variability degrade WBC classification performance in real-world deployment, necessitating robust methods.
en.method: Uses a DinoBloom backbone fine-tuned with LoRA, builds a feature bank, and employs a three-stage hierarchical ensemble inference with k-nearest neighbors retrieval at each level to reduce reliance on any single decision.
en.result: Achieves top-ten macro F1-score in the final testing phase on the WBCBench dataset.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical classification framework for handling domain shifts in medical imaging, with a hierarchical ensemble and memory-augmented design that can be adapted.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining kNN retrieval with attention mechanisms to dynamically adjust layer weights.
idea_spark.risk: Feature bank maintenance and retrieval efficiency may become bottlenecks for large-scale deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by few-shot learning and retrieval-augmented generation, external memory is integrated into the classification pipeline.

papers.title: AsmRAG: LLM-Driven Malware Detection by Retrieving Functionally Similar Assembly Code
papers.summary: Deep learning malware detectors achieve high classification accuracy but suffer from severe interpretability limitations, typically returning probabilistic verdicts that lack forensic context. We introduce AsmRAG, a framework performing malware analysis through Assembly-Level Retrieval-Augmented Generation. Unlike classifiers built on global statistical features, AsmRAG reformulates detection as an evidence-based retrieval task. The system uses a code-specialized Large Language Model (LLM) to analyze assembly functions and convert them into semantic embeddings. This process constructs a searchable knowledge base resilient to syntactic obfuscation. For inference, we propose a Density-Weighted Anchor Selection mechanism that isolates the primary unit of malicious logic within a binary to extract verifiable forensic evidence and resist evasion attempts. Testing on a curated dataset of 40k binaries shows AsmRAG reaching a detection F1-score of 96% alongside a family attribution F1-score of 95%. Comparisons confirm this semantic retrieval approach remains robust against metamorphic obfuscation. When holistic baselines (EMBER and ResNeXt) degrade, our methodology gives Security Operations Centers a transparent and reliable alternative.

ai.tldr: 提出AsmRAG框架，通过检索增强生成技术分析汇编代码，实现高可解释性的恶意软件检测。
ai.motivation: 现有深度学习检测器准确率高但缺乏可解释性，无法提供取证上下文。
ai.method: 使用代码专用大语言模型将汇编函数转换为语义嵌入，构建可搜索知识库；提出密度加权锚点选择机制提取恶意逻辑单元。
ai.result: 在4万二进制样本上检测F1达96%，家族归属F1达95%，对变形混淆鲁棒。
ai.help_to_user: 提供透明、可验证的恶意软件检测结果，辅助安全运营中心取证分析。

papers.title: MAS-SZZ: Multi-Agentic SZZ Algorithm for Vulnerability-Inducing Commit Identification
papers.summary: Accurate vulnerability-inducing commit identification serves as a foundation for a series of software security tasks, such as vulnerability detection and affected version analysis. A straightforward solution is the SZZ algorithm, which traces back through the code history to identify the earliest commit that modify the vulnerable code. Unfortunately, neither the customized V-SZZ nor state-of-the-art LLM4SZZ perform satisfactorily due to the incorrect anchor selection and inadequate backtracking capability, making them far beyond a reliable usage in practice.   To overcome these challenges, we propose a multi-agentic SZZ algorithm, named MAS-SZZ, that facilitates the identification of vulnerability-inducing commits through collaboration among agents. Specifically, given a CVE description and its corresponding fixing commit, MAS-SZZ summarizes the root cause of the vulnerability and employs a structured step-forward prompting strategy to localize vulnerability-related statements based on the change intent of each patch hunk. These vulnerable statements serve as anchors from which MAS-SZZ autonomously traces backward through the repository's history to find the commit that first introduced the vulnerability. Extensive experiments show that MAS-SZZ outperforms the state-of-the-art baselines across datasets and programming languages, achieving F1-score gains of up to 65.22% over the best-performing SZZ algorithm.

ai.tldr: 提出一种多智能体SZZ算法MAS-SZZ，通过智能体协作识别漏洞引入提交，显著提升准确率。
ai.motivation: 现有SZZ算法因锚点选择错误和回溯能力不足，无法可靠识别漏洞引入提交。
ai.method: 基于CVE描述和修复提交，MAS-SZZ总结根因，采用结构化逐步提示定位漏洞语句，并自主回溯历史找到首次引入漏洞的提交。
ai.result: 在多个数据集和编程语言上，MAS-SZZ的F1分数比最优基线提升高达65.22%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全研究人员更准确地定位漏洞引入点，提升漏洞检测和影响版本分析的可靠性。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖CVE描述质量，描述不完整或模糊时可能影响根因总结和锚点定位。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴多智能体对话和逐步推理，可应用于复杂代码库的自动化审计或补丁验证。

en.tldr: Proposes MAS-SZZ, a multi-agent SZZ algorithm that identifies vulnerability-inducing commits via agent collaboration, achieving significant accuracy gains.
en.motivation: Existing SZZ algorithms suffer from incorrect anchor selection and inadequate backtracking, making them unreliable for practical vulnerability-inducing commit identification.
en.method: Given a CVE description and its fixing commit, MAS-SZZ summarizes the root cause, uses structured step-forward prompting to localize vulnerable statements, and autonomously backtracks through history to find the first commit that introduced the vulnerability.
en.result: MAS-SZZ outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across datasets and languages, with F1-score improvements up to 65.22% over the best SZZ variant.
en.help_to_user: Helps security researchers accurately pinpoint vulnerability-inducing commits, enhancing the reliability of vulnerability detection and affected version analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Design more precise anchor selection mechanisms by combining code change intent and root cause summarization to reduce backtracking noise.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on CVE description quality; incomplete or ambiguous descriptions may impair root cause summarization and anchor localization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging multi-agent dialogue and stepwise reasoning could be applied to automated code auditing or patch validation in complex codebases.

papers.title: Private and Common Information States in Decentralized Parallel Dynamic Programming for Delayed Sharing Patterns
papers.summary: This paper develops a dynamic programming (DP) approach for decentralized stochastic optimal control problems with delayed sharing information patterns, which exhibits the fundamental Properties of classical DP of centralized partially observable Markov decision problems (POMDPs): the value functions and information states depend on the actions of the minimizing controls and not their strategies. This is achieved by invoking the concept of Person-by-Person (PbP) optimality, in which each control strategy is associated with a value function conditioned on its assigned delayed sharing information pattern, when all other strategies are fixed to their optimal responses. The value functions satisfy generalized and simplified DP equations. These are used to derive necessary and sufficient conditions for PbP optimality. The simplified DP equations are obtained by invoking the structural property that optimal strategies are separated and functionals of two information states: 1) a private a posteriori probability distribution based on the information pattern of the strategy, and 2) a centralized a posteriori probability distribution based on the shared or common information to all strategies, each satisfying a Markov recursion. The DP approach of this paper, settles a long standing open problem since the appearance of T-step delayed sharing patterns in [1, Section IV.G], in terms of generalizing the fundamental properties of classical DP approach.

ai.tldr: 针对延迟共享信息模式的分散式随机最优控制问题，提出了一种动态规划方法，将经典POMDP的基本性质推广到分散式场景。
ai.motivation: 解决自T步延迟共享模式提出以来长期未解决的分散式随机最优控制问题，推广经典动态规划的基本性质。
ai.method: 引入逐人最优性概念，将每个控制策略关联一个基于其延迟共享信息模式的值函数，并利用私有后验概率分布和公共后验概率分布作为信息状态，推导出广义和简化的动态规划方程。
ai.result: 得到了逐人最优性的充要条件，证明了最优策略具有分离结构，且信息状态满足马尔可夫递归。
ai.help_to_user: 为分散式控制系统的设计和分析提供了理论基础，特别是对于通信受限或延迟共享信息的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将逐人最优性与信息状态分离结合，可能启发设计更高效的分散式算法，例如利用公共信息进行协调而私有信息保持局部自主。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中信息状态的精确计算可能复杂，且逐人最优性不一定保证全局最优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典POMDP动态规划启发，将集中式性质推广到分散式场景，为理论突破提供了思路。

en.tldr: This paper develops a dynamic programming approach for decentralized stochastic optimal control with delayed sharing patterns, generalizing classical POMDP properties to decentralized settings.
en.motivation: To solve a long-standing open problem since the introduction of T-step delayed sharing patterns, by extending fundamental properties of classical dynamic programming.
en.method: Invoking person-by-person optimality, each control strategy is associated with a value function conditioned on its delayed sharing information pattern. Two information states are used: a private a posteriori probability distribution and a common one, each satisfying Markov recursions.
en.result: Necessary and sufficient conditions for person-by-person optimality are derived, and optimal strategies are shown to be separated and functionals of the two information states.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for designing and analyzing decentralized control systems, especially under communication constraints or delayed information sharing.

idea_spark.idea: Combining person-by-person optimality with information state separation may inspire more efficient decentralized algorithms, e.g., using common information for coordination while keeping private information local.
idea_spark.risk: Computing information states exactly can be complex in practice, and person-by-person optimality does not guarantee global optimality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by classical POMDP dynamic programming, this work extends centralized properties to decentralized settings, offering a theoretical breakthrough.

papers.title: Measuring the Unmeasurable: Markov Chain Reliability for LLM Agents
papers.summary: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly operate as sequential software systems, but their reliability is often summarized by scalar benchmark metrics. Metrics such as pass$@k$, pass$^k$, and the reliability decay curve (RDC) are useful summaries, but they do not identify the success-time distribution being estimated, test whether traces support that distribution, or quantify finite-trace uncertainty. We present \textsc{TraceToChain}, a reproducible pipeline that fits agent execution traces to an absorbing discrete-time Markov chain (DTMC), $\hat M=(\hat Q,\hat R_\oplus,\hat R_\ominus)$, with explicit diagnostics and uncertainty. The pipeline builds an automatic cluster taxonomy, estimates transitions with Laplace-smoothed maximum-likelihood estimation (MLE), checks fit with a composite Akaike information criterion (AIC) and Kolmogorov--Smirnov (KS) goodness-of-fit certificate, and reports Dirichlet-posterior credible intervals and non-parametric bootstrap intervals. We adapt classical reliability mathematics (Kemeny--Snell~\cite{kemenysnell}, Cheung~\cite{cheung1980}, Goel--Okumoto~\cite{goelokt}) to agent traces. The resulting first-passage view reconciles metrics usually reported separately: pass$@k$, pass$^k$, and the RDC are projections of one success-time distribution. On seven controlled MAST-style frameworks with a strict 50/50 fit/test protocol, held-out empirical RDCs overlay their analytic counterparts with max $L_\infty^{\mathrm{RDC}} = 0.053$ (median $0.048$). A two-sample KS test on the first-passage cumulative distribution function (CDF) accepts the fitted chain with $p>0.05$ on $7/7$ frameworks (min $p = 0.78$), and per-entry $95\%$ posterior and bootstrap intervals agree to $\approx\!0.01$ at the median.

ai.tldr: 提出TraceToChain流水线，将LLM智能体执行轨迹拟合为吸收马尔可夫链，统一了pass@k、pass^k和可靠性衰减曲线等指标，并提供了拟合诊断与不确定性量化。
ai.motivation: 现有标量基准指标无法识别成功时间分布、无法检验轨迹是否支持该分布、也无法量化有限轨迹的不确定性。
ai.method: 构建自动聚类分类法，用拉普拉斯平滑最大似然估计转移概率，通过复合AIC和KS拟合优度检验验证，并报告Dirichlet后验可信区间和自助法区间。
ai.result: 在7个MAST风格框架上，留出经验RDC与解析RDC的最大L∞为0.053（中位数0.048），KS检验在全部7个框架上接受拟合链（最小p=0.78），后验与自助区间中位数差异约0.01。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员和工程师用统计严谨的方法评估LLM智能体的可靠性，而非依赖单一标量指标。

idea_spark.idea: 将智能体执行轨迹视为吸收马尔可夫链，用首次通过分布统一多种可靠性指标。
idea_spark.risk: 假设轨迹满足马尔可夫性，可能不适用于长程依赖或非平稳环境。
idea_spark.inspiration: 经典可靠性数学（Kemeny-Snell、Cheung、Goel-Okumoto）在LLM智能体场景中的重新应用。

zh.result: 在7个MAST风格框架上，留出经验RDC与解析RDC的最大L∞为0.053（中位数0.048），KS检验在全部7个框架上接受拟合链（最小p=0.78），后验与自助区间中位数差异约0.01。

en.tldr: Proposes TraceToChain, a pipeline that fits LLM agent execution traces to an absorbing Markov chain, unifying pass@k, pass^k, and reliability decay curve metrics with diagnostics and uncertainty quantification.
en.motivation: Scalar benchmark metrics do not identify the success-time distribution, test whether traces support that distribution, or quantify finite-trace uncertainty.
en.method: Builds an automatic cluster taxonomy, estimates transitions with Laplace-smoothed MLE, checks fit with composite AIC and KS goodness-of-fit certificate, and reports Dirichlet-posterior credible intervals and bootstrap intervals.
en.result: On seven MAST-style frameworks, held-out empirical RDCs overlay analytic counterparts with max L∞=0.053 (median 0.048); KS test accepts fitted chain on all 7 frameworks (min p=0.78); posterior and bootstrap intervals agree to ≈0.01 at median.

idea_spark.risk: Assumes Markov property, which may not hold for long-range dependencies or non-stationary environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reapplication of classical reliability mathematics (Kemeny-Snell, Cheung, Goel-Okumoto) in the context of LLM agents.

papers.title: How Do AI Agents Spend Your Money? Analyzing and Predicting Token Consumption in Agentic Coding Tasks
papers.summary: The wide adoption of AI agents in complex human workflows is driving rapid growth in LLM token consumption. When agents are deployed on tasks that require a significant amount of tokens, three questions naturally arise: (1) Where do AI agents spend the tokens? (2) Which models are more token-efficient? and (3) Can agents predict their token usage before task execution? In this paper, we present the first systematic study of token consumption patterns in agentic coding tasks. We analyze trajectories from eight frontier LLMs on SWE-bench Verified and evaluate models' ability to predict their own token costs before task execution. We find that: (1) agentic tasks are uniquely expensive, consuming 1000x more tokens than code reasoning and code chat, with input tokens rather than output tokens driving the overall cost; (2) token usage is highly variable and inherently stochastic: runs on the same task can differ by up to 30x in total tokens, and higher token usage does not translate into higher accuracy; instead, accuracy often peaks at intermediate cost and saturates at higher costs; (3) models vary substantially in token efficiency: on the same tasks, Kimi-K2 and Claude-Sonnet-4.5, on average, consume over 1.5 million more tokens than GPT-5; (4) task difficulty rated by human experts only weakly aligns with actual token costs, revealing a fundamental gap between human-perceived complexity and the computational effort agents actually expend; and (5) frontier models fail to accurately predict their own token usage (with weak-to-moderate correlations, up to 0.39) and systematically underestimate real token costs. Our study offers new insights into the economics of AI agents and can inspire future research in this direction.

ai.tldr: 首次系统研究AI代理在编码任务中的token消耗模式，发现代理任务消耗token是代码推理的1000倍，输入token主导成本，token使用高度随机且与准确性弱相关，前沿模型难以预测自身token消耗。
ai.motivation: AI代理在复杂工作流中广泛使用导致LLM token消耗快速增长，但缺乏对token消耗模式的系统理解。
ai.method: 分析8个前沿LLM在SWE-bench Verified上的轨迹，评估模型预测自身token成本的能力。
ai.result: 代理任务token消耗极高且随机，输入token主导成本；token效率因模型而异；人类感知的任务难度与token成本弱对齐；模型预测token消耗能力弱。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解AI代理的token经济性，优化模型选择和成本控制。

idea_spark.idea: 开发基于任务特征的token成本预测模型，结合早期轨迹动态调整预算。
idea_spark.risk: 预测模型可能过度简化token消耗的随机性，导致预算分配不准确。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴经济学中的成本函数建模，将token消耗视为随机过程进行预测。

zh.motivation: AI代理在复杂工作流中广泛使用导致LLM token消耗快速增长，但缺乏对token消耗模式的系统理解。
zh.method: 分析8个前沿LLM在SWE-bench Verified上的轨迹，评估模型预测自身token成本的能力。
zh.result: 代理任务token消耗极高且随机，输入token主导成本；token效率因模型而异；人类感知的任务难度与token成本弱对齐；模型预测token消耗能力弱。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解AI代理的token经济性，优化模型选择和成本控制。

idea_spark.idea: 开发基于任务特征的token成本预测模型，结合早期轨迹动态调整预算。
idea_spark.risk: 预测模型可能过度简化token消耗的随机性，导致预算分配不准确。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴经济学中的成本函数建模，将token消耗视为随机过程进行预测。

en.tldr: First systematic study of token consumption in agentic coding tasks, revealing 1000x more tokens than code reasoning, input token dominance, high variability, weak correlation with accuracy, and poor self-prediction by frontier models.
en.motivation: Widespread AI agent adoption drives rapid LLM token consumption growth, yet systematic understanding of consumption patterns is lacking.
en.method: Analyzed trajectories of eight frontier LLMs on SWE-bench Verified and evaluated their ability to predict token costs before task execution.
en.result: Agentic tasks are uniquely expensive and stochastic; input tokens dominate cost; token efficiency varies across models; human-perceived difficulty weakly aligns with token cost; models fail to accurately predict their own token usage.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand token economics of AI agents for better model selection and cost management.

idea_spark.idea: Develop task-feature-based token cost prediction models with early-trajectory dynamic budget adjustment.
idea_spark.risk: Prediction models may oversimplify token consumption stochasticity, leading to inaccurate budget allocation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw from economic cost function modeling, treating token consumption as a stochastic process for prediction.

papers.title: Towards System-Oriented Formal Verification of Local-First Access Control
papers.summary: Conflict-free replicated data types (CRDTs) and the local-first concept are increasingly employed not only in small-scale collaboration systems among few users who trust each other, but also in large-scale systems, like Matrix for instant messaging and Keyhive for collaborative documents. Since mutual trust is no longer warranted, these systems require Byzantine fault tolerance and fine-grained access control. As of today, Matrix and Keyhive pair an informal specification with an unverified reference implementation. In this work, we follow a bottom-up approach towards constructing formally verified authorization algorithms for Byzantine fault-tolerant local-first systems. As intermediate target for formal verification, we contribute semantics and invariants of a replicated data type for managing simplified collaboration groups, based on capabilities for access control and hash chronicles for replication. To enable future integration into local-first systems like Matrix and Keyhive, we strive for accessibility to system engineers by using the Rust programming language for formal specification, verification, and implementation, enabled by the Verus framework using the Z3 theorem prover at zero runtime cost. We report on our experience and preliminary results following this approach, and discuss next steps towards scaling up access control expressiveness. Whether this approach can be scaled up to the complexity of real-world local-first access control systems like Matrix or Keyhive remains future work, but our findings demonstrate the potential of system-oriented formal verification with Verus.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向系统的形式化验证方法，用于本地优先系统中的访问控制，使用Verus框架和Rust语言，以支持拜占庭容错和细粒度权限管理。
ai.motivation: 现有本地优先系统（如Matrix和Keyhive）缺乏形式化规范，其访问控制算法未经验证，难以应对大规模场景下的拜占庭故障和细粒度权限需求。
ai.method: 采用自底向上的方法，定义基于能力（capabilities）的访问控制复制数据类型，结合哈希链（hash chronicles）实现复制，并使用Verus框架（基于Z3定理证明器）在Rust中进行形式化规约、验证和实现，零运行时开销。
ai.result: 初步验证了简化协作群组的管理语义和不变量，展示了Verus在系统导向形式化验证中的潜力，但扩展到Matrix或Keyhive等真实系统仍需未来工作。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助系统工程师理解如何用Rust和Verus对本地优先系统的访问控制进行形式化验证，提升安全性和可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将形式化验证与本地优先架构结合，利用CRDT和哈希链实现可验证的授权算法，降低系统漏洞风险。
idea_spark.risk: 扩展到复杂真实系统时，形式化规约的完整性和验证的计算开销可能成为瓶颈。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴Verus框架在系统软件验证中的成功，启发将形式化方法融入更多实际分布式系统的开发流程。
